translations.english: <Alias=QuestGiver> has "suggested" I bestow the Gift of Harkon's Blood upon my spouse, <Alias=Spouse>. I should first render <Alias.PronounObj=Spouse> pliant through the use of Vampire's Seduction then embrace and bite <Alias.PronounObj=Spouse> on the neck. If I currently lack the power, I should forego feeding for a day as I will gain the ability. I should then return to <Alias=QuestGiver> while <Alias=Spouse> undergoes the change.
translations.chinese: <Alias=QuestGiver>“建议”我将哈孔之血赠予我的配偶<Alias=Spouse>。我应该先用吸血鬼的诱惑让<Alias.PronounObj=Spouse>变得顺从，再拥抱并咬<Alias.PronounObj=Spouse>的脖子。如果我现在没有能力，就需要放弃进食血液一天。等<Alias=Spouse>被转化后，再回去找<Alias=QuestGiver>。

translations.english: I have bestowed the Gift of Harkon's Blood upon my spouse, <Alias=Spouse>, at <Alias=QuestGiver>'s "suggestion."
translations.chinese: 在<Alias=QuestGiver>的“建议”下，我将哈孔之血的礼物赠予了我的配偶<Alias=Spouse>。

translations.english: The Dawnguard are apparently focused on exterminating vampires, noble and brute alike.
translations.chinese: 黎明守卫明显更专注于消灭吸血鬼，无论贵贱。

translations.english: Not a serious threat, but we can't leave them completely unchecked or they may become one.
translations.chinese: 不算是个严重威胁，但我们不能放任不管，否则必成后患。

translations.english: They're a splinter group of the "Vigilants of Stendarr." A bit more ambitious, it seems.
translations.chinese: 他们是“斯丹达尔警戒者”的一个分支，看来更有野心。

translations.english:
They warned me not to go through that portal. What did I have to be scared of? I been adventuring for years, and I never seen nothing that I couldn't wallop. But this place...
Ain't nothing living here. Just dead things up and about when they should be in the ground. I can hear their bones scratching at the rocks and knocking together when they walk. If I get home, I'll hang up my sword and never go out again...
translations.chinese:
他们曾警告我不要进那扇传送门。我怕过啥？我冒险了这么多年，还没见过我打不过的东西。可这个地方……
什么活物都没有。只有那些本应死透了的家伙走来走去。当他们走路的时候，我能听见骨头在岩石上来回刮擦碰撞的声音。如果我能回家的话，我就挂剑归隐，再也不出门冒险了……

Ain't nothing living here. Just dead things up and about when they should be in the ground. I can hear their bones scratching at the rocks and knocking together when they walk. If I get home, I'll hang up my sword and never go out again... | ZH:
他们曾警告我不要进那扇传送门。我怕过啥？我冒险了这么多年，还没见过我打不过的东西。可这个地方……

translations.english: Someday, we'll rebuild the Hall of the Vigilant. Mark my words, I'll see it done before they put me in the ground.
translations.chinese: 终有一天，我会重建警戒者之厅。记住我的话，在他们把我送终之前我一定要看着它竣工。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: One thing about living in Skyrim I could never stomach... all the damn vampires!
translations.chinese: 在天际过日子有一个我忍不了的东西……所有该死的吸血鬼！

Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: DLC1TolanSharedHellos3

translations.english: There will be time to honor the fallen later. For now, we've got to put a stop to these vampires.
translations.chinese: 以后会有功夫来悼念死者的。眼下我们得组织这帮吸血鬼。

- INFO:RNAM | EN: ` | ZH: ` | SID: 001F97

translations.english: But of course, those days are gone now.
translations.chinese: 不过当然了，那些日子一去不复返了。

translations.english: The Hall was a place of respite, learning and comradeship, where a road-weary brother or sister could rest for a time in peace and comfort.
translations.chinese: 大厅是一个休息、学习和结交朋友的地方，在那里劳顿的兄弟姐妹能安静、舒适地休息一会儿。

translations.english: Most of our learning could be found there. We always studied our enemies, so we might better learn how to defeat them.
translations.chinese: 那里能找到我们大多数的研究成果。我们一直在研究我们的敌人，所以我们最好学会击败他们的方法。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: DLC1TolanSharedLore1
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: But of course, those days are gone now. | ZH: 不过当然了，那些日子一去不复返了。 | SID: 001674
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: The Hall was a place of respite, learning and comradeship, where a road-weary brother or sister could rest for a time in peace and comfort. | ZH: 大厅是一个休息、学习和结交朋友的地方，在那里劳顿的兄弟姐妹能安静、舒适地休息一会儿。 | SID: 001911
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Most of our learning could be found there. We always studied our enemies, so we might better learn how to defeat them. | ZH: 那里能找到我们大多数的研究成果。我们一直在研究我们的敌人，所以我们最好学会击败他们的方法。 | SID: 001AED

translations.english: I wish I could say it was courage, or skill at arms that saved me. But that would be a lie.
translations.chinese: 我希望我能说是勇气活着使用武器的技巧救了我。但这都是瞎话。

translations.english: No, I am alive only because the vampires spared me.
translations.chinese: 不，我没死只是因为吸血鬼把我放了。

translations.english: It seems they wanted to send a message to the other Vigilants still walking the roads of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 似乎他们想给那些仍然在天际活动的其他警戒者们传个信。

translations.english: If was a foolish mistake, and I intend to make sure they learn that the hard way.
translations.chinese: 这是个愚蠢的错误，而我会让他们惨痛地吸取教训的。

translations.english: I wish I could say how many we numbered, but only a privileged few knew that, and they're dead now.
translations.chinese: 我希望我能讲出我们有多少人，不过那只有少数关键成员知道，而他们现在都死了。

translations.english: Of course there are. Most of us spend our lives as nomads, traveling from place to place in our endless war against evil.
translations.chinese: 当然有。 我们大部分人像游牧民一样生活，在我们与邪恶无止境的交战中，从一个地方走到另一个地方。

translations.english: I was asked to fill the Bloodstone Chalice from the spring in Redwater Den. Garan sent me on this task suspecting that I would be followed and attacked by others attempting to overthrow Harkon. By returning the Chalice I have lessened their power and earned Harkon's favor.
translations.chinese: 我被派去从红水窝点的泉水里灌满血石圣杯。加兰之所以派我执行这个任务，是因为他怀疑我会被企图推翻哈孔者跟踪偷袭。通过归还圣杯，我削弱了他们的力量，并获得了哈孔的青睐。

translations.english: While attempting to fill the Bloodstone Chalice in Redwater Den, I was ambushed by Stalf and Salonia, two vampires from the castle. I'll need to kill them before they can kill me.
translations.chinese: 当我正打算在红水窝点灌满血石圣杯时，我遭遇城堡的两个吸血鬼，史达夫和莎洛妮雅的袭击。我需要在他们干掉我之前先杀掉他们。

translations.english: Harkon has asked me to speak to Garan Marethi, telling him simply "It is time."
translations.chinese: 哈孔让我去和加兰·玛瑞锡谈谈，只需要告诉他“是时候了”。

translations.english: I've been asked to take a special artifact of Harkon's - the Bloodstone Chalice - and to fill it from the spring in Redwater Den. After that, I need to add the blood of a powerful vampire and deliver the chalice to Garan Marethi.
translations.chinese: 我被要求带着哈孔的一件特殊神器——血石圣杯，去红水窝点用泉水装满。然后，我需要添加一个强大吸血鬼的血，再把圣杯交给加兰·玛瑞锡。

translations.english: I have filled the Bloodstone Chalice from the spring in Redwater Den, and added the blood of a vampire. I now need to return the chalice to Garan at the castle.
translations.chinese: 我已经用红水窝点的泉水灌满了血石圣杯，并在其中加入了吸血鬼的血。我现在要回城堡把圣杯交给加兰。
击败史达夫和莎洛妮雅

translations.english: Take the Bloodstone Chalice to Redwater Spring
translations.chinese: 把血石圣杯带到红水泉

translations.english: Fill the Chalice with vampire blood
translations.chinese: 在圣杯里装入吸血鬼的血

translations.english: Fill the Chalice from the spring

translations.english:
[pagebreak]

Notes on Dimhollow Crypt x Vol. 3 As written by Adalvald

[pagebreak]

Divines be praised! Here at last is the breakthrough I have been seeking. All the dangers I have escaped, the traps I have eluded and the foul draugr I have avoided have brought me at last to this. In my previous volume of notes and observations regarding Dimhollow Crypt's possible connections to the ancient vampire clans of Skyrim's history, I wrote of a great chamber, far larger than anything else I've yet seen here in the crypt. Alas, a few wandering draugr forced me to retreat to the earlier passages of the crypt, thus depriving me of an opportunity to study this huge cavern. Well, praise be to Stendarr, for as I write this, I have just spent nearly a full day exploring that very cavern. It was a risk that proved more than worth it, because what I found in that chamber nearly defies description. Central to this huge cavern is an island of stone in a subterranean lake. Upon this island is something I can only describe as an elaborate ceremonial construction surrounded by stone columns linked by arches. There is no mistaking the stark contrast in architecture here; no ancient Nords made this stonework. Here, too, were more of the gargoyle statues that I first glimpsed in earlier passageways. There is no draugr burial site in Skyrim that contains these statues, save Dimhollow Crypt. Indeed, I am now certain that the strange construct in this main chamber was built long after the crypt, and by wholly different masters. These must be the same builders who placed the gargoyles through the crypt, perhaps to frighten away the curious. All signs seem to indicate that the masons who crafted these strange arches were servants of some ancient master who favored necromancy or vampirism. The style and craftsmanship in the stonework are not only distinct in terms of design, seeming to speak of an entirely different culture than that of the old Nord peoples, but also in skill with which they were fashioned. The cutting and shaping of the stone, for example, suggests more sophisticated tools than the crypt's original architects would have possessed. Although I feel a sense of exhilaration that my theories have at last been confirmed beyond any shadow of a doubt, I am also disappointed at the lack of answers. How long ago were these new features added to the crypt? And by whom? And for what purpose? On one point, I have no doubts. I must return to the Hall of the Vigilant and share these findings with my brothers and sisters. When they see what I've discovered with their own eyes, they will no longer scoff at my theories or mock my endeavors. And when that is done, I will return to my work. For now, Dimhollow Crypt might be a mystery, but by Stendarr I will see that mystery solved.
translations.chinese:
[pagebreak]

幽空地穴的笔记 第三卷 阿达瓦尔德 著

[pagebreak]

多谢圣灵保佑！这就是我一直在找的重大突破。我所躲过的危险，绕开的陷阱，避开的肮脏尸鬼，终于让我走到了这一步。 上一卷中，我说幽空地穴可能与天际历史上的古老吸血鬼氏族存在联系，还提及了一座大厅，比我在地穴中看到的任何东西都要大得多。 哎，几个游荡的尸鬼逼得我退回到地穴前面的通道里去了，这样我就没机会研究这座巨大的墓穴了。 嗯，赞美斯丹达尔，当我写下这些的时候，我已经探索这座地穴足足快一天了。 事实证明，这次冒险是值得的，因为我在这大厅里发现的东西几乎无法用言语描述。 这座巨大地穴的中央是地下湖中的一座石头岛。这岛上的东西，我只能将其描述为一座精心设计的仪式用建筑，周遭是由拱门连接的石柱。 毫无疑问，此地的建筑与古诺德人的石雕形成了鲜明的对比，绝非出自诺德人之手。这里也有更多的石像鬼雕像，我之前也在通道里瞥见过。 除了幽空地穴，天际没有哪一处埋葬尸鬼的地方有这些雕像。 实际上，我现在肯定这主室里的奇怪建筑是墓穴修建后很久才由完全不同的主人所建造的。这些人肯定就是把石像鬼放置在墓穴里的建造者，也许是为了吓跑好奇的人。 所有迹象都表明，那些雕刻这些怪异拱门的石匠似乎侍奉某个喜欢死灵法术或者吸血鬼的古老主人。 石雕的风格和工艺不仅在设计上与众不同，似乎也来自与古诺德人完全不同的文化，这些差异也体现在了它们的制作工艺上。 例如，从石头的切割和形状来看，它所使用的工具比地下室最初的建造者们所使用的工具更加复杂。 尽管我为终于能确凿证明自己的理论而感到兴奋，但我也对答案的缺失而感到失望。这些新特征是多久以前加进地穴的呢？是谁加的？又是为了何种目的？ 但有一点，我毫不怀疑。我必须回警戒者大厅，与兄弟姐妹们分享这些发现。当他们亲眼见到我的发现时，他们就不会再嘲笑我的理论或者努力了。 这事办完之后，我就得回去工作了。就目前来看，幽空地穴可能还是一团谜，不过斯丹达尔在上，我会解开谜题的。
幽空地穴的笔记，第三卷

translations.english: When I brought Serana back home after freeing her from Dimhollow Crypt, her father, a powerful vampire lord, offered me the gift of his blood. I accepted the gift and joined his court.
translations.chinese: 当我把瑟拉娜从幽空地穴救出来带回家后，她那强大的吸血鬼领主父亲要把血作为礼物给我。我接受了这份礼物，并加入了他的宫廷。

translations.english: When I brought Serana back home after freeing her from Dimhollow Crypt, her father, a powerful vampire lord, offered me the gift of his blood. I refused the gift, and was banished. I returned to Isran and told him what happened.
translations.chinese: 当我把瑟拉娜从幽空地穴救出来带回家后，她那强大的吸血鬼领主父亲要把血作为礼物给我。我拒绝了这份礼物，随后被驱逐了。我回去找到了伊士冉，将具体情况告诉了他。

translations.english: While exploring Dimhollow Crypt, I freed a young woman from an ancient sarcophagus. She asked me to guide her home, to a castle off the northern coast of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 在探索幽空地穴时，我从一个古老石棺中救出了一个年轻女子。她让我带她回到位于天际北部海岸某座城堡的家里。

translations.english: When I brought Serana back home after freeing her from Dimhollow Crypt, her father, a powerful vampire lord, offered me the gift of his blood. I refused the gift, and was banished. Now I should return to Isran and tell him what happened.
translations.chinese: 当我把瑟拉娜从幽空地穴救出来带回家后，她那强大的吸血鬼领主父亲要把血作为礼物给我。我拒绝了这份礼物，随后被驱逐了。现在我必须回去找伊士冉，告知他具体情况。

translations.english: I learned that the mysterious woman I freed from Dimhollow Crypt is named Serana. Her father Harkon is a powerful vampire lord, and in gratitude for bringing his daughter home, he offered me the gift of his blood. Now I must choose whether to accept the gift.
translations.chinese: 我从幽空地穴解救出一个名叫瑟拉娜的神秘女子。她的父亲哈孔是个强大的吸血鬼领主，为了感谢我把他女儿带回家，他要把自己的血作为赠礼送给我。我现在必须选择是否接受这份礼物。

translations.english: When I brought Serana back home after freeing her from Dimhollow Crypt, her father, a powerful vampire lord, offered me the gift of his blood. I accepted the gift and joined his court.
translations.chinese: 当我把瑟拉娜从幽空地穴救出来带回家后，她那强大的吸血鬼领主父亲要把血作为礼物给我。我接受了这份礼物，并加入了他的宫廷。

translations.english: When I brought Serana back home after freeing her from Dimhollow Crypt, her father, a powerful vampire lord, offered me the gift of his blood. I refused the gift, and was banished. Now I must return to Vigilant Tolan and tell him what happened.
translations.chinese: 当我把瑟拉娜从幽空地穴救出来带回家后，她那强大的吸血鬼领主父亲要把血作为礼物给我。我拒绝了这份礼物，随后被驱逐了。现在我必须回去找警戒者托兰，告知他具体情况。

EDID: DLC1VQ03CarriageDriver
Translations:
- NPC_:FULL | EN: Thaer | ZH: 赛尔 | SID: 000D20

translations.english: Serana told me that her father was trying to gain power over the sun by fulfilling a prophecy found in the Elder Scrolls. We've set out to find a Moth Priest who can read Serana's Elder Scroll, and the trail has led us to Dragon Bridge.
translations.chinese: 瑟拉娜告诉我，她的父亲打算实现上古卷轴里的一个预言，从而获得控制太阳的力量。我们要找一个能读懂瑟拉娜上古卷轴的蛾祭司，线索把我们引到龙桥镇。

translations.english: I'm one step behind the Moth Priest. After leaving Dragon Bridge, I searched along the road for any sign of his passing. I found an overturned wagon and some dead Imperial guards and vampires. Was this the Moth Priest's wagon?
translations.chinese: 我比蛾祭司落后一步。离开龙桥，我沿路寻找他走过的痕迹。我发现一辆翻倒的马车和一些死去的吸血鬼和帝国卫兵。这是蛾祭司的马车么？

translations.english: I rescued the Moth Priest from his vampire captors and asked him to meet me at Fort Dawnguard. I must return to Isran and tell him of our success.
translations.chinese: 我从吸血鬼手中救出了蛾祭司，邀请他到黎明守卫堡垒见面。我必须回去找伊士冉，告诉他我们成功的消息。

translations.english: I'm one step behind the Moth Priest. After leaving Dragon Bridge, I searched along the road for any sign of his passing. I found an overturned wagon and some dead vampires and Imperial guards. Was this the Moth Priest's wagon?
translations.chinese: 我比蛾祭司落后一步。离开龙桥，我沿路寻找他走过的痕迹。我发现一辆翻倒的马车和一些死去的吸血鬼和帝国卫兵。这是蛾祭司的马车么？

translations.english: Harkon's vampire agents have captured the Moth Priest and taken him to a place called Forebears' Holdout. I must rescue him before the vampires can break his will.
translations.chinese: 哈孔的吸血鬼密使抓住了蛾祭司，把他带到了叫做“先祖据点”的地方。我必须在吸血鬼摧毁他的意志前将他救出来。

translations.english: With the Moth Priest safely back at Fort Dawnguard, he can now read Serana's Elder Scroll and learn more about the prophecy that Harkon is hoping to use to gain power over the sun.
translations.chinese: 蛾祭司安全抵达黎明守卫堡垒，他现在可以开始阅读瑟拉娜的上古卷轴了，这样才能了解更多关于哈孔希望用来凌驾太阳力量的预言。

translations.english: Harkon's agents have captured the Moth Priest! I have tracked them to Forebears' Holdout, but the vampires have enthralled the moth priest and I will have to confront him in order to break their hold.
translations.chinese: 哈孔的吸血鬼密使抓住了蛾祭司，把他带到了叫做“先祖据点”的地方。但吸血鬼已经将蛾祭司迷惑，我必须打败他才能打破他们的控制。

translations.english: Serana and I heard a rumor that a Moth Priest recently visited Solitude. He was thought to have stayed at the Winking Skeever.
translations.chinese: 我和瑟拉娜听说，最近有个蛾祭司去过独孤城。人们说他住在眨眼恶鼠旅店。

translations.english: When I returned to Fort Dawnguard, Isran told me that he needed to speak to me, and he asked me to follow him.
translations.chinese: 我回到了黎明守卫堡垒，伊士冉要和我谈谈，告诉我跟他走。

translations.english: With the Moth Priest safely back at Fort Dawnguard, he can now read Serana's Elder Scroll and learn more about the prophecy that Harkon is hoping to use to gain power over the sun.
translations.chinese: 蛾祭司安全抵达黎明守卫堡垒，他现在可以开始阅读瑟拉娜的上古卷轴了，这样才能了解更多关于哈孔希望用来凌驾太阳力量的预言。

translations.english: Serana told me that her father was trying to gain power over the sun by fulfilling a prophecy found in the Elder Scrolls. If we could read the prophecy, we might be able to stop him. Serana had one of the scrolls, but we'd need a Moth Priest in order to read it.
translations.chinese: 瑟拉娜告诉我，她的父亲打算实现上古卷轴里的一个预言，从而获得控制太阳的力量。如果我们能读到预言，也许就能阻止他了。瑟拉娜有那卷上古卷轴，但我们需要一个蛾祭司才能阅读。

translations.english: Serana told me that her father was trying to gain power over the sun by fulfilling a prophecy found in the Elder Scrolls. If we could read the prophecy, we might be able to stop him. Serana had one of the scrolls, but we'd need a Moth Priest in order to read it.
translations.chinese: 瑟拉娜告诉我，她的父亲打算实现上古卷轴里的一个预言，从而获得控制太阳的力量。如果我们能读到预言，也许就能阻止他了。瑟拉娜有那卷上古卷轴，但我们需要一个蛾祭司才能阅读。

translations.english: When I returned to Fort Dawnguard, I was surprised to learn that Serana had come to the base searching for me. She claimed to have something urgent she needed to tell me.
translations.chinese: 我回到了黎明守卫堡垒，惊讶地发现瑟拉娜已经在等我。她说有急事告诉我。

translations.english: Harkon's agents captured the Moth Priest and enthralled him, but I was able to break their hold on his mind.
translations.chinese: 哈孔的吸血鬼密使抓住了蛾祭司，并将他迷惑，我打破了他们对他的思想控制。

translations.english: Serana and I are one step behind the Moth Priest. We journeyed to Dragon Bridge and learned that he had passed through the town, heading south across the bridge.
translations.chinese: 我和瑟拉娜晚到一步。等到龙桥镇时，得知祭司已经穿过小镇向南往桥上去了。

translations.english: Serana told me that her father was trying to gain power over the sun by fulfilling a prophecy found in the Elder Scrolls. If we could read the prophecy, we might be able to stop him. Serana had one of the scrolls, but we'd need a Moth Priest in order to read it.
translations.chinese: 瑟拉娜告诉我，她的父亲打算实现上古卷轴里的一个预言，从而获得控制太阳的力量。如果我们能读到预言，也许就能阻止他了。瑟拉娜有那卷上古卷轴，但我们需要一个蛾祭司才能阅读。

translations.english: Serana told me that her father was trying to gain power over the sun by fulfilling a prophecy found in the Elder Scrolls. Only a Moth Priest can read an Elder Scroll, so we've set out to find one.
translations.chinese: 瑟拉娜告诉我，她的父亲打算实现上古卷轴里的一个预言，从而获得控制太阳的力量。如果我们能读到预言，也许就能阻止他了。瑟拉娜有那卷上古卷轴，但我们需要一个蛾祭司才能阅读，所以我们要去找一位过来。

translations.english: When I returned to Fort Dawnguard, I was surprised to learn that Serana had come to the base searching for me. She claimed to have something urgent she needed to tell me.
translations.chinese: 我回到了黎明守卫堡垒，惊讶地发现瑟拉娜已经在等我。她说有急事告诉我。

translations.english: Eager to unlock the secrets of an ancient prophecy thought to be hidden within Serana's Elder Scroll, Harkon has ordered his court to find a Moth Priest. I now have reason to suspect that there's a Moth Priest in Solitude.
translations.chinese: 为了解开瑟拉娜的上古卷轴中隐藏的古老预言之秘，哈孔命令他的宫廷寻找蛾祭司。我现在有理由怀疑独孤城有一位蛾祭司。

translations.english: Harkon's agents have captured the Moth Priest! I have tracked them to Forebears' Holdout, but the vampires have enthralled the Moth Priest and I will have to confront him in order to break their hold.
translations.chinese: 哈孔的吸血鬼密使抓住了蛾祭司，把他带到了叫做“先祖据点”的地方。但吸血鬼已经将蛾祭司迷惑，我必须打败他才能打破他们的控制。

translations.english: After the Moth Priest's reading, we have more questions than answers. The old priest saw a vision of a weapon called Auriel's Bow, but we need to find two more Elder Scrolls in order to unravel the rest of the prophecy.
translations.chinese: 蛾祭司阅读完毕后，我们的疑问多于答案。老祭司看到了一件叫做奥瑞艾尔之弓的武器，但我们还需要两卷上古卷轴才能解开剩下的预言。

translations.english: Speak to the innkeeper in Solitude
translations.chinese: 与独孤城的旅店老板交谈

translations.english: Ask people in Dragon Bridge if they saw the Moth Priest

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: DLC1VQ03Hunter
Translations:
- QUST:CNAM [9/20] | EN: Serana told me that her father was trying to gain power over the sun by fulfilling a prophecy found in the Elder Scrolls. We've set out to find a Moth Priest who can read Serana's Elder Scroll, and the trail has led us to Dragon Bridge. | ZH: 瑟拉娜告诉我，她的父亲打算实现上古卷轴里的一个预言，从而获得控制太阳的力量。我们要找一个能读懂瑟拉娜上古卷轴的蛾祭司，线索把我们引到龙桥镇。 | SID: 00025B
- QUST:CNAM [12/20] | EN: I'm one step behind the Moth Priest. After leaving Dragon Bridge, I searched along the road for any sign of his passing. I found an overturned wagon and some dead Imperial guards and vampires. Was this the Moth Priest's wagon? | ZH: 我比蛾祭司落后一步。离开龙桥，我沿路寻找他走过的痕迹。我发现一辆翻倒的马车和一些死去的吸血鬼和帝国卫兵。这是蛾祭司的马车么？ | SID: 0002D4
- QUST:CNAM [17/20] | EN: I rescued the Moth Priest from his vampire captors and asked him to meet me at Fort Dawnguard. I must return to Isran and tell him of our success. | ZH: 我从吸血鬼手中救出了蛾祭司，邀请他到黎明守卫堡垒见面。我必须回去找伊士冉，告诉他我们成功的消息。 | SID: 000344
- QUST:CNAM [11/20] | EN: I'm one step behind the Moth Priest. After leaving Dragon Bridge, I searched along the road for any sign of his passing. I found an overturned wagon and some dead vampires and Imperial guards. Was this the Moth Priest's wagon? | ZH: 我比蛾祭司落后一步。离开龙桥，我沿路寻找他走过的痕迹。我发现一辆翻倒的马车和一些死去的吸血鬼和帝国卫兵。这是蛾祭司的马车么？ | SID: 000433
- QUST:CNAM [13/20] | EN: Harkon's vampire agents have captured the Moth Priest and taken him to a place called Forebears' Holdout. I must rescue him before the vampires can break his will. | ZH: 哈孔的吸血鬼密使抓住了蛾祭司，把他带到了叫做“先祖据点”的地方。我必须在吸血鬼摧毁他的意志前将他救出来。 | SID: 000626
- QUST:CNAM [19/20] | EN: With the Moth Priest safely back at Fort Dawnguard, he can now read Serana's Elder Scroll and learn more about the prophecy that Harkon is hoping to use to gain power over the sun. | ZH: 蛾祭司安全抵达黎明守卫堡垒，他现在可以开始阅读瑟拉娜的上古卷轴了，这样才能了解更多关于哈孔希望用来凌驾太阳力量的预言。 | SID: 00070A
- QUST:CNAM [14/20] | EN: Harkon's agents have captured the Moth Priest! I have tracked them to Forebears' Holdout, but the vampires have enthralled the moth priest and I will have to confront him in order to break their hold. | ZH: 哈孔的吸血鬼密使抓住了蛾祭司，把他带到了叫做“先祖据点”的地方。但吸血鬼已经将蛾祭司迷惑，我必须打败他才能打破他们的控制。 | SID: 0007A3
- QUST:CNAM [8/20] | EN: Serana and I heard a rumor that a Moth Priest recently visited Solitude. He was thought to have stayed at the Winking Skeever. | ZH: 我和瑟拉娜听说，最近有个蛾祭司去过独孤城。人们说他住在眨眼恶鼠旅店。 | SID: 000921
- QUST:CNAM [0/20] | EN: When I returned to Fort Dawnguard, Isran told me that he needed to speak to me, and he asked me to follow him. | ZH: 我回到了黎明守卫堡垒，伊士冉要和我谈谈，告诉我跟他走。 | SID: 000929
- QUST:CNAM [18/20] | EN: With the Moth Priest safely back at Fort Dawnguard, he can now read Serana's Elder Scroll and learn more about the prophecy that Harkon is hoping to use to gain power over the sun. | ZH: 蛾祭司安全抵达黎明守卫堡垒，他现在可以开始阅读瑟拉娜的上古卷轴了，这样才能了解更多关于哈孔希望用来凌驾太阳力量的预言。 | SID: 0009E2
- QUST:CNAM [5/20] | EN: Serana told me that her father was trying to gain power over the sun by fulfilling a prophecy found in the Elder Scrolls. If we could read the prophecy, we might be able to stop him. Serana had one of the scrolls, but we'd need a Moth Priest in order to read it. | ZH: 瑟拉娜告诉我，她的父亲打算实现上古卷轴里的一个预言，从而获得控制太阳的力量。如果我们能读到预言，也许就能阻止他了。瑟拉娜有那卷上古卷轴，但我们需要一个蛾祭司才能阅读。 | SID: 000BF5
- QUST:CNAM [4/20] | EN: Serana told me that her father was trying to gain power over the sun by fulfilling a prophecy found in the Elder Scrolls. If we could read the prophecy, we might be able to stop him. Serana had one of the scrolls, but we'd need a Moth Priest in order to read it. | ZH: 瑟拉娜告诉我，她的父亲打算实现上古卷轴里的一个预言，从而获得控制太阳的力量。如果我们能读到预言，也许就能阻止他了。瑟拉娜有那卷上古卷轴，但我们需要一个蛾祭司才能阅读。 | SID: 000BFC
- QUST:CNAM [2/20] | EN: When I returned to Fort Dawnguard, I was surprised to learn that Serana had come to the base searching for me. She claimed to have something urgent she needed to tell me. | ZH: 我回到了黎明守卫堡垒，惊讶地发现瑟拉娜已经在等我。她说有急事告诉我。 | SID: 000C37
- QUST:CNAM [16/20] | EN: Harkon's agents captured the Moth Priest and enthralled him, but I was able to break their hold on his mind. | ZH: 哈孔的吸血鬼密使抓住了蛾祭司，并将他迷惑，我打破了他们对他的思想控制。 | SID: 000F8D
- QUST:CNAM [10/20] | EN: Serana and I are one step behind the Moth Priest. We journeyed to Dragon Bridge and learned that he had passed through the town, heading south across the bridge. | ZH: 我和瑟拉娜晚到一步。等到龙桥镇时，得知祭司已经穿过小镇向南往桥上去了。 | SID: 0011C9
- QUST:CNAM [3/20] | EN: Serana told me that her father was trying to gain power over the sun by fulfilling a prophecy found in the Elder Scrolls. If we could read the prophecy, we might be able to stop him. Serana had one of the scrolls, but we'd need a Moth Priest in order to read it. | ZH: 瑟拉娜告诉我，她的父亲打算实现上古卷轴里的一个预言，从而获得控制太阳的力量。如果我们能读到预言，也许就能阻止他了。瑟拉娜有那卷上古卷轴，但我们需要一个蛾祭司才能阅读。 | SID: 0012E0
- QUST:CNAM [6/20] | EN: Serana told me that her father was trying to gain power over the sun by fulfilling a prophecy found in the Elder Scrolls. Only a Moth Priest can read an Elder Scroll, so we've set out to find one. | ZH: 瑟拉娜告诉我，她的父亲打算实现上古卷轴里的一个预言，从而获得控制太阳的力量。如果我们能读到预言，也许就能阻止他了。瑟拉娜有那卷上古卷轴，但我们需要一个蛾祭司才能阅读，所以我们要去找一位过来。 | SID: 0012F1
- QUST:CNAM [1/20] | EN: When I returned to Fort Dawnguard, I was surprised to learn that Serana had come to the base searching for me. She claimed to have something urgent she needed to tell me. | ZH: 我回到了黎明守卫堡垒，惊讶地发现瑟拉娜已经在等我。她说有急事告诉我。 | SID: 0016EA
- QUST:CNAM [7/20] | EN: Eager to unlock the secrets of an ancient prophecy thought to be hidden within Serana's Elder Scroll, Harkon has ordered his court to find a Moth Priest. I now have reason to suspect that there's a Moth Priest in Solitude. | ZH: 为了解开瑟拉娜的上古卷轴中隐藏的古老预言之秘，哈孔命令他的宫廷寻找蛾祭司。我现在有理由怀疑独孤城有一位蛾祭司。 | SID: 0018C7
- QUST:CNAM [15/20] | EN: Harkon's agents have captured the Moth Priest! I have tracked them to Forebears' Holdout, but the vampires have enthralled the Moth Priest and I will have to confront him in order to break their hold. | ZH: 哈孔的吸血鬼密使抓住了蛾祭司，把他带到了叫做“先祖据点”的地方。但吸血鬼已经将蛾祭司迷惑，我必须打败他才能打破他们的控制。 | SID: 0022AD
- QUST:CNAM [20/20] | EN: After the Moth Priest's reading, we have more questions than answers. The old priest saw a vision of a weapon called Auriel's Bow, but we need to find two more Elder Scrolls in order to unravel the rest of the prophecy. | ZH: 蛾祭司阅读完毕后，我们的疑问多于答案。老祭司看到了一件叫做奥瑞艾尔之弓的武器，但我们还需要两卷上古卷轴才能解开剩下的预言。 | SID: 002656

- QUST:NNAM [12/17] | EN: Rescue the Moth Priest | ZH: 解救蛾祭司 | SID: 000533

- QUST:NNAM [17/17] | EN: Speak to the Moth Priest | ZH: 与蛾祭司交谈 | SID: 000B33

- QUST:NNAM [4/17] | EN: (Optional) Ask carriage drivers about the Moth Priest | ZH: （可选）向马车车夫询问蛾祭司的下落 | SID: 001565
- QUST:NNAM [0/17] | EN: Follow Isran | ZH: 跟随伊士冉 | SID: 001678
- QUST:NNAM [6/17] | EN: (Optional) Ask innkeepers in cities about the Moth Priest | ZH: （可选）向旅店老板询问蛾祭司的下落 | SID: 00189A

translations.english: Have you seen a Moth Priest?

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: DLC1VQ03HunterCarriageDriversTopic1
Translations:
- DIAL:FULL | EN: Have you seen a Moth Priest? | ZH: 你见过一位蛾祭司吗？ | SID: 001722

Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: DLC1VQ03HunterCarriageDriversTopic2
Translations:
- DIAL:FULL | EN: That's right. You've seen him? | ZH: 没错。你见过他吗？ | SID: 001932

translations.english: You want us to help you?

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: DLC1VQ03HunterChillOut
Translations:
- DIAL:FULL | EN: You want us to help you? | ZH: 你想让我们帮你？ | SID: 000F0B

translations.english: I know why they needed you, because we need you for the same purpose.
translations.chinese: 我知道他们为什么需要你，因为我们也同样有求于你。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: DLC1VQ03HunterDexionReply1
Translations:
- DIAL:FULL | EN: I know why they needed you, because we need you for the same purpose. | ZH: 我知道他们为什么需要你，因为我们也同样有求于你。 | SID: 00288D

translations.english: I'll explain later. Right now, we need your help and time is short.
translations.chinese: 之后会解释的。现在嘛，情况紧急，我需要你的帮助。

agentText:

translations.english: We're called the Dawnguard, and we need you to read an Elder Scroll.

translations.english: Know anything about a Moth Priest visiting Dragon Bridge?
translations.chinese: 你知道有个蛾祭司来龙桥吗？

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: DLC1VQ03HunterDragonBridgeClintonYesTopic1
Translations:
- DIAL:FULL | EN: Know anything about a Moth Priest visiting Dragon Bridge? | ZH: 你知道有个蛾祭司来龙桥吗？ | SID: 000E5B

translations.english: I don't know what a Moth Priest is, but I did see an old man in a robe not long ago. He was riding in a wagon with some Imperial guards.
translations.chinese: 我不知道什么蛾祭司，不过我前不久见过一个穿袍子的老人。他坐着一辆马车，车上有几个帝国卫兵。

translations.english: It was only just a little bit ago. I bet you can catch them if you hurry up.
translations.chinese: 就在一小会前。我觉得如果你赶紧去追的话，肯定能追上他们。

translations.english: They didn't stop to visit, though. They rode through town heading south, and went across the big bridge.
translations.chinese: 不过他们没停下来。他们坐车穿过镇子奔南，还跨过了大桥。

agentText:

- DIAL:FULL | EN: Know anything about a Moth Priest visiting Dragon Bridge? | ZH: 你知道有个蛾祭司来龙桥吗？ | SID: 000E5C

translations.english: He rode through town not long ago with an escort of soldiers. They didn't stop, just headed south across the Dragon Bridge.
translations.chinese: 他前不久才跟一队士兵驾车穿过镇子。他们没做停留，往南走一直跨过了龙桥。

translations.english: Ah, so that was a Moth Priest, then?
translations.chinese: 啊，所以那就是蛾祭司了吧？

A Moth Priest? I'm sorry, but I don't know anything about that.
translations.chinese: 蛾祭司？抱歉，我对此一无所知。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: That's all I can tell you. He asked me not to let anyone know where he was going. I suppose he didn't want the attention.

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont"> The prophesied time has come. I have reclaimed one my lost Elder Scrolls, and now I must have a Moth Priest to read it. For the one who brings me a Moth Priest, I promise a high place in my court and the gift of my potent blood. Go forth and find me a Moth Priest. This is my command. Lord Harkon </font>
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont"> 预言中的时刻即将来临。我已经找到了一卷丢失的上古卷轴，现在我必须得找到一名能够解读它的蛾祭司。带来蛾祭司的人，我将提拔其在我宫廷中的地位并且赐下我那强大血液的天赋。 听我号令，出动，给我把蛾祭司找来。 哈孔领主 </font>

agentText:

For the one who brings me a Moth Priest, I promise a high place in my court and the gift of my potent blood. Go forth and find me a Moth Priest. This is my command. Lord Harkon </font> | ZH: <font face="$HandwrittenFont"> 预言中的时刻即将来临。我已经找到了一卷丢失的上古卷轴，现在我必须得找到一名能够解读它的蛾祭司。带来蛾祭司的人，我将提拔其在我宫廷中的地位并且赐下我那强大血液的天赋。 听我号令，出动，给我把蛾祭司找来。 哈孔领主 </font> | SID: 002747

translations.english: Now a voice whispers, saying "Among the night's children, a dread lord will rise."
translations.chinese: 现在有一个声音低语：“黑夜之子中，将会有可怖的君主崛起。”

translations.english: I see a vision before me, an image of a great bow. I know this weapon! It is Auriel's Bow!
translations.chinese: 我眼前看到了预兆，一幅巨大弓箭的图像。我知道这个武器。这是奥瑞艾尔之弓！

translations.english: In an age of strife, when dragons return to the realm of men, darkness will mingle with light and the night and day will be as one.
translations.chinese: 纷乱之时，龙族重归尘世，光暗混同，昼夜归一。

translations.english: Now, if everyone will please be quiet, I must concentrate.
translations.chinese: 现在，大家请安静，我必须集中注意力。

translations.english: Yes, I see them now... One contains the ancient secrets of the dragons, and the other speaks of the potency of ancient blood.
translations.chinese: 没错，我现在看见了……一份写着巨龙古老的秘密，另一份诉说着古老血脉的预言。

translations.english: The voice fades and the words begin to shimmer and distort. But wait, there is more here.
translations.chinese: 声音消失了，文字开始闪烁扭曲。等等，还有别的。

translations.english: The secret of the bow's power is written elsewhere. I think there is more to the prophecy, recorded in other scrolls.
translations.chinese: 弓之力量的秘密写在别处。看来还有记载在别的卷轴上的预言。

translations.chinese: 视野变黑了，什么都看不见了。

translations.english: To know the complete prophecy, we must have the other two scrolls.
translations.chinese: 要知道完整的预言，必须找到另外两个卷轴。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: DLC1VQ03ScrollReading3
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: My vision darkens, and I see no more. | ZH: 视野变黑了，什么都看不见了。 | SID: 000964
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: To know the complete prophecy, we must have the other two scrolls. | ZH: 要知道完整的预言，必须找到另外两个卷轴。 | SID: 0020A3

translations.english: I'd... well, I'd come with you, but I don't know if I can trust your friend.
translations.chinese: 我会……好吧，我会跟你一起去，不过我不知道能不能相信你的朋友。

translations.english: Let me know if you want me along.
translations.chinese: 如果你想让我一起去，请跟我说。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: DLC1VQ03SeranaFollowerSegue
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I'd... well, I'd come with you, but I don't know if I can trust your friend. | ZH: 我会……好吧，我会跟你一起去，不过我不知道能不能相信你的朋友。 | SID: 0025DA
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Let me know if you want me along. | ZH: 如果你想让我一起去，请跟我说。 | SID: 002725

Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: DLC1VQ03SeranaRejoinNM
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Suit yourself. | ZH: 随你便。 | SID: 002717

Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: DLC1VQ03SeranaRejoinOpening
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Were you looking for me? | ZH: 你是在找我吗？ | SID: 00271B

translations.english: If you want me to come along, it has to just be me and you.
translations.chinese: 如果你想让我一起去，就必须只有你我俩人。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: DLC1VQ03SeranaRejoinRebuff
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If you want me to come along, it has to just be me and you. | ZH: 如果你想让我一起去，就必须只有你我俩人。 | SID: 002768

Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: DLC1VQ03SeranaRejoinYes
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Of course! Let's go. | ZH: 当然啦！我们走。 | SID: 002757

translations.english: A Moth Priest? What in Oblivion do you need a Moth Priest for?
translations.chinese: 蛾祭司？你找蛾祭司做什么？

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: DLC1VQ03Urag1
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: A Moth Priest? What in Oblivion do you need a Moth Priest for? | ZH: 蛾祭司？你找蛾祭司做什么？ | SID: 000D30

translations.english: Sometimes they go out looking for Elder Scrolls. Lucky for you, there's a Moth Priest in Skyrim right now, doing just that.
translations.chinese: 有时候他们会到外面走走寻找上古卷轴。算你走运，天际现在就正好有一个在找卷轴的蛾祭司。

translations.english: The obvious answer is to go to the Imperial City. The Moth Priests make their home in the White Gold Tower.
translations.chinese: 当然是去帝都了。蛾祭司们就住在白金塔里。

translations.english: He stopped in to do some research in the library, then left for Dragon Bridge. If you hurry, you might catch him there.
translations.chinese: 他停下来在图书馆里做了些调查，然后奔龙桥去了。如果你动作快点的话，没准能在那里追上他。

translations.english: Fine, fine. No need to get your breeches in a twist.
translations.chinese: 好吧好吧。没必要和你拧着干。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: DLC1VQ03Urag2
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Sometimes they go out looking for Elder Scrolls. Lucky for you, there's a Moth Priest in Skyrim right now, doing just that. | ZH: 有时候他们会到外面走走寻找上古卷轴。算你走运，天际现在就正好有一个在找卷轴的蛾祭司。 | SID: 0006AC
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: The obvious answer is to go to the Imperial City. The Moth Priests make their home in the White Gold Tower. | ZH: 当然是去帝都了。蛾祭司们就住在白金塔里。 | SID: 000E89
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: He stopped in to do some research in the library, then left for Dragon Bridge. If you hurry, you might catch him there. | ZH: 他停下来在图书馆里做了些调查，然后奔龙桥去了。如果你动作快点的话，没准能在那里追上他。 | SID: 000EA7
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Fine, fine. No need to get your breeches in a twist. | ZH: 好吧好吧。没必要和你拧着干。 | SID: 001061

translations.english: I'm one step behind the Moth Priest. After leaving Dragon Bridge, I searched along the road for any sign of his passing. I found an overturned wagon and some dead vampires and Imperial guards. Was this the Moth Priest's wagon?
translations.chinese: 我比蛾祭司落后一步。离开龙桥，我沿路寻找他走过的痕迹。我发现一辆翻倒的马车和一些死去的吸血鬼和帝国卫兵。这是蛾祭司的马车么？

translations.english: When I returned to Castle Volkihar, I was informed that Lord Harkon was waiting to speak to me.
translations.chinese: 我回到了沃基哈尔城堡，得知哈孔大人正在等我。

translations.english: After the Moth Priest's reading, we have more questions than answers. The old priest saw a vision of a weapon called Auriel's Bow, but we need to read two more Elder Scrolls in order to unravel the rest of the prophecy.
translations.chinese: 蛾祭司阅读完毕后，我们的疑问多于答案。老祭司看到了一件叫做奥瑞艾尔之弓的武器，但我们还需要两卷上古卷轴才能解开剩下的预言。

translations.english: Harkon has ordered his court to find a Moth Priest who can read Serana's Elder Scroll. I followed the trail to Dragon Bridge and learned that a Moth Priest had just passed through town. He was last seen heading south along the road.
translations.chinese: 哈孔命令宫廷去找一个能读懂瑟拉娜的上古卷轴的蛾祭司。我沿路走到龙桥镇。得知有个蛾祭司刚刚经过镇上。最后一次是被看到沿着大路向南去了。

translations.english: Following Harkon's command to locate a Moth Priest, I followed the trail to Dragon Bridge. There, I learned that a rival band of vampires abducted the Moth Priest I've been tracking and took him to a place called Forebears' Holdout.
translations.chinese: 遵照哈孔的命令，我找到了一个蛾祭司的下落，循线索来到龙桥。然后得知一群敌对的吸血鬼绑架了我一直追踪的蛾祭司，把他带到了叫做“先祖据点”的地方。

translations.english: Eager to unlock the secrets of an ancient prophecy thought to be hidden within Serana's Elder Scroll, Harkon has ordered his court to find a Moth Priest.
translations.chinese: 为了解开瑟拉娜手中上古卷轴里隐藏的古老预言，哈孔命令他的宫廷去找蛾祭司。

translations.english: With the Moth Priest safely back at Castle Volkihar, the time has come to hear the prophecies contained within the Elder Scroll.
translations.chinese: 蛾祭司已经安全抵达沃基哈尔城堡，是时候听取上古卷轴的预言了。

translations.english: When I returned to Castle Volkihar, Lord Harkon told me of a prophecy hidden in the Elder Scrolls that, if fulfilled, would end the tyranny of the sun over vampires. Now he has asked me to join him as he makes a proclamation to the court.
translations.chinese: 我回到了沃基哈尔城堡，哈孔大人告诉我，上古卷轴中藏着一个预言，如果实现，将终结太阳对吸血鬼的暴政。现在他要我和他一起去向宫廷宣布一项声明。

translations.english: Eager to unlock the secrets of an ancient prophecy thought to be hidden within Serana's Elder Scroll, Harkon has ordered his court to find a Moth Priest. I now have reason to suspect that there's a Moth Priest in Solitude.
translations.chinese: 为了解开瑟拉娜的上古卷轴中隐藏的古老预言之秘，哈孔命令他的宫廷寻找蛾祭司。我现在有理由怀疑独孤城有一位蛾祭司。

translations.english: Eager to unlock the secrets of an ancient prophecy thought to be hidden within Serana's Elder Scroll, Harkon has ordered his court to find a Moth Priest.
translations.chinese: 为了解开瑟拉娜手中上古卷轴里隐藏的古老预言，哈孔命令他的宫廷去找蛾祭司。

translations.english: After the Moth Priest's reading, we have more questions than answers. The old priest saw a vision of a weapon called Auriel's Bow, but we need to find two more Elder Scrolls in order to unravel the rest of the prophecy.
translations.chinese: 蛾祭司阅读完毕后，我们的疑问多于答案。老祭司看到了一件叫做奥瑞艾尔之弓的武器，但我们还需要两卷上古卷轴才能解开剩下的预言。

translations.english: Eager to hear the contents of Serana's Elder Scroll, Harkon commanded the court to find a Moth Priest. I have now captured one and made him my thrall, commanding him to return to Castle Volkihar. I must report this success to Harkon.
translations.chinese: 哈孔渴望听到瑟拉娜的上古卷轴中的内容，命宫廷去找蛾祭司。我抓获了一名，并将其成为我的奴隶，命令他回到沃基哈尔城堡。我得向哈孔报告此次成功。

translations.english: Harkon has ordered his court to find a Moth Priest who can read Serana's Elder Scroll. I now have reason to believe that a Moth Priest has recently visited Dragon Bridge.
translations.chinese: 哈孔命令宫廷去找一个能读懂瑟拉娜的上古卷轴的蛾祭司。我现在有理由相信有个蛾祭司最近去过龙桥镇。

translations.english: I learned that a Moth Priest recently visited Solitude. He was thought to have stayed at the Winking Skeever.
translations.chinese: 我听说最近有个蛾祭司造访了独孤城。人们说他住在眨眼恶鼠旅店。

translations.english: After a rival vampire faction captured the Moth Priest, I tracked them to Forebears' Holdout. Their leader has enthralled the priest and I will have to confront him in order to assert my own hold over him.
translations.chinese: 一群敌对的吸血鬼抢夺了蛾祭司，我追踪他们来到先祖据点。他们的首领迷惑了祭司，我必须先击败他才能重新取回控制权。

translations.english: After a rival vampire faction captured and enthralled the Moth Priest, I fought him and forced him to submit. Now it is my turn to enthrall the Moth Priest by using my newfound powers.
translations.chinese: 一群敌对的吸血鬼抢夺并迷惑了蛾祭司，我与之战斗将其击败。现在轮到我用新获得的力量来控制他了。

translations.english: After a rival vampire faction captured the Moth Priest, I tracked them to Forebears' Holdout. Their leader has enthralled the priest and I will have to confront him in order to assert my own hold over him.
translations.chinese: 一群敌对的吸血鬼抢夺了蛾祭司，我追踪他们来到先祖据点。他们的首领迷惑了祭司，我必须先击败他才能重新取回控制权。

translations.english: I'm one step behind the Moth Priest. After leaving Dragon Bridge, I searched along the road for any sign of his passing. I found an overturned wagon and some dead Imperial guards and vampires. Was this the Moth Priest's wagon?
translations.chinese: 我比蛾祭司落后一步。离开龙桥，我沿路寻找他走过的痕迹。我发现一辆翻倒的马车和一些死去的吸血鬼和帝国卫兵。这是蛾祭司的马车么？

translations.english: Investigate the scene of the attack
(Optional) Visit the College of Winterhold to ask about the Moth Priest
translations.chinese: （可选）造访冬堡学院，询问蛾祭司的情况

translations.english: Search along the road that leads south from Dragon Bridge
translations.chinese: 沿着龙桥以南的道路搜索

translations.english: Use your Vampire's Seduction power on the Moth Priest
translations.chinese: 对蛾祭司使用你的吸血鬼诱惑能力

translations.english: Command the Moth Priest to read the Elder Scroll
translations.chinese: 命令蛾祭司阅读上古卷轴

translations.english: Command the Moth Priest to read the scroll
translations.chinese: 命令蛾祭司阅读上古卷轴
向哈孔报告成功的消息

translations.english: Ask people in Dragon Bridge if they saw the Moth Priest
translations.chinese: 向龙桥镇的人询问蛾祭司的下落

translations.english: Speak to the innkeeper in Solitude
translations.chinese: 与独孤城的旅店老板交谈

translations.english: (Optional) Ask carriage drivers about the Moth Priest
translations.chinese: （可选）向马车车夫询问蛾祭司的下落

translations.english: (Optional) Ask innkeepers in cities about the Moth Priest
translations.chinese: （可选）向旅店老板询问蛾祭司的下落

translations.english: Feed on the Moth Priest to make him your thrall
translations.chinese: 啃食蛾祭司，使之成为你的奴隶

translations.english: Command the Moth Priest to go to Volkihar Castle
translations.chinese: 命令蛾祭司前往沃基哈尔城堡

translations.english: When attempting to step through the portal to the Soul Cairn, a hidden force that seems to be draining my life energy is preventing me from entering. I have two choices if I wish to enter the Soul Cairn. I can allow Serana to change me into a vampire, thereby "killing" me in effect. Alternatively, I can allow her to partially soul trap me which could potentially weaken me while I roam the Soul Cairn.
translations.chinese: 当我试图穿过通往灵魂石冢的入口时，一股隐藏的力量似乎在消耗我的生命能量，阻止我前进。如果想进灵魂石冢，我有两个选择。一是让瑟拉娜把我转化成吸血鬼，从而“杀死”我。二是让她在我漫游灵魂石冢的时候把我的部分灵魂困住，但这可能削弱我的力量。

translations.english: Serana and I have stepped from Valerica's laboratory on Tamriel to a plane of Oblivion known as the "Soul Cairn" in order to find her mother Valerica. Serana strongly believes if we can find her, she will be able to tell us the location of one of the Elder Scrolls we need to decipher the Tyranny of the Sun prophecy.
translations.chinese: 我和瑟拉娜从瓦蕾莉卡的实验室，由泰姆瑞尔来到了湮灭位面灵魂石冢，寻找她母亲。瑟拉娜坚信只要找到她，就能得知破译太阳暴政预言所需的上古卷轴的位置。

translations.english: Serana and I are trying to locate her mother, Valerica who may have one of the Elder Scrolls. In Valercia's laboratory, we've recreated an experiment she performed and opened a portal to the Soul Cairn, a plane of Oblivion. Serana believes strongly that her mother is inside this strange place and has indicated we should step through.
translations.chinese: 瑟拉娜想找到她疏远已久的母亲瓦蕾莉卡，她可能携带了一卷上古卷轴。我们重现了她的实验，打开了前往湮灭位面灵魂石冢的入口。瑟拉娜相信她母亲就在这诡异之地，暗示我们应该进去。

translations.english: Serana and I are trying to locate her mother, Valerica, who may have one of the Elder Scrolls. Our search has taken us to Valerica's laboratory hidden within the ruined tower at Castle Volkihar. According to Valerica's notes found there, she has likely fled Tamriel and entered the Soul Cairn, a dimensional plane of Oblivion. In order to pursue her into the Soul Cairn, Serana and I need to recreate the experiment that opens the portal to this strange place.
translations.chinese: 瑟拉娜想找到她疏远已久的母亲瓦蕾莉卡，她可能携带了一卷上古卷轴。我们找到了瓦蕾莉卡隐藏在沃基哈尔废墟塔楼里的实验室。根据在那里发现的笔记，她可能逃离了泰姆瑞尔，进入了湮灭位面灵魂石冢。为了追她进入灵魂石冢，瑟拉娜和我需要重现那个打开通往未知之地大门的实验。

translations.english: Serana and I are trying to locate her mother, Valerica, who may have one of the Elder Scrolls. Our journey has taken us beyond the courtyard of Castle Volkihar where we've discovered a hidden entrance underneath Valerica's old moondial. After exploring the ruined tower beyond, we've stumbled across an old alchemy laboratory. Serana is convinced her mother has hidden some notes that may yield a clue as to her whereabouts.
translations.chinese: 瑟拉娜想找到她疏远已久的母亲瓦蕾莉卡，她可能携带了一卷上古卷轴。我们来到沃基哈尔城堡的庭院，在瓦蕾莉卡的古老月晷下发现了一个隐藏入口。在探索了遗迹塔楼之后，我们偶然发现了一个古老的炼金实验室。瑟拉娜确信她母亲藏了一些能够提供下落线索的纸条。

translations.english: Serana has indicated her desire to locate her estranged mother, Valerica, who had fled Castle Volkihar with one of the Elder Scrolls. She believes that Valerica may have left a clue to her whereabouts somewhere in the courtyard of the castle. In order to avoid detection by the castle's vampires, we've decided to utilize a hidden entrance on the back side of the island.
translations.chinese: 瑟拉娜想找到她疏远已久的母亲瓦蕾莉卡，当年她带着一卷上古卷轴逃离了沃基哈尔城堡。她相信瓦蕾莉卡可能在城堡庭院的某处留下了关于行踪的线索。为了避免被城堡里的吸血鬼发现，我们决定使用在岛后面的隐藏入口。

translations.english: Serana has indicated her desire to locate her estranged mother, Valerica, who had fled Castle Volkihar with one of the Elder Scrolls. She believes that Valerica may have left a clue to her whereabouts somewhere in the courtyard of the castle. In order to avoid detection by Harkon, we've decided to utilize a hidden entrance on the back side of the island.
translations.chinese: 瑟拉娜想找到她疏远已久的母亲瓦蕾莉卡，当年她带着一卷上古卷轴逃离了沃基哈尔城堡。她相信瓦蕾莉卡可能在城堡庭院的某处留下了关于行踪的线索。为了避免被哈孔发现，我们决定使用在岛后面的隐藏入口。

translations.english: Serana and I are trying to locate her mother, Valerica, who may have one of the Elder Scrolls. Our journey has taken us to the courtyard of Castle Volkihar where we've discovered a hidden entrance underneath Valerica's old moondial.
translations.chinese: 瑟拉娜想找到她疏远已久的母亲瓦蕾莉卡，她可能携带了一卷上古卷轴。我们来到沃基哈尔城堡的庭院，在瓦蕾莉卡的古老月晷下发现了一个隐藏入口。

translations.english: Dexion's reading of the Elder Scroll has given rise to more questions than answers. The Moth Priest saw a vision of a weapon called Auriel's Bow, but Serana and I need to locate two more Elder Scrolls in order to unravel the rest of the prophecy.
translations.chinese: 戴希翁对上古卷轴的阅读带来的问题多于答案。蛾祭司看到了一种叫做“奥瑞艾尔之弓”的武器，但我和瑟拉娜需要找到另外两卷上古卷轴才能解开剩下的预言。

translations.english: Place the ingredients in the vessel

translations.chinese: 探索沃基哈尔城堡的废弃塔楼

I have two choices if I wish to enter the Soul Cairn. I can allow Serana to change me into a vampire, thereby "killing" me in effect. Alternatively, I can allow her to partially soul trap me which could potentially weaken me while I roam the Soul Cairn. | ZH: 当我试图穿过通往灵魂石冢的入口时，一股隐藏的力量似乎在消耗我的生命能量，阻止我前进。如果想进灵魂石冢，我有两个选择。一是让瑟拉娜把我转化成吸血鬼，从而“杀死”我。二是让她在我漫游灵魂石冢的时候把我的部分灵魂困住，但这可能削弱我的力量。 | SID: 000965
- QUST:CNAM [8/8] | EN: Serana and I have stepped from Valerica's laboratory on Tamriel to a plane of Oblivion known as the "Soul Cairn" in order to find her mother Valerica. Serana strongly believes if we can find her, she will be able to tell us the location of one of the Elder Scrolls we need to decipher the Tyranny of the Sun prophecy. | ZH: 我和瑟拉娜从瓦蕾莉卡的实验室，由泰姆瑞尔来到了湮灭位面灵魂石冢，寻找她母亲。瑟拉娜坚信只要找到她，就能得知破译太阳暴政预言所需的上古卷轴的位置。 | SID: 000D2D
- QUST:CNAM [6/8] | EN: Serana and I are trying to locate her mother, Valerica who may have one of the Elder Scrolls. In Valercia's laboratory, we've recreated an experiment she performed and opened a portal to the Soul Cairn, a plane of Oblivion. Serana believes strongly that her mother is inside this strange place and has indicated we should step through. | ZH: 瑟拉娜想找到她疏远已久的母亲瓦蕾莉卡，她可能携带了一卷上古卷轴。我们重现了她的实验，打开了前往湮灭位面灵魂石冢的入口。瑟拉娜相信她母亲就在这诡异之地，暗示我们应该进去。 | SID: 000D2F
- QUST:CNAM [5/8] | EN: Serana and I are trying to locate her mother, Valerica, who may have one of the Elder Scrolls. Our search has taken us to Valerica's laboratory hidden within the ruined tower at Castle Volkihar. According to Valerica's notes found there, she has likely fled Tamriel and entered the Soul Cairn, a dimensional plane of Oblivion. In order to pursue her into the Soul Cairn, Serana and I need to recreate the experiment that opens the portal to this strange place. | ZH: 瑟拉娜想找到她疏远已久的母亲瓦蕾莉卡，她可能携带了一卷上古卷轴。我们找到了瓦蕾莉卡隐藏在沃基哈尔废墟塔楼里的实验室。根据在那里发现的笔记，她可能逃离了泰姆瑞尔，进入了湮灭位面灵魂石冢。为了追她进入灵魂石冢，瑟拉娜和我需要重现那个打开通往未知之地大门的实验。 | SID: 000D32
- QUST:CNAM [4/8] | EN: Serana and I are trying to locate her mother, Valerica, who may have one of the Elder Scrolls. Our journey has taken us beyond the courtyard of Castle Volkihar where we've discovered a hidden entrance underneath Valerica's old moondial. After exploring the ruined tower beyond, we've stumbled across an old alchemy laboratory. Serana is convinced her mother has hidden some notes that may yield a clue as to her whereabouts. | ZH: 瑟拉娜想找到她疏远已久的母亲瓦蕾莉卡，她可能携带了一卷上古卷轴。我们来到沃基哈尔城堡的庭院，在瓦蕾莉卡的古老月晷下发现了一个隐藏入口。在探索了遗迹塔楼之后，我们偶然发现了一个古老的炼金实验室。瑟拉娜确信她母亲藏了一些能够提供下落线索的纸条。 | SID: 000D33
- QUST:CNAM [2/8] | EN: Serana has indicated her desire to locate her estranged mother, Valerica, who had fled Castle Volkihar with one of the Elder Scrolls. She believes that Valerica may have left a clue to her whereabouts somewhere in the courtyard of the castle. In order to avoid detection by the castle's vampires, we've decided to utilize a hidden entrance on the back side of the island. | ZH: 瑟拉娜想找到她疏远已久的母亲瓦蕾莉卡，当年她带着一卷上古卷轴逃离了沃基哈尔城堡。她相信瓦蕾莉卡可能在城堡庭院的某处留下了关于行踪的线索。为了避免被城堡里的吸血鬼发现，我们决定使用在岛后面的隐藏入口。 | SID: 000D38

translations.english: 27th Last Seed Harkon's shortsightedness is becoming a serious problem. I've warned him time and time again that his foolish prophecy would cast far too much light on our people and yet he refuses to so much as listen to a word I say. I've become less a wife and more of an annoyance in his eyes. Devoting attention to my work is the only solace I can find while enduring his ridiculous crusade. 28th Last Seed I've had a breakthrough today. I was able to attune the portal vessel to the Soul Cairn properly by using a small sample of ingredients. Although the portal opened only for a few seconds, I'm confident that with the proper formula, it can be sustained indefinitely. I feel like I'm missing a key ingredient, something of sufficient potency that can resist the forces trying to prevent my intrusion. Communing with the Ideal Masters has proved worthless. They speak in riddles and offer no assistance whether I ensure them a steady supply of souls or not. If I'm to escape Harkon's clutches, I need to keep the portal open long enough to carry me away from here... forever if need be. 3rd Hearthfire I've done it! After wasting thousands of gold coins on components, I've discovered how to sustain the portal. I'm listing the components below without the proper amounts for my own protection. As a secondary precaution, I am combining my own blood into the formula which should prevent anyone from being able to duplicate it and following me into the Soul Cairn. The formula consists of: Finely ground bone meal Purified void salt Soul gem shards Using the proper measurements, place the above in the silver-lined portal vessel and add blood as a reactive agent. I will make my way into the Soul Cairn tomorrow after I gather my things and prepare for a potentially lengthy exile. More importantly, I must enact my plans with Serana, and get her to Dimhollow Crypt as soon as possible.
translations.chinese: 末种月27日 哈孔的短视正在变成一个严重的问题。我一次又一次警告他，他那愚蠢的预言会给我们的族人引起太多注意，但我说的话他一句都不听。在他眼里，我不再是妻子，而是一个麻烦鬼。埋头于工作是我在忍受他那愚蠢的行动时唯一的慰藉了。 末种月28日 我今天有了个突破。我能使用少量材料，把传送通道正确地与灵魂石冢相协调。尽管传送门只打开了几秒钟，但我相信只要配方正确，它就可以无限期维持下去。我想我少了一种关键成分，一种有足够效力的物质来抵制那股试图阻止我侵入的力量。事实证明，与理想之主交流毫无价值。无论是否保证供应充足的灵魂，他们都在当谜语人，也不提供帮助。如果我想逃离哈孔的魔掌，我得让传送门开得足够久，好带我离开这里... ...如果有必要的话，是永远离开这里。 炉火月3日 成功了！在浪费成千上万金币买的原料后，我找到了维持传送门的方法。为了自保，以下列出的成分没有标明正确的数量。作为第二道保险，我要把自己的血液加入配方，这样就没有人能复制它，跟着我进灵魂石冢了。 配方包括： 精研骨粉 纯净虚无盐 灵魂石碎片 称取适量，将上述物质置于镶银边的传送门管道，加入血液作为活性剂。 明天我就准备，收拾出漫长流放之旅所需的东西后，进入灵魂石冢。更重要的是，我必须执行我跟瑟拉娜的计划，尽快带她去幽空地穴。

translations.english: As Valerica was leading us to the Elder Scroll, an ancient dragon named Durnehviir swooped into the ruins and attacked. It proved to be a challenging battle, but we've emerged unscathed.
translations.chinese: 就在瓦蕾莉卡带我们去找上古卷轴的时候，一头名为杜耐维尔的古代巨龙冲入遗迹并发动攻击。虽然这场战斗充满挑战，但也有惊无险。

translations.english: We've exited the Soul Cairn with the Elder Scroll in hand. Serana's mother, Valerica, is unwilling to return with us to Tamriel until we've dealt with her husband and completed the Tyranny of the Sun using our own methods.
translations.chinese: 我们带着上古卷轴离开了灵魂石冢。瑟拉娜的母亲瓦蕾莉卡不愿和我们一起返回泰姆瑞尔，除非我们解决了她的丈夫并用我们自己的方法完成太阳暴政。

translations.english: We've exited the Soul Cairn with the Elder Scroll in hand. Serana's mother, Valerica, is unwilling to return with us to Tamriel until we've dealt with her husband and thwarted the Tyranny of the Sun.
translations.chinese: 我们带着上古卷轴离开了灵魂石冢。瑟拉娜的母亲瓦蕾莉卡不愿和我们一起返回泰姆瑞尔，除非我们解决了她的丈夫并挫败太阳的暴政。

translations.english: Serana and I have entered the Soul Cairn in pursuit of her estranged mother, Valerica, and the Elder Scroll she took when she fled Castle Volkihar.
translations.chinese: 我和瑟拉娜进入了灵魂石冢寻找她久未谋面的母亲瓦蕾莉卡，还有她逃离沃基哈尔城堡时带走的上古卷轴。

translations.english: Serana and I have located Valerica imprisoned within a massive ruin. When confronted by us, Valerica revealed that Serana's blood is an integral part of the Tyranny of the Sun. After the reconciliation between the two of them, Valerica confessed to having the Elder Scroll hidden in her ramshackle living space. In order to free her from the prison, Serana and I will have to locate and slay the Keepers who maintain the barrier around the ruins.
translations.chinese: 我和瑟拉娜发现瓦蕾莉卡被囚禁在一个巨大的遗迹里。与我们见面后，瓦蕾莉卡透露瑟拉娜的血是太阳暴政不可分割的一部分。在两人和解后，瓦蕾莉卡承认在她那摇摇欲坠的住所中确实有一卷上古卷轴。为了解救她，我和瑟拉娜必须找到并杀死遗迹周围维持屏障的看守者。

translations.english: Serana and I have slain all three of the Keepers and the barrier around Valerica's prison has faded. We rejoined Valerica, who has agreed to take us to the location where the Elder Scroll is hidden.
translations.chinese: 我和瑟拉娜杀死了三个看守者，瓦蕾莉卡的监狱周围屏障也消失了。我们和瓦蕾莉卡会合，她同意带我们去藏上古卷轴的地方。

translations.english: After discovering that Dexion has become blind, I've had to secure alternate means to decipher the Elder Scrolls and locate Auriel's Bow. It's been suggested that I might be able to read the Elder Scrolls myself if I use an ancient technique performed by the original Moth Priests. I'm now on my way to a place known as the Ancestor Glade to discover the origin of the mysterious ritual.
translations.chinese: 在发现戴希翁失明后，我不得不找其他办法来破解上古卷轴并找到奥瑞艾尔之弓。如果我能使用最初的蛾祭司们所使用的古老技术，也许就能自行阅读上古卷轴了。现在我要去一个叫先祖林地的地方寻找这个神秘仪式的起源。

translations.english: After entering the column of light in the Ancestor Glade, I was able to read the Elder Scrolls. I had an incredible vision that pinpointed a cave entrance far away on the western edge of Skyrim. This appears to be the location of Auriel's Bow. If I'm to complete the Tyranny of the Sun before Harkon, I should hasten there immediately.
translations.chinese: 进入先祖林地的光柱后，我能够阅读上古卷轴了。我看到了一个难以置信的景象，在遥远的天际西陲有一个洞穴入口，似乎就是奥瑞艾尔之弓的所在。如果我想要赶在哈孔之前完成太阳暴政预言，就得立刻动身。

translations.english: After entering the column of light in the Ancestor Glade, I was able to read the Elder Scrolls. I had an incredible vision that pinpointed a cave entrance far away on the western edge of Skyrim. This appears to be the location of Auriel's Bow. If I'm to stop Harkon from completing the Tyranny of the Sun, I should hasten there immediately.
translations.chinese: 进入先祖林地的光柱后，我能够阅读上古卷轴了。我看到了一个难以置信的景象，在遥远的天际西陲有一个洞穴入口，似乎就是奥瑞艾尔之弓的所在。如果我想要阻止哈孔完成太阳暴政预言，就得立刻动身。

translations.english: I've used the unusual knife to collect the bark from the Canticle Trees dotting the Ancestor Glade, which has in turn drawn Ancestor Moths to me. I've felt a surge of energy run through my body and I feel drawn towards the large column of light in the center of the Glade.
translations.chinese: 我用一把特殊的刀从点缀在先祖林地的颂歌之树上收集树皮，吸引来了先祖蛾。我感受到一股能量涌入体内，我觉得自己被林地中心的巨大光柱所吸引了。

translations.english: I'm now standing in a column of light which appears to stretch into the sky at the center of the Ancestor Glade. According to Dexion, I've completed the Ritual of the Ancestor Moth and can now read the Elder Scrolls. I'll need to begin with the Elder Scroll I obtained from the Soul Cairn in order to decipher the location of Auriel's Bow.
translations.chinese: 我现在站在先祖林地中心一道直冲云霄的光柱中。根据戴希翁的说法，我已经完成了先祖蛾的仪式，现在可以阅读上古卷轴了。我需要从阅读我从灵魂石冢获得的上古卷轴开始，破解奥瑞艾尔之弓的位置。

translations.english: Enter the column of light and read the Elder Scroll (Blood)
translations.chinese: 进入光柱阅读上古卷轴（血）

translations.english: Gather bark from a Canticle Tree
translations.chinese: 从颂歌之树上收集树皮

translations.english: It's been revealed to me that the Tyranny of the Sun was created by Arch-Curate Vyrthur as his revenge upon Auriel for rebuking him when he was turned into a vampire. He possessed Auriel's Bow, but still needed the blood of a pure vampire to complete his ritual. This placed Serana in mortal danger, and I had no choice but to destroy him. I now possess the final piece of the Tyranny of the Sun, Auriel's Bow.
translations.chinese: 我了解到，教士长维苏尔为了报复奥瑞艾尔在他变成吸血鬼时发出的斥责，创造了太阳暴政。他已经拥有了奥瑞艾尔之弓，但还需要一个纯正吸血鬼的血来完成仪式。瑟拉娜因此遭遇致命危机，我别无选择，只能将维苏尔击杀。现在我拥有了太阳暴政的最后一块拼图，奥瑞艾尔之弓。

translations.english: I've completely filled the Initiate's Ewer given to me by Knight-Paladin Gelebor. All that remains is gaining access to the Chantry's Inner Sanctum where both Arch-Curate Vyrthur and Auriel's Bow are located.
translations.chinese: 我已经盛满了圣骑士盖勒布交给我的新人之壶。接下来就是进入神殿内殿，去找教士长维苏尔和奥瑞艾尔之弓了。

translations.english: The vision provided by the Elder Scrolls seems to indicate that Auriel's Bow may be located in a place known as Darkfall Cave. I should proceed there as soon as I'm prepared if I wish to recover the bow and stop Harkon from completing the Tyranny of the Sun.
translations.chinese: 上古卷轴提供的幻象似乎指示，奥瑞艾尔之弓位于一个叫做暗瀑洞穴的地方。等我准备好，就去那里把弓找回来，阻止哈孔完成太阳暴政。

translations.english: The vision provided by the Elder Scrolls seems to indicate that Auriel's Bow may be located in a place known as Darkfall Cave. I should proceed there as soon as I'm prepared if I wish to recover the bow and stop Harkon from completing the Tyranny of the Sun.
translations.chinese: 上古卷轴提供的幻象似乎指示，奥瑞艾尔之弓位于一个叫做暗瀑洞穴的地方。等我准备好，就去那里把弓找回来，阻止哈孔完成太阳暴政。

translations.english: I've encountered Gelebor, a snow elf Knight-Paladin of the Chantry of Auri-El. He's requesting I kill his brother, Arch-Curate Vyrthur, who's been corrupted by the Falmer. I've been given an Initiate's Ewer which will ultimately provide me access to the Chantry's Inner Sanctum where both Arch-Curate Vyrthur and Auriel's Bow are located.
translations.chinese: 我遇到了奥瑞-艾尔神殿的雪精灵圣骑士盖勒布。他要求我去杀死他被伐莫腐化的兄弟，教士长维苏尔。我得到了一个新人之壶，能够帮我进入教士长维苏尔和奥瑞艾尔之弓所在的神殿内殿。

translations.english: I've gained access to the Chantry's Inner Sanctum. I should find and confront Arch-Curate Vyrthur in order to secure Auriel's Bow.
translations.chinese: 我进入神殿的内殿。我必须找到教士长维苏尔并与之战斗，才能拿到奥瑞艾尔之弓。
找到奥瑞艾尔之弓的位置

translations.english: Gain entry to the Inner Sanctum

translations.english: I've now fully learned Durnehviir's shout by summoning him to Tamriel. Our agreement appears to be mutually beneficial, and therefore I'll continue to summon him as I deem necessary.
translations.chinese: 在召唤杜耐维尔来泰姆瑞尔后，我已经完全学会了他的龙吼。我们的契约对彼此都有利，所以如有必要，我会继续召唤他。

translations.english: I have made a pact with the dragon, Durnehviir. I will agree to summon him to Tamriel on occasion, and in return he's agreed to fight by my side and teach me his unique shout.
translations.chinese: 我和叫杜耐维尔的龙定下了契约。我同意偶尔在泰姆瑞尔召唤他，作为回报他同意与我并肩作战，并教我他的独特龙吼。

translations.english: After bringing the Elder Scrolls to Dexion, a disturbing development has arisen. When reading the first scroll in front of Harkon's court, he wasn't able to fully prepare himself and he's become blind. It's now up to me to bring all three Elder Scrolls to the Ancestor Glade where I can supposedly unearth an ancient method of reading them myself.
translations.chinese: 将上古卷轴带给戴希翁的时候，不安的进展出现了。他首次在哈孔的宫廷前阅读时，没有做好充分准备，因而失明了。现在我得把这三卷上古卷轴带到先祖林地，自己发掘阅读它们的古老方法。

translations.english: In order to locate Auriel's Bow, the Moth Priest, Dexion, indicated that two other Elder Scrolls would be required. The first scroll foretells the interactions of the dragons with the history of Nirn. The second foreshadows the defiance of the gods with the blood of mortals.
translations.chinese: 为了找到奥瑞艾尔之弓，蛾祭司戴希翁表示还需要两卷上古卷轴。第一卷预言了龙与奈恩历史的互动。第二卷预言了凡人之血对众神的违抗。

translations.english: After bringing the Elder Scrolls to Dexion, a disturbing development has arisen. When reading the first scroll in front of the Dawnguard, he wasn't able to fully prepare himself and he's become blind. It's now up to me to bring all three Elder Scrolls to the Ancestor Glade where I can supposedly unearth an ancient method of reading them myself.
translations.chinese: 将上古卷轴带给戴希翁的时候，不安的进展出现了。他首次在黎明守卫面前阅读时，没有做好充分准备，因而失明了。现在我得把这三卷上古卷轴带到先祖林地，自己发掘阅读它们的古老方法。

translations.english: I've secured both of the Elder Scrolls needed to fully decipher the Tyranny of the Sun and pinpoint Auriel's Bow. I need to return to Castle Volkihar where Dexion is imprisoned so he can begin his reading.
translations.chinese: 我已经拿到了其他两本上古卷轴，可以完全破解太阳暴政，精确定位奥瑞艾尔之弓了。我得回沃基哈尔堡找戴希翁进行阅读了。

translations.english: I've secured both of the Elder Scrolls needed to fully decipher the Tyranny of the Sun and pinpoint Auriel's Bow. I need to return to Fort Dawnguard where Dexion has been waiting to begin his reading.
translations.chinese: 我已经拿到了其他两本上古卷轴，可以完全破解太阳暴政，精确定位奥瑞艾尔之弓了。我得回黎明守卫堡垒找戴希翁进行阅读了。

translations.english: Bring both Elder Scrolls to Dexion
translations.chinese: 将上古卷轴带给戴希翁

translations.english: I've successfully made contact with Urag gro-Shub at the College of Winterhold regarding the Elder Scroll that foretells the interactions of the dragons with the history of Nirn.
translations.chinese: 我已经成功联系上冬堡学院的乌拉格·格洛-舒布，询问了预言龙与奈恩历史互动的上古卷轴。

translations.english: I've successfully made contact with a strange old man named Septimus Signus who appears to have information regarding the Elder Scroll that foretells the interactions of the dragons with the history of Nirn.
translations.chinese: 我成功联系上了赛普蒂莫斯·希格纳斯的怪老头，他似乎有关于龙与奈恩历史互动的上古卷轴的消息。

translations.english: I've successfully purchased the Elder Scroll that foretells the interactions of the dragons with the history of Nirn from Urag gro-Shub at the College of Winterhold.
translations.chinese: 我已经成功从冬堡学院的乌拉格·格洛-舒布那里买回了预言龙与奈恩历史互动的上古卷轴。

translations.english: In order to discover the location of Auriel's Bow, I need to acquire the Elder Scroll that foretells the interactions of the dragons with the history of Nirn. Having sold that particular scroll to Urag gro-Shub at the College of Winterhold, I'll need to return there to see if he's willing to sell it back.
translations.chinese: 为了找到奥瑞艾尔之弓，我需要获得预言龙与奈恩历史互动的上古卷轴。我已经把那卷轴卖给了冬堡学院的乌拉格·格洛-舒布，我得看看他是否愿意重新出售。

translations.english: In order to discover the location of Auriel's Bow, I need to acquire the Elder Scroll that foretells the interactions of the dragons with the history of Nirn. In order to begin my search, I've been told to ask at the College of Winterhold.
translations.chinese: 为了找到奥瑞艾尔之弓，我需要获得预言龙与奈恩历史互动的上古卷轴。为了搜寻，我需要去冬堡学院询问一番。

translations.english: Buy back the Elder Scroll (Dragon) from Urag gro-Shub
translations.chinese: 从乌拉格·格洛-舒布手中买回上古卷轴（龙）

translations.english: Discover the location of the Elder Scroll (Dragon)
translations.chinese: 寻找上古卷轴（龙）的位置

agentText:

translations.english: I've located all of the notes that Jiub lost when he arrived in the Soul Cairn. I should return them to him when I get the chance.
translations.chinese: 我找到了鸠步散落在灵魂石冢的所有笔记。有机会得还给他。

translations.english: While exploring the Soul Cairn, I've come across the soul of a strange Dunmer named Jiub. He claims to be writing the second volume of his life's story but lacks the notes from his first in order to complete it. He's asked for my help in locating the pages which are likely spread across the entire Soul Cairn... quite a daunting task.
translations.chinese: 在探索灵魂石冢时，我遇到了一个叫做鸠步的奇怪丹莫鬼魂。他声称正在书写人生传记的第二卷，但却缺少了第一卷的笔记。他让我帮他寻找那些可能散落在灵魂石冢各处的手稿……这可是个相当艰巨的任务。

translations.english: I've returned all of Jiub's lost notes to the poor soul. He presented me with an an amulet and a pristine copy of his first volume in appreciation for my efforts.
translations.chinese: 我已经把这可怜人的所有遗失笔记还给了他。为了感谢我的努力，他送了我一个护符与他的第一卷作品。

translations.english:
[pagebreak]

The Rise and Fall of Saint Jiub the Eradicator Hero of Morrowind and Savior of the Dunmer by Jiub

[pagebreak]

am a hunter. I am a redeemer. I am Jiub. The tale of my rise to glory begins in the ash wastes of Morrowind. I rode alone, weapon at my side and the burning wind stinging my face. My quest was arduous, but necessary to ensure the survival of the Dunmer people. A pestilence was creeping across the ashlands, a menace with an insatiable hunger that plagued innocent travelers simply trying to get home. It was my self-sworn task to hunt them down one-by-one and drive them from the skies. Their fury knew no bounds and their war cry resonated across the land. They were the notorious cliff racers, and they had to be destroyed. On a particularly hot day during Sun's Height, I was tracking what I called a Lingerer... a cliff racer without a nest. He was a particularly feisty one too, leading me on a merry chase across almost three miles of ash dunes. I had managed to take a piece out of one of his wings in an earlier scuffle so he couldn't maintain much of a climb, but he still had quite a bit of stamina left and he was trying to make me tire of the chase. Almost two solid hours passed and my silt strider was tiring, but I couldn't give up... I had sworn to eliminate the foul beasts to the last and I wasn't about to let it go. If I was going to stop the thing, I'd have to do it fast. I pulled my longbow from my back and nocked my last arrow. I took a deep breath and pulled, trying to keep the cliff racer in my sights. It was literally a longshot with the beast gaining distance and the silt strider bouncing me around at full gallop. Finally, with a silent prayer, I released the string. The arrow sang through the air like a howling demon as it sliced its way towards its target. Finally, just as it crested the lip of a foyada, the arrow struck it in the midsection. It let out a horrible cry and fell out of sight. My cries of triumph were quickly stifled by the sound of over a hundred wings. Rising from the foyada was an entire colony of cliff racers and they were out for blood. The blasted thing had led me right to their nest and sacrificed itself with the intent of feeding me to its brood. It was a trap. The damned things had become much too clever. Knowing this was likely the end, I jumped down from the silt strider and hit the back of its leg with the flat of my glass blade. There was no need for the innocent thing to die here today because of my stupidity. As the ash cloud cleared from being stirred up by its massive legs, the cliff racer brood approached. I held my sword high and prepared for the worst. The battle lasted two full days. I was beaten, clawed, bitten and knocked down more times than I care to remember. In the end, seventy-six cliff racers were slaughtered. I was knee-deep in their corpses and my body on the verge of collapse. But I had survived. I smiled to the heavens and all went black. When I awoke, all I felt was my back on a cold stone floor. Every muscle in my body was on fire, and my vision was blurred. Slowly, I tried to climb to my feet. It took several agonizing minutes, but I finally managed to do it. As my eyes adjusted to the dim light of my new surroundings, I realized that I was standing before Lord Vivec himself. He was simply staring at me... floating above his throne and staring at me with his piercing eyes. When I began to prostrate myself as a sign of respect, he held up one of his hands as if to say it wasn't necessary. Was I dead? Was Lord Vivec pleased with me? Was he about to strike me down in anger for my somewhat sordid past? Suddenly I understood everything. Suddenly I realized that I was brought here for a reason. I should have died in those ash wastes, but Lord Vivec must have seen something inside me that he hadn't seen in millennia and decided to spare me from my fate. Thus began my ascent to Sainthood. Thus began the rise of Jiub!
translations.chinese:
[pagebreak]

晨风的除害英雄 丹莫的救世主 圣鸠步的崛起与陨落 鸠步 著

[pagebreak]

我乃猎手。我乃救世主。我即是鸠步。 我走向荣耀的传说始于晨风的灰烬荒地。我独乘一骑，身负武器，燃烧的风刺痛了脸颊。我的任务艰巨，然而必须要保障丹莫人民的生存安全。一场瘟疫正在灰地蔓延，一场无尽贪食的威胁困扰着想要归家的旅人。我暗暗发誓，要把它们一个个从天上击落。它们的怒火永无止境，它们的叫声响彻大陆。它们就是臭名昭著的峭壁行者，它们必须被摧毁殆尽。 在日高月一个特别炎热的日子里，我跟踪着一只没有巢穴的峭壁行者……它名叫逗留者。它也相当活跃，让我高兴地追着他跑过了将近三里的灰丘。在早些的追逐中，我设法把它的翅膀削掉了一块，所以它爬不了多久，不过它仍然有不少耐力，试图让我厌倦追逐。近过去了足足两个小时，我的泥沙漫步者开始累了，但是我不能放弃……我曾发誓要彻底消灭这些肮脏的畜生，我不想就此罢休。如果我想阻止它，就得快点动手。 我从背上取下弓，搭上最后一支箭矢。我深吸一口气，拉弓，努力让峭壁行者保持在视野之内。这可真是一次高难度远射，那畜生不断向远方跑去，泥沙漫步者全速飞奔把我颠来颠去。最终，随着无声的祷告，我放开弓弦。箭矢从空中呼啸而过，如同一只嚎叫的恶魔，飞向它的目标。最后，当逗留者抵达佛亚达的边缘时，箭射中了它的腹部。它发出骇人的叫声，消失在了视线之外。 我那胜利的叫喊声很快被无数翅膀拍打的声响压了过去。佛亚达中飞出了一大群峭壁行者，它们一心渴求杀戮。那个混球把我引向它们的巢穴，然后自我牺牲，把我去喂它的崽子。这是个陷阱。这些天杀的东西太狡猾了。知道自己可能大限将至，我从泥沙漫步者上跳下来，用玻璃剑的剑面打了它的腿背。没必要因为我的愚蠢而让无辜的生命在今天死在这里。当泥沙漫步者结实的腿扬起的灰云散去时，峭壁行者的崽子们接近了。我把剑高高举起，做好了最坏的打算。 战斗持续了足足两天。我已经记不清我被打、被抓、被咬、被击倒多少次了。最终，我杀死了七十六只峭壁行者。我站在齐膝深的尸骸中，身体濒临崩溃。不过我活了下来。我向天空微笑，一切就陷入了黑暗。 当我醒过来时，我感觉我躺在冰冷的石头地板上。我身上每一寸肌肉都在燃烧，我的视力也模糊了。我试着慢慢爬起来。这几分钟痛苦难熬，不过最终我做到了。当我的眼睛适应新环境的昏暗光线时，我发现我就站在维威克大君本尊面前。他只是盯着我……悬浮在他的王座上，用他那锐利的目光盯着我。当我下拜以示尊重时，他抬了抬手，似乎在说不必多礼。我死了吗？维威克大君对我满意吗？他会不会因为我略显卑鄙的过去而愤然将我毁灭呢？ 突然之间，我明白了一切。突然之间，我明白我并非无缘无故被带到此处。我本该死在那灰烬中，不过维威克大君一定看到了我内心中某些他千年未曾得见的东西，并且决定让我摆脱命运。 就这样，我的升圣之路开始了。就这样，鸠步的崛起开始了！

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard EDID: DLC1VQSaintFinalBook Translations: - BOOK:DESC | EN: [pagebreak]

The Rise and Fall of Saint Jiub the Eradicator Hero of Morrowind and Savior of the Dunmer by Jiub

[pagebreak]

am a hunter. I am a redeemer. I am Jiub. The tale of my rise to glory begins in the ash wastes of Morrowind. I rode alone, weapon at my side and the burning wind stinging my face. My quest was arduous, but necessary to ensure the survival of the Dunmer people. A pestilence was creeping across the ashlands, a menace with an insatiable hunger that plagued innocent travelers simply trying to get home. It was my self-sworn task to hunt them down one-by-one and drive them from the skies. Their fury knew no bounds and their war cry resonated across the land. They were the notorious cliff racers, and they had to be destroyed. On a particularly hot day during Sun's Height, I was tracking what I called a Lingerer... a cliff racer without a nest. He was a particularly feisty one too, leading me on a merry chase across almost three miles of ash dunes. I had managed to take a piece out of one of his wings in an earlier scuffle so he couldn't maintain much of a climb, but he still had quite a bit of stamina left and he was trying to make me tire of the chase. Almost two solid hours passed and my silt strider was tiring, but I couldn't give up... I had sworn to eliminate the foul beasts to the last and I wasn't about to let it go. If I was going to stop the thing, I'd have to do it fast. I pulled my longbow from my back and nocked my last arrow. I took a deep breath and pulled, trying to keep the cliff racer in my sights. It was literally a longshot with the beast gaining distance and the silt strider bouncing me around at full gallop. Finally, with a silent prayer, I released the string. The arrow sang through the air like a howling demon as it sliced its way towards its target. Finally, just as it crested the lip of a foyada, the arrow struck it in the midsection. It let out a horrible cry and fell out of sight. My cries of triumph were quickly stifled by the sound of over a hundred wings. Rising from the foyada was an entire colony of cliff racers and they were out for blood. The blasted thing had led me right to their nest and sacrificed itself with the intent of feeding me to its brood. It was a trap. The damned things had become much too clever. Knowing this was likely the end, I jumped down from the silt strider and hit the back of its leg with the flat of my glass blade. There was no need for the innocent thing to die here today because of my stupidity. As the ash cloud cleared from being stirred up by its massive legs, the cliff racer brood approached. I held my sword high and prepared for the worst. The battle lasted two full days. I was beaten, clawed, bitten and knocked down more times than I care to remember. In the end, seventy-six cliff racers were slaughtered. I was knee-deep in their corpses and my body on the verge of collapse. But I had survived. I smiled to the heavens and all went black. When I awoke, all I felt was my back on a cold stone floor. Every muscle in my body was on fire, and my vision was blurred. Slowly, I tried to climb to my feet. It took several agonizing minutes, but I finally managed to do it. As my eyes adjusted to the dim light of my new surroundings, I realized that I was standing before Lord Vivec himself. He was simply staring at me... floating above his throne and staring at me with his piercing eyes. When I began to prostrate myself as a sign of respect, he held up one of his hands as if to say it wasn't necessary. Was I dead? Was Lord Vivec pleased with me? Was he about to strike me down in anger for my somewhat sordid past? Suddenly I understood everything. Suddenly I realized that I was brought here for a reason. I should have died in those ash wastes, but Lord Vivec must have seen something inside me that he hadn't seen in millennia and decided to spare me from my fate. Thus began my ascent to Sainthood. Thus began the rise of Jiub! | ZH: [pagebreak]

晨风的除害英雄 丹莫的救世主 圣鸠步的崛起与陨落 鸠步 著

[pagebreak]

I had sworn to eliminate the foul beasts to the last and I wasn't about to let it go. If I was going to stop the thing, I'd have to do it fast. I pulled my longbow from my back and nocked my last arrow. I took a deep breath and pulled, trying to keep the cliff racer in my sights. It was literally a longshot with the beast gaining distance
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 漫步者开始累了，但是我不能放弃……我曾发誓要彻底消灭这些肮脏的畜生，我不想就此罢休。如果我想阻止它，就得快点动手。 我从背上取下弓，搭上最后一支箭矢。我深吸一口气，拉弓，努力让峭壁行者保持在视野之内。这可真是一次高难度远射，那畜生不断向远方跑去

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> and the silt strider bouncing me around at full gallop. Finally, with a silent prayer, I released the string. The arrow sang through the air like a howling demon as it sliced its way towards its target. Finally, just as it crested the lip of a foyada, the arrow struck it in the midsection. It let out a horrible cry and fell out of sight. My cries of triumph were
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 泥沙漫步者全速飞奔把我颠来颠去。最终，随着无声的祷告，我放开弓弦。箭矢从空中呼啸而过，如同一只嚎叫的恶魔，飞向它的目标。最后，当逗留者抵达佛亚达的边缘时，箭射中了它的腹部。它发出骇人的叫声，消失在了视线之外。 我那胜利的叫喊声

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> quickly stifled by the sound of over a hundred wings. Rising from the foyada was an entire colony of cliff racers and they were out for blood. The blasted thing had led me right to their nest and sacrificed itself with the intent of feeding me to its brood. It was a trap. The damned things had become much too clever. Knowing this was likely the end, I jumped down from the silt strider and hit the back of its leg with the
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 很快被无数翅膀拍打的声响压了过去。佛亚达中飞出了一大群峭壁行者，它们一心渴求杀戮。那个混球把我引向它们的巢穴，然后自我牺牲，把我去喂它的崽子。这是个陷阱。这些天杀的东西太狡猾了。知道自己可能大限将至，我从泥沙漫步者上跳下来，用玻璃剑的

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> flat of my glass blade. There was no need for the innocent thing to die here today because of my stupidity. As the ash cloud cleared from being stirred up by its massive legs, the cliff racer brood approached. I held my sword high and prepared for the worst. The battle lasted two full days. I was beaten, clawed, bitten and knocked down more times than I care to
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 剑面打了它的腿背。没必要因为我的愚蠢而让无辜的生命在今天死在这里。当泥沙漫步者结实的腿扬起的灰云散去时，峭壁行者的崽子们接近了。我把剑高高举起，做好了最坏的打算。 战斗持续了足足两天。我已经记不清我被打、被抓、被咬、被击倒

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> remember. In the end, seventy-six cliff racers were slaughtered. I was knee-deep in their corpses and my body on the verge of collapse. But I had survived. I smiled to the heavens and all went black. When I awoke, all I felt was my back on a cold stone floor. Every muscle in my body was on fire, and my vision was blurred. Slowly, I tried to climb to my feet. It took several agonizing
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 多少次了。最终，我杀死了七十六只峭壁行者。我站在齐膝深的尸骸中，身体濒临崩溃。不过我活了下来。我向天空微笑，一切就陷入了黑暗。 当我醒过来时，我感觉我躺在冰冷的石头地板上。我身上每一寸肌肉都在燃烧，我的视力也模糊了。我试着慢慢爬起来。这几分钟

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> minutes, but I finally managed to do it. As my eyes adjusted to the dim light of my new surroundings, I realized that I was standing before Lord Vivec himself. He was simply staring at me... floating above his throne and staring at me with his piercing eyes. When I began to prostrate myself as a sign of respect, he held up one of his hands as if to say it wasn't necessary. Was I dead? Was Lord Vivec pleased with me? Was he
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 痛苦难熬，不过最终我做到了。当我的眼睛适应新环境的昏暗光线时，我发现我就站在维威克大君本尊面前。他只是盯着我……悬浮在他的王座上，用他那锐利的目光盯着我。当我下拜以示尊重时，他抬了抬手，似乎在说不必多礼。我死了吗？维威克大君对我满意吗？他会不会

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> about to strike me down in anger for my somewhat sordid past? Suddenly I understood everything. Suddenly I realized that I was brought here for a reason. I should have died in those ash wastes, but Lord Vivec must have seen something inside me that he hadn't seen in millennia and decided to spare me from my fate. Thus began my ascent to Sainthood. Thus began the rise of Jiub!
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 因为我略显卑鄙的过去而愤然将我毁灭呢？ 突然之间，我明白了一切。突然之间，我明白我并非无缘无故被带到此处。我本该死在那灰烬中，不过维威克大君一定看到了我内心中某些他千年未曾得见的东西，并且决定让我摆脱命运。 就这样，我的升圣之路开始了。就这样，鸠步的崛起开始了！

Strike quickly, sister, then make your escape. </font>

By our authority, and with the Jarl's implicit consent, the bearer of this writ is hereby commissioned to exact justice upon the condemned wheresoever <Alias.Pronoun=Player> may run. </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='20'> 根据黎明守卫的命令，<Alias.Race=Player> <Alias=Player>系吸血鬼，当判死罪。根据我们的授权，并经由领主的默许，此令状持有者特此受命，无论被定罪者<Alias.Pronoun=Player>逃往何处，均应施行正义的审判。 </font>

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='16'> Novice Hakar, Your repeated failures are an embarrassment to our entire order. Are you truly so inept you cannot even complete a simple courier mission? You have one last chance to redeem yourself. We recently established a number of wilderness caches to supply our agents in the field. You are to restock the chests listed below, then report back for further orders. Our caches in Whiterun Hold are located: - In Rorikstead, in the pasture behind Frostfruit Inn. - Near Stendarr's Shrine in the center of the tundra. - South of Whiterun's Western Watchtower. You have one week. Return successful, or not at all. </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='16'> 新手哈卡尔： 你一再的失败让全教团都为之尴尬。你真的笨到连个简单的送信任务都完成不了了吗？ 最后给你一次挽回失败的机会。我们最近新建立了一批野外隐秘点，为我们的外出人员提供物资补给。你需要去补充下列箱子，再回来报告领取进一步的任务。 我们在白漫领的隐秘点位于： -洛利克镇霜果旅店后面的田场。 -苔原中心地区斯丹达尔祭坛附近。 -白漫城西部哨塔南部。 你有一周时间。要是不成功，就别回来了。 </font>

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='17'> Saliah, In the past several weeks, all of the couriers sent to replenish our supply caches in the northern reaches have gone missing. These drops must be made within the week to ensure our operatives have the provisions they need. You are to restock the following caches: - In Morthal, on the islet due east of the mill. - Outside Nightgate Inn, at the foot of the pier. - Near Winterhold, under the great arch. Take care. Too many of our agents have been lost on this task already. </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='17'> 莎莉亚： 过去几周，派往北部地区送货的人都失踪了。这批货物是我们的人需要的补给，必须在一周内送到他们手里。 你需要去补充以下隐秘点： -莫萨尔城，在伐木场正东的小岛上。 -夜扉旅店外的码头下。 -冬堡附近的大拱门下。 务必当心，我们已经因此牺牲太多人了。 </font>

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: DLC1_WESC07Orders
Translations:
- BOOK:DESC | EN: <font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='17'> Saliah, In the past several weeks, all of the couriers sent to replenish our supply caches in the northern reaches have gone missing. These drops must be made within the week to ensure our operatives have the provisions they need. You are to restock the following caches: - In Morthal, on the islet due east of the mill. - Outside Nightgate Inn, at the foot of the pier. - Near Winterhold, under the great arch. Take care. Too many of our agents have been lost on this task already. </font> | ZH: <font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='17'> 莎莉亚： 过去几周，派往北部地区送货的人都失踪了。这批货物是我们的人需要的补给，必须在一周内送到他们手里。 你需要去补充以下隐秘点： -莫萨尔城，在伐木场正东的小岛上。 -夜扉旅店外的码头下。 -冬堡附近的大拱门下。 务必当心，我们已经因此牺牲太多人了。 </font> | SID: 00007C
