translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='16'> Lynoit, We've received word of an increase in Vampire activity in western Skyrim. In the coming weeks, we plan to dispatch several more agents to the region, and need to establish a network of wilderness supply drops to support them. You are to plant caches in the following locations: - On the small island south of Solitude Sawmill. - Due east of the entrance to the ruin Volskygge. - On the east side of Karthwasten Bridge. If these reports are to be believed, the situation may be far more dangerous than you realize. Be cautious. </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='16'> 利诺特： 我们接到消息，西天际的吸血鬼活动有所增加。接下来几周，我们计划加派特工到该地区，并建立一个野外补给网络来支持他们。 你要在以下地点设立隐秘点： -独孤城伐木场南边的小岛上。 -沃尔斯盖吉遗迹入口正东。 -卡斯威斯腾桥东侧。 如果报告属实，那么情况可能比你想象的还要危险。多加小心。 </font>

translations.english: When a vampire drains your life, you may become infected with Sanguinare Vampiris. If you do not cure this disease within three days, you will become a vampire. As a vampire, you will gain several abilities that reflect your undead and supernatural nature. You will also be afflicted with the vampire's weakness to sunlight, and suffer ill effects when traveling outdoors during the daytime. As time passes, both your powers and your weaknesses will grow in strength. In order to offset these weaknesses, you must "feed" on a humanoid subject. To feed on someone, approach them while they are asleep and activate them. Once you have fed, your powers and weaknesses will be reduced to their lowest level, and the cycle will begin again.
translations.chinese: 当吸血鬼吸收你的生命时，你可能会感染血腥吸血热。如果不在三天内治好，就会变成吸血鬼。 作为吸血鬼，你会获得具有亡灵与超自然本质的能力。你也会因吸血鬼的弱性而饱受阳光折磨，白天在外活动将会感到不适。随着时间流逝，你的力量与弱点都会增强。 为了弥补弱点，你必须“进食”人形目标。在他们睡着时接近并吸食他们。吃饱后，你的力量和弱点将被降低回最低水平，循环将再次开始。

As a vampire, you will gain several abilities that reflect your undead and supernatural nature. You will also be afflicted with the vampire's weakness to sunlight, and suffer ill effects when traveling outdoors during the daytime. As time passes, both your powers and your weaknesses will grow in strength. In order to offset these weaknesses, you must "feed" on a humanoid subject. To feed on someone, approach them while they are asleep and activate them. Once you have fed, your powers and weaknesses will be reduced to their lowest level, and the cycle will begin again. | ZH: 当吸血鬼吸收你的生命时，你可能会感染血腥吸血热。如果不在三天内治好，就会变成吸血鬼。 作为吸血鬼，你会获得具有亡灵与超自然本质的能力。你也会因吸血鬼的弱性而饱受阳光折磨，白天在外活动将会感到不适。随着时间流逝，你的力量与弱点都会增强。 为了弥补弱点，你必须“进食”人形目标。在他们睡着时接近并吸食他们。吃饱后，你的力量和弱点将被降低回最低水平，循环将再次开始。 | SID: 0026F0

translations.english: Natives of Cyrodiil, they have proved to be shrewd diplomats and traders. They are skilled with combat and magic. Anywhere gold coins might be found, Imperials always seem to find a few more. They can call upon the Voice of the Emperor to calm an enemy.
translations.chinese: 帝国人是希罗帝尔的原住民，精明的交际家和商人。战斗和魔法天赋都很出众。在任何有可能发现金币的地方，帝国人似乎总能比别人找到更多。他们可以用“帝王之音”使敌人平静下来。

translations.english: I'm on my way to meet Mercer Frey at the ruins of Snow Veil Sanctum, Karliah's last known location. Together, Mercer and I intend to hunt her down and make her pay for Gallus's murder.
translations.chinese: 我要去雪幔圣所遗迹和墨瑟·弗雷会面，那是卡莱亚最后出没的地方。墨瑟和我打算一起找到她，让她为杀害加卢斯付出代价。

translations.english: The tables have unexpectedly turned, and Mercer Frey has been revealed as Gallus's killer. I now find myself in Karliah's care after Mercer tried to murder me, claiming I'd outlasted my usefulness by witnessing their conversation. I've also discovered that Mercer, Gallus and Karliah were members of some sort of group calling themselves "The Nightingales" - guardians in service to the goddess Nocturnal. What they're protecting or what this has to do with the Guild is still a mystery to me.
translations.chinese: 形势突然逆转，墨瑟·弗雷才是杀害加卢斯的凶手。我发现自己正被卡莱亚照顾，因为墨瑟试图杀我，说我因为目睹了他们的对话而失去价值。我还发现墨瑟、加卢斯、卡莱亚都是某个自称“夜莺”的组织中的成员，夜莺是女神诺克图娜尔的守护者。他们在保护什么，或者说这与公会有什么关系，对我来说仍然是谜。

translations.english: Meet Mercer Frey outside Snow Veil Sanctum
translations.chinese: 在雪幔圣所外和墨瑟·弗雷见面

translations.english: Karliah, Brynjolf and I have slain Mercer Frey, escaped Irkngthand and recovered the Skeleton Key. All that remains is returning the artifact to the Twilight Sepulcher where it belongs; a journey I must undertake alone.
translations.chinese: 卡莱亚、布林乔夫和我杀死了墨瑟·弗雷，逃出了厄金坦德，找回了万能钥匙。剩下的就是把神器送回黄昏坟墓，这趟旅程必须由我独自承担。

translations.english: I'm on my way to Irkngthand, a vast dwarven ruin that supposedly contains the legendary "Eyes of the Falmer." Karliah and Brynjolf are waiting for me within. Together we hope to stop Mercer Frey from stealing the Eyes and escaping from Skyrim with the Skeleton Key of Nocturnal.
translations.chinese: 我要前往大型矮人遗迹厄金坦德，传说那里存放着“伐莫之眼”。卡莱亚和布林乔夫在里面等我。我们希望能够制止墨瑟·弗雷偷走眼睛，然后带着诺克图娜尔的万能钥匙从天际逃走。

translations.english: Mercer Frey, betrayer of the Thieves Guild and Gallus's murderer is finally dead. Upon his death, a wave of magic issued from his body and has caused the already crumbling chamber to collapse and fill with water.
translations.chinese: 盗贼公会的叛徒，杀害加卢斯的凶手，墨瑟·弗雷死了。他死后，一股魔法浪潮从尸体中释放出来，导致已经濒临崩溃的房间坍塌并充水。

translations.english: Mercer Frey is dead and I've recovered the Skeleton Key of Nocturnal from his corpse. I need to escape Irkngthand before the place collapses around me.
translations.chinese: 墨瑟·弗雷死了，我从他尸体上拿回了诺克图娜尔的万能钥匙。我要在这里完全坍塌前逃离厄金坦德。

translations.english: Safe from the dangers below, Karliah, Brynjolf and I finally have a moment to breathe. Mecer Frey is dead, the Skeleton Key of Nocturnal is in my possession and, most importantly, the Nightingales have survived.
translations.chinese: 远离了地下的危险，卡莱亚、布林乔夫和我终于有了喘息的时间。墨瑟·弗雷死了，诺克图娜尔的万能钥匙被我拿到了，最重要的是夜莺都活了下来。

translations.english: I've finally located Mecer Frey within the ruins of Irkngthand. He seemed to be expecting us, and I'm afraid he led us here with the express purpose of eliminating the Nightingales once and for all.
translations.chinese: 我终于在厄金坦德遗迹里找到了墨瑟·弗雷，他似乎在等着我们。他把我们引到这里应该是为了彻底消灭夜莺。

translations.english: Karliah and Brynjolf have joined me in my exploration of Irkngthand, a vast dwarven ruin that supposedly contains the legendary "Eyes of the Falmer." Together we hope to stop Mercer Frey from stealing the Eyes and escaping from Skyrim with the Skeleton Key of Nocturnal.
translations.chinese: 卡莱亚和布林乔夫加入了我对巨大矮人遗迹厄金坦德的探索，传说这里存放着“伐莫之眼”。我们希望能够制止墨瑟·弗雷偷走眼睛，然后带着诺克图娜尔的万能钥匙从天际逃走。

translations.english: I've entered Irkngthand, a vast dwarven ruin that supposedly contains the legendary "Eyes of the Falmer." Karliah and Brynjolf are waiting for me within. Together we hope to stop Mercer Frey from stealing the Eyes and escaping from Skyrim with the Skeleton Key of Nocturnal.
translations.chinese: 我进入了大型矮人遗迹厄金坦德，传说这里存放着“伐莫之眼”。卡莱亚和布林乔夫在里面等我。我们希望能够制止墨瑟·弗雷偷走眼睛，然后带着诺克图娜尔的万能钥匙从天际逃走。

translations.english: Falion in Morthal is rumored to have studied vampires. He might be able to cure the condition.
translations.chinese: 据说莫萨尔的法利昂研究过吸血鬼。也许他能治好我的病。

translations.english: Falion in Morthal can perform a ritual to cure vampirism. I need to meet him at the Black Marsh at dawn for him to perform the ritual. I should be careful not to be Blood-Starved when I meet with him or he won't trust me enough to help.
translations.chinese: 莫萨尔的法利昂可以举行治愈吸血鬼的仪式。我要等到黎明时分在黑色沼泽里和他见面以便他举行仪式。我跟他见面的时候要小心克制自己对鲜血的饥渴，否则他会不相信我，不会帮忙。

translations.english: Falion in Morthal can perform a ritual to cure vampirism. He requires a filled black soul gem. I should be careful not to be Blood-Starved when I meet with him or he won't trust me enough to help.
translations.chinese: 莫萨尔的法利昂可以举行治愈吸血鬼的仪式。他需要一个充满的黑色灵魂石。我跟他见面的时候要小心克制自己对鲜血的饥渴，否则他会不相信我，不会帮忙。

translations.english: Falion in Morthal has cured me of vamprism, if I ever contract it again I should contact him.
translations.chinese: 莫萨尔的法利昂治愈了我的吸血鬼病，如果我再次感染，可以重新联系他。

translations.english: Bring a filled Black Soul Gem to Morthal
translations.chinese: 将一颗充满的黑色灵魂石带回莫萨尔
在黎明时分与法利昂见面

translations.english: Wait for Falion to complete the ritual

translations.english: The clanfolk of the Western Valenwood forests, also known as "Bosmer." Wood elves make good scouts and thieves, and there are no finer archers in all of Tamriel. They have natural resistances to both poisons and diseases. They can Command Animals to fight for them.
translations.chinese: 西方威伦森林的种族，也被称为“波斯莫”。木精灵是优秀的斥候和盗贼，全泰姆瑞尔难觅可以与之比肩的弓箭手。他们对毒素和疾病都具有天然的抵抗力。可以命令动物为其作战。

translations.chinese: 想要驾驭它就要了解它。很简单的道理。但锻莫的密锁箱把它和我隔绝了。

translations.english: The Elder Scroll gives insight deeper than the deep ones, though. To bring about the opening.
translations.chinese: 上古卷轴提供了比深地之民更深刻的洞察力。能够带来打开它的方法。

translations.english: The ice entombs the heart. The bane of Kagrenac and Dagoth Ur.
translations.chinese: 冰雪埋藏了心脏。这是卡格瑞纳克与达格斯·乌尔的祸根。

translations.english: So don't get your hopes up. It's mostly lies, leavened with rumor and conjecture.
translations.chinese: 所以不要抱太大希望。大部分都是些夹杂着谣传和猜测的谎言。

translations.english: I'll bring you everything we have on them, but it's not much.
translations.chinese: 我会把所有有关他们的资料都给你，不过不太多。

translations.chinese: 从那以后就没他的音信了。

Said he found some old Dwemer artifact, but... well, that was years ago.

translations.english: Somewhere in the ice fields, if you want to try to find him.
translations.chinese: 如果想找他，他应该就在冰原的某处。

translations.english: Oh no. I hope not. But even I haven't seen him in years, and we were close.
translations.chinese: 啊，没有。我希望他还活着。不过我已经很多年没见过他了。我们关系很不错的。

translations.english: Then, well... you got a taste. Stronger, faster.
translations.chinese: 然后，嗯……你已经尝试过了。更强了，也更敏捷了。

translations.english: Nothing, until you choose to use it.
translations.chinese: 没什么。直到你选择使用它。

translations.english: It doesn't last long, though. The blood of your foes can sustain you. If you're willing to feed.
translations.chinese: 不过不会持续太久。如果你愿意啃食的话，敌人的血可以维持你的形态。

translations.chinese: 但你寻求的东西并不容易，意志不坚是会被摧毁的。

translations.english: It is true there are some here who have spent years studying the accumulated knowledge of the scrolls.

translations.chinese: 找出他们的首领，宰了他！

translations.english: Kill their leader before it has a chance to escape!

Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: The trolls will serve us well, I think.

translations.chinese: 我们有奥瑞艾尔之弓，输不了……的吧？

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020028CE]

translations.chinese: 我们会把他们杀个精光。

agentText:

translations.english: And now... I think I can rest. Farewell, my friend, wherever your travels take you.
translations.chinese: 而现在……我想可以休息了。无论你的旅途向何方，永别了，我的朋友。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02002949]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And now... I think I can rest. Farewell, my friend, wherever your travels take you. | ZH: 而现在……我想可以休息了。无论你的旅途向何方，永别了，我的朋友。 | SID: 00245A

translations.english: We'd be honored to have you join us.
translations.chinese: 如果有你加入，我们会十分荣幸。
这样一来，怪物被消灭了。

translations.english: Even with these vampires gone, the fight isn't completely over. Once we're settled back in at the fort, there will be more work to do.
translations.chinese: 即使没了这些吸血鬼，战斗也还没完全结束。我们回到堡垒后就有更多工作要做了。

translations.english: The Dawnguard will now be dedicated to safeguarding it, making sure that prophecy will never come to pass.
translations.chinese: 黎明守卫现在将全力守卫这把弓，确保预言永无实现之日。

translations.english: Not only that, but Auriel's Bow is in safe hands.
translations.chinese: 不止如此，奥瑞艾尔之弓也得到了妥善保管。

agentText:

translations.english: Once there was a group dedicated to a similar cause. They called themselves the Dawnguard.
translations.chinese: 曾有一个组织致力于类似的事业，他们自称黎明守卫。

translations.english: Vampires need to be dealt with. Hunted, rooted out, destroyed.
translations.chinese: 总得有人去猎杀，根除，摧毁吸血鬼。

translations.english: That was a long time ago, but the idea was, and is, a good one. That's why I'm bringing it back.
translations.chinese: 那是很久以前了，但这个主意过去是，现在也是好主意。这就是为什么我要使其复生。

translations.english: This latest attack proves it's the right time.
translations.chinese: 最近的这次袭击证明时机合适了。

translations.english: Please, he's such a loyal creature, and he's been running for so long. You have to save him! A place like this will change you...
translations.chinese: 求求你了，他这么忠诚，也载我跑了这么久了。你得救救他！这种地方会改变你们……

translations.english: Arvak. My horse. We came to this horrible place together. We were attacked by monsters, so I told him to run.
translations.chinese: 阿瓦克，我的马。我们一起来到这恐怖的地方，被怪物袭击了，所以我叫他快跑。

translations.english: Arvak! Arvak, where are you? Arvak, please come back! Come back!

translations.english: The first lay at the end of Darkfall Passage, a cavern that represents the absence of enlightenment.
translations.chinese: 第一个在暗瀑通道的尽头，一个代表未经启蒙的洞穴。

translations.english: The only way to get to my brother is by following in the Initiates' footsteps and traveling from wayshrine to wayshrine just as they did.
translations.chinese: 找到我兄弟的唯一办法就是跟随新人的足迹，从一个路龛到另一个路龛，就像他们一样。

translations.english: They won't respond to you in any way other than believing that you're an Initiate and you're undertaking the journey to the Inner Sanctum.
translations.chinese: 他们不会以任何方式回应你，除了认为你是一个新人，正在进行通往内殿的旅程。

translations.english: I'm afraid in their current form, they still believe the Chantry to be an active center of worship.
translations.chinese: 恐怕以目前的情况，他们还以为神殿依然是活跃的信仰中心。

translations.english: Welcome, Initiate. This is the Wayshrine of Sight.
translations.chinese: 欢迎你，新人。这里是眼界之路龛。

translations.english: Are you prepared to honor the mantras of Auri-El and fill your vessel with His enlightenment?
translations.chinese: 准备好接受奥瑞-艾尔的教导，用他的启示填满容器了吗？

translations.english: Through the grace of Auri-El, they were restored to their spectral form to enable them to continue their duties.
translations.chinese: 多亏奥瑞艾尔的恩典，他们恢复成了幽灵形态，得以继续履行职责。

translations.english: They're ghosts of the snow elf priests that tended the wayshrines before being slaughtered by the Betrayed.
translations.chinese: 他们是雪精灵祭司的鬼魂，在被背叛者屠杀前，他们照看着路龛。

translations.english: We need to do all that nonsense to get into the temple, so we can kill your brother and claim Auriel's Bow?
translations.chinese: 我们得做那么多毫无意义的事情才能进神殿，然后杀了你兄弟拿到奥瑞艾尔之弓？

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02002B3E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: So, let's get this straight. | ZH: 那么，我们来捋一捋。 | SID: 00242C

EDID: [02002B3F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, let me show you. | ZH: 对，我来给你展示一下。 | SID: 0022B6

translations.english: Then behold Auri-El's gift, my child. May it speed your journey to the Inner Sanctum.
translations.chinese: 那就来见证奥瑞-艾尔的恩赐吧，孩子。愿它加快你前往内殿的旅途。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: They swept into the Chantry without warning and began killing everyone without pause.
translations.chinese: 他们毫无征兆地冲进神殿，开始不停地屠杀每一个人。

translations.english: Of course. You're here for Auriel's Bow. Why else would you be here?
translations.chinese: 当然，你们是在找奥瑞艾尔之弓，不然还能是为什么呢？

translations.english: I can help you get it, but first I must have your assistance.
translations.chinese: 我能帮你找到它，但首先你们得帮我。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I can help you get it, but first I must have your assistance. | ZH: 我能帮你找到它，但首先你们得帮我。 | SID: 00223B

translations.english: May Auri-El's light guide you in your darkest hours.
translations.chinese: 愿奥瑞-艾尔之光指引你最黑暗的时光。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02002B55]
Translations:

translations.english: We've been so terribly fortunate. I can't wait to see what's in these drawings.
translations.chinese: 我们真是太幸运了，等不及要看看这些图纸里有什么了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02002F17]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We've been so terribly fortunate. I can't wait to see what's in these drawings. | ZH: 我们真是太幸运了，等不及要看看这些图纸里有什么了。 | SID: 00232A

translations.english: I think even Gunmar's been impressed with what we've managed to do with the Dwemer drawings. Let's see what we can do with these ones!
translations.chinese: 我猜就连甘马尔也会对我们在锻莫图纸上取得的成就感到佩服。来看看这些能让我们做什么！

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02002F18]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I think even Gunmar's been impressed with what we've managed to do with the Dwemer drawings. Let's see what we can do with these ones! | ZH: 我猜就连甘马尔也会对我们在锻莫图纸上取得的成就感到佩服。来看看这些能让我们做什么！ | SID: 002329

translations.english: I'll have some for sale soon.
Here. Let me show you how this works...
translations.chinese: 来，让你看看是怎么造的……

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02002F19]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I'll have some for sale soon. | ZH: 马上我就有的卖了。 | SID: 0022F0
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Here. Let me show you how this works... | ZH: 来，让你看看是怎么造的…… | SID: 0022F1

translations.english: Sorine needs help with her project to improve our crossbows. And if that doesn't interest you...
translations.chinese: 索琳改进弩的项目需要帮助，但如果你不感兴趣的话……

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02002F1A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Sorine needs help with her project to improve our crossbows. And if that doesn't interest you... | ZH: 索琳改进弩的项目需要帮助，但如果你不感兴趣的话…… | SID: 002410

translations.english: I've always been fascinated with Dwemer artifacts. I take them apart, poke around in their guts, and try to figure things out - with mixed results.
translations.chinese: 我一直对锻莫文物很感兴趣。把它们拆开来，在核心部位戳来戳去，试图搞清楚原理——喜忧参半吧。

translations.english: So, if you'd be a dear and collect those plans for me?
translations.chinese: 所以，能麻烦你帮我收集这些图纸吗？

translations.english: But as luck would have it, I've tracked down the location of some actual Dwemer diagram drawings!
translations.chinese: 但幸运的是，我找到了一些锻莫正牌设计图的位置！

translations.english: I want to add some punch to our crossbow capabilities, I've done all I can on my own. I need a little inspiration.
translations.chinese: 我一直尽全力想给我们的弩增加动能。还需要些灵感。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: I want to add some punch to our crossbow capabilities, I've done all I can on my own. I need a little inspiration. | ZH: 我一直尽全力想给我们的弩增加动能。还需要些灵感。 | SID: 0023E9

translations.english: Ready for more? I certainly am.
translations.chinese: 准备继续找了吗？我当然是了。

translations.english: Be a dear and fetch me another set of Dwemer diagrams?
translations.chinese: 能再帮个忙给我带一套锻莫设计图吗？

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02002F1C]
Translations:

It's amazing what I'm able to learn from studying these Dwemer plans.
translations.chinese: 我从这些锻莫设计中学到的东西可太神奇了。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: It's amazing what I'm able to learn from studying these Dwemer plans. | ZH: 我从这些锻莫设计中学到的东西可太神奇了。 | SID: 002483

translations.english: Here's the location of the next set of Dwemer diagrams. Thanks!
translations.chinese: 下一组锻莫设计图的位置在这里，多谢了！

translations.english: I'm starting to think you like this as much as I do!
translations.chinese: 我开始觉得你和我一样喜欢这个了！

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02002F1E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Here's the location of the next set of Dwemer diagrams. Thanks! | ZH: 下一组锻莫设计图的位置在这里，多谢了！ | SID: 0021C4
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I'm starting to think you like this as much as I do! | ZH: 我开始觉得你和我一样喜欢这个了！ | SID: 002323

translations.english: Alright! One more set of dwemer plans to go.
translations.chinese: 好了！又有一套锻莫图纸要找了。

translations.english: Think I'll be sad when we're done collecting these. Who knows though, maybe more plans will turn up in the future.
translations.chinese: 等我们收集完这些后，我可能会难过吧。谁知道呢，也许以后还有更多图纸出现呢。

translations.english: But I can't wait to see these drawings. Go on, get out of here!
translations.chinese: 但我现在等不及要看看这些图纸了，赶紧的，出去找吧！

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02002F1F]

translations.chinese: 我发现新的锻莫图纸了。

translations.english: Be a dear and collect these diagrams for me?
translations.chinese: 能劳烦你帮我去收集这些设计图吗？

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02002F20]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I've located more dwemer plans. | ZH: 我发现新的锻莫图纸了。 | SID: 0021A2
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Be a dear and collect these diagrams for me? | ZH: 能劳烦你帮我去收集这些设计图吗？ | SID: 00231C

translations.english: It's been a long time since I felt that way and it's been long overdue. My thanks, to both of you.
translations.chinese: 我很久没有过这样的感觉了，早该如此。多谢你们二位。

translations.english: Because that means there's still hope that they might one day shed their hatred and learn to believe in Auri-El once again.
translations.chinese: 因为这意味着他们还有希望，某一天能放下仇恨，重新信奉奥瑞艾尔。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02002F5F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: It's been a long time since I felt that way and it's been long overdue. My thanks, to both of you. | ZH: 我很久没有过这样的感觉了，早该如此。多谢你们二位。 | SID: 0022AC
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Because that means there's still hope that they might one day shed their hatred and learn to believe in Auri-El once again. | ZH: 因为这意味着他们还有希望，某一天能放下仇恨，重新信奉奥瑞艾尔。 | SID: 002439

translations.english: Deep inside, it brings me joy that the Betrayed weren't to blame for what happened here.
translations.chinese: 在我心里，我很高兴这里发生的一切不是背叛者们造成的。

translations.english: I see. That would explain much.

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02002F60]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Deep inside, it brings me joy that the Betrayed weren't to blame for what happened here. | ZH: 在我心里，我很高兴这里发生的一切不是背叛者们造成的。 | SID: 00223C
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I see. That would explain much. | ZH: 懂了，那就说得通了。 | SID: 0023DF
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: A vampire? | ZH: 吸血鬼？ | SID: 00243A

Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02002F6F]
Translations:
- REFR:FULL | EN: Dimhollow Crypt | ZH: 幽空地穴 | SID: 000F9C

translations.english: The prophecy said that vampires would no longer need to fear the sun. For someone who fancied himself as vampire royalty, that's pretty seductive.
translations.chinese: 预言说吸血鬼不用再害怕太阳了。对于一个自诩为吸血鬼王室成员的人来说，这相当诱人。

translations.english: He just became absorbed... obsessed. It was kind of sick, actually.
translations.chinese: 他变得专注……痴迷。实际上，已经有些病态了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200320A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: The prophecy said that vampires would no longer need to fear the sun. For someone who fancied himself as vampire royalty, that's pretty seductive. | ZH: 预言说吸血鬼不用再害怕太阳了。对于一个自诩为吸血鬼王室成员的人来说，这相当诱人。 | SID: 00236A
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: He just became absorbed... obsessed. It was kind of sick, actually. | ZH: 他变得专注……痴迷。实际上，已经有些病态了。 | SID: 0023D4

translations.english: I wonder what these souls do all day. They look... bored.
translations.chinese: 我想知道这些灵魂成天都干些什么。他们似乎很……无聊。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200320B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I wonder what these souls do all day. They look... bored. | ZH: 我想知道这些灵魂成天都干些什么。他们似乎很……无聊。 | SID: 002361

translations.english: Be careful with those crystals. They feel... hungry.
translations.chinese: 当心这些水晶。它们感觉……很饥渴。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200320C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Be careful with those crystals. They feel... hungry. | ZH: 当心这些水晶。它们感觉……很饥渴。 | SID: 0021B5

translations.english: Ugh. The smell here... let's try to handle this quickly.
translations.chinese: 呃。这儿的味道……我们赶紧把事情办了吧。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200320D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ugh. The smell here... let's try to handle this quickly. | ZH: 呃。这儿的味道……我们赶紧把事情办了吧。 | SID: 002196

translations.english: I did. But something about you makes me think I can trust you. I hope I'm not wrong.
translations.chinese: 确实。但你身上的某种特质让我觉得可以相信你。但愿我没看走眼。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200320E]
Translations:

translations.english: Wound up turning into a vampire. The Jarl, unable to kill his own son, spent a fortune building this keep and hiring men to guard it.
translations.chinese: 最后他变成了吸血鬼，领主没法杀死自己的儿子，就花了一大笔钱建造这座堡垒，并派人来守着。

translations.english: Back in the Second Era, the Jarl of Riften had a son. Adventurous type, too much for his own good it seems.
translations.chinese: 第二纪元，裂谷城领主有个儿子。他喜欢冒险，但似乎太超出他能力范围了。

translations.english: Fought vampires wherever they found them. I aim to continue that mission.
translations.chinese: 无论何地只要发现了吸血鬼，都与之战斗。我的目标是继续这项使命。

translations.english: They were eventually forced to put him down. The Jarl banished them from the hold, but they stuck to their cause.
translations.chinese: 最后被迫杀死了他，领主把他们驱逐出境，但他们仍坚守自己的事业。

translations.english: Their job was to keep the Jarl's son contained within. They took it seriously, and served honorably.
translations.chinese: 工作是把领主的儿子关在里面，他们也认真对待，光荣服役。

translations.chinese: 我把我的血赐给你。有了它，你就是羊群中的狮子。人们会在你靠近他们时颤颤发抖，而你也再也不会惧怕死亡了。

translations.chinese: 除此之外，她就什么都不跟我说了。

translations.english: The last time I saw her, she said that she'd go somewhere safe... somewhere that my father would never search.
translations.chinese: 上一次我见她的时候，她说她会去一个安全的地方……一个我父亲永远也找不到的地方。

translations.english: But the way she said it... "someplace he would never search." It was cryptic, yet she called attention to it.
translations.chinese: 但她说的是……“一个他永远不会去找的地方”。意义不明，但确实引起了我的注意。

translations.english: Are you sure? I'm willing to turn you, but you need to think it through.
translations.chinese: 你确定？我是不介意转化你的，不过你得好好考虑考虑。

translations.english: It's not a question of trust... he's just obsessed with the prophecy.

translations.chinese: 抱歉。我也希望我知道更好的法子，对你来说更容易接受的那种。

translations.english: The story they'd like you to believe is that they were such a noble bunch, doing the honorable thing and saving lives.
translations.chinese: 他们想让你相信的故事是，他们十分高尚，肩负着拯救圣灵的光荣事业。

translations.english: Heard they'd go on midnight raids, pillaging and looting, and then stash the spoils somewhere, guarded by their sigil.
translations.chinese: 听说他们会在午夜突袭，劫掠一空，然后把战利品用印记封好，藏在某个地方。

translations.english: Only I hear that's not quite how it happened. Secret organization, you see. No one to blame when homes are broken into, things stolen.
translations.chinese: 可我听到的并非如此。他们是一个秘密组织，知道吗。破门入户，盗窃财物，溜之大吉的那种。

translations.english: Arkay tells me the Sun Fire spell can break open those caches, but I've never found one. I think he might be lying to me.
translations.chinese: 阿尔凯告诉我阳炎法术可以打开这些箱子，但我从来没找到过，八成是被他骗了。

translations.english: Oh, I've read a few things. Heard a few more things. Arkay's told me a bit as well.
translations.chinese: 哦，我读到过一些，也听说过一些，阿尔凯还跟我说了一些。

translations.chinese: 黎明守卫增加了他们的行动，并积极招募人员。

translations.english: We need to put a damper on their efforts and give those trouble makers something to worry about other than harassing our interests.
translations.chinese: 我们得抑制他们的努力，让那些麻烦人物担心，而不是骚扰我们的利益。

translations.english: Make it seem you are a member of the Dawnguard, thus sowing confusion among the herd. Wear this armor and plant this note on the victim.
translations.chinese: 让自己看上去像是黎明守卫的一员，这样就能在牧群中制造混乱。穿上这身盔甲，把这张字条放在死者身上。

translations.english: Hurry back. You don't want to keep Lord Harkon waiting.
translations.chinese: 快点回来，你不会想让哈孔大人久等的。

translations.english: Now, this Chalice needs to be filled directly from the bloodspring that is the source of Redwater Den. But that's not enough.
translations.chinese: 这个圣杯需要直接从红水窝点的源头，血泉中注水。但这还不够。

translations.english: Once that's done, the blood of a powerful vampire needs to be added to it.
translations.chinese: 完成了这一步后，还需要加入一个强大吸血鬼的血。

translations.english: It's your choice whether to attempt to deal with them or force your way through.
translations.chinese: 是与他们打交道还是强行通过就看你的了。

translations.english: Keep in mind that Redwater Den has fallen into... well, let's just say less reputable members of society now dwell there.
translations.chinese: 记住了，红水窝点已经陷入了……嗯，这么说吧，现在那里盘踞着一些社会上声誉不良的群体。

translations.english: I'm afraid in my haste to read the first scroll, I neglected the time I needed to prepare. The failure is purely mine to bear.
translations.chinese: 恐怕我在匆忙阅读第一幅卷轴时，忽略了需要的准备时间。这次失败全归咎于我自己。

translations.english: I thought I'd be able to allay the after effects, but I was wrong. Now I'm paying for it.
translations.chinese: 我以为能减轻后遗症，但我错了。现在只能承受代价了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02005DA0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I trust your journey was successful? | ZH: 我相信您的旅途还算顺利？ | SID: 001261

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02005DA1]
Translations:

translations.english: Yes, how may I serve you, milord?
translations.chinese: 是，我要怎么服侍您，大人？

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02005DA2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, how may I serve you, milord? | ZH: 是，我要怎么服侍您，大人？ | SID: 0007E7

translations.chinese: 我只是您卑微的仆人，大人。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02005DA3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I am but your humble servant, milord. | ZH: 我只是您卑微的仆人，大人。 | SID: 00055F

translations.chinese: 如果真有这样的奇迹，我愿克服一切不可能来得到它。只要能取悦于您。

translations.chinese: 不，还有别的办法。问题是，你愿意冒多大的风险去找奥瑞艾尔之弓？

translations.english: Yeah, too bad. Lord Harkon's new favorite, dead so soon after joining the family.
translations.chinese: 是啊，很遗憾，哈孔大人的新宠，刚加入这个家就死了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02005E25]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yeah, too bad. Lord Harkon's new favorite, dead so soon after joining the family. | ZH: 是啊，很遗憾，哈孔大人的新宠，刚加入这个家就死了。 | SID: 00128D

translations.chinese: 我猜你见过斯达弗和莎洛妮雅了吧？哈孔大人和我怀疑他们可能会跟着你去那儿。

translations.english: I see you have returned. Lord Harkon will be pleased.
translations.chinese: 看到你回来了，哈孔大人会很高兴的。

agentText:

translations.chinese: 文嘉莫和欧兹约夫是哈孔的主要顾问。我肯定他们知道你要拿走圣杯会很惊讶。

translations.english: You've done Lord Harkon two great services. Take what you've learned to heart, and be careful who you trust.
translations.chinese: 你为哈孔大人立了两件大功。把学到的记在心里，小心那些原本信任的人。

translations.english: Each sought to gain power by using his underling to kill you and keep the Chalice for himself.
translations.chinese: 两个人都想利用手下把你干掉，把圣杯据为己有，来获得力量。

translations.english: Welcome to the politics of Lord Harkon's court.
translations.chinese: 欢迎参与哈孔大人的宫廷政治。

translations.english: Now, I believe that Lord Harkon wishes to speak with you.
translations.chinese: 现在，估计哈孔大人想跟你谈谈。

translations.english: Vingalmo and Orthjolf both long for our Lord's throne, but cannot make overt moves against him.
translations.chinese: 文嘉莫和欧兹约夫都觊觎主人的王位，又不敢公开对抗。

translations.english: By ensuring the Chalice reaches our Lord, you have increased his power over them, and at the same time deprived them of their little pets.
translations.chinese: 而把圣杯带回来，不仅增强了主人的力量，还让他们折损了自己的小宠物。

translations.english: Tread lightly. The law is unaware of the danger and will treat you as a criminal if you are caught.
translations.chinese: 下手要轻，当权者不会意识到这种威胁，如果你被抓了，就会被当成罪犯。

I've located the whereabouts of a vampire masquerading as a common citizen.
translations.chinese: 我发现了一个伪装成普通市民的吸血鬼。

translations.chinese: 干掉吸血鬼首领足以驱散他的仆从，当然最好是全部干掉。

translations.english: Our compassion compels us to destroy it.

translations.english: I've learned of a possible monster.
translations.chinese: 我听说有个潜在的怪物。

translations.english: And while I do not know its exact whereabouts, I do have information suggesting someone who does.
translations.chinese: 虽然不清楚准确下落，但情报表明确实有人知道。

translations.english: Pay a visit to the beast's last known contact. Do what you must to find where it's hiding now.
translations.chinese: 去拜访一下这头野兽最后的已知联系人，尽你所能找到它的藏身处。

translations.english: Indeed. It is no small thing to submit yourself to the flesh sculptor's knife.
translations.chinese: 确实，把自己交给血肉雕刻师的刀可不是件小事。

translations.english: I count the nobility of both the Empire and the Dominion among my clients.
translations.chinese: 帝国和先祖神洲的很多贵族们都是我的客户。

translations.english: I have not always been a ragged beggar. I learned my art from the masters of the art of flesh sculpture.
translations.chinese: 别拿我当成臭乞丐，这技术可是从一个血肉雕刻师那里学到的。

translations.english: I studied with the Faculty of Chirurgeons in Cloudrest. I walked with the Hollow-Faced Men of Nohotogrha for three years.
translations.chinese: 我以前在云息城的外科塑型师学院，跟随无面人诺霍塔格拉学了三年。

translations.english: And yet, I have fallen so low that I must justify myself to a wanderer in the sewers of this backwater of the world.
translations.chinese: 然而，我却沦落到如此地步，必须在这穷乡僻壤的阴沟里向一个流浪者证明自己。

translations.english: Hmm. Very well. Just tell me what you desire - beauty or hideous deformity, nothing is beyond my skill.
translations.chinese: 嗯，好吧，告诉我你想变成啥样——变得好看或者丑成畸形，没什么是我做不到的。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200696F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hmm. Very well. Just tell me what you desire - beauty or hideous deformity, nothing is beyond my skill. | ZH: 嗯，好吧，告诉我你想变成啥样——变得好看或者丑成畸形，没什么是我做不到的。 | SID: 001155

translations.english: Despite my present low estate, I am no beggar. Begone until you have the coin to warrant my skills.
translations.chinese: 尽管我现在混的很惨，但也不是什么乞丐。起开，等你有钱了再来找我证明我的能力。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02006970]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Despite my present low estate, I am no beggar. Begone until you have the coin to warrant my skills. | ZH: 尽管我现在混的很惨，但也不是什么乞丐。起开，等你有钱了再来找我证明我的能力。 | SID: 0012E5

translations.english: Why, are you interested in my services? I warn you, my skills do not come cheaply.
translations.chinese: 为什么，你对我的服务感兴趣吗？先说清楚，我的技术可不便宜。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02006972]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Why, are you interested in my services? I warn you, my skills do not come cheaply. | ZH: 为什么，你对我的服务感兴趣吗？先说清楚，我的技术可不便宜。 | SID: 000C61

translations.english: I do not practice my art for free, however. I doubt you can afford my services. You have the smell of the vagabond about you.
translations.chinese: 要我表演技艺可不免费，我怀疑你付不了账。你身上带着一股流浪汉的味道。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02006973]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I do not practice my art for free, however. I doubt you can afford my services. You have the smell of the vagabond about you. | ZH: 要我表演技艺可不免费，我怀疑你付不了账。你身上带着一股流浪汉的味道。 | SID: 00092D

translations.english: The prophecy tells of a time in which vampires will gain power over the sun, and will no longer fear its tyranny.
translations.chinese: 这预言说，吸血鬼将会得到控制太阳的力量，不再惧怕它的暴政。

translations.english: As you know, vampires are powerful, but we have limits. Our great enemy is the sun, and until recently it's an enemy we've had no way to fight.
translations.chinese: 如你所知，吸血鬼是很强大，但是我们也有极限。我们最大的敌人就是太阳，它一直是我们无法解决的敌人。

translations.english: For centuries I searched for an answer to this problem. I found an old prophecy written by a Moth Priest, those scholars who read the Elder Scrolls.
translations.chinese: 千百年以来我一直在寻找办法解决这个问题。我发现了一则由蛾祭司书写的古老预言，这些祭司就是阅读上古卷轴的学者。

translations.english: I believe the secret to unraveling that prophecy is written in Serana's Elder Scroll.
translations.chinese: 我看这预言尚未揭秘的部分，就写在瑟拉娜的上古卷轴里。

agentText:

translations.english: Look to the cities. Speak to innkeepers, carriage drivers, anyone who would meet a traveler.
translations.chinese: 去城市里看看，跟旅店老板、马车夫这些有可能见过旅客的人谈谈。

translations.english: I have spread false rumors about the discovery of an Elder Scroll in Skyrim to lure a Moth Priest here.
translations.chinese: 我已经散布了谣言，说在天际发现了上古卷轴来引诱蛾祭司到这来。

translations.english: Scions of the night! Hear my words!
The prophesied time is at last upon us. Soon we will claim dominion over the sun itself, and forge a new realm of eternal darkness.
translations.chinese: 预言的时代终于到来了，我们很快就会支配太阳，建立一个新的永夜王国。

translations.english: Now that I have reclaimed one of my Elder Scrolls, we must find a Moth Priest to read it.
translations.chinese: 我已经找回了一幅上古卷轴，必须找一个蛾祭司来阅读。

translations.english: Go now, and carry out this task. This is my command!
translations.chinese: 现在就去完成这个任务，这是我的命令！

translations.english: Now it is time to see if those efforts have borne fruit. Go forth, and search the land for rumors of a Moth Priest within our borders.
translations.chinese: 现在是时候看看这些努力是否取得成果了。去吧，在这片土地上搜查关于境内蛾祭司的消息。

agentText:

translations.english: Excuse me, but I must address the court.
translations.chinese: 抱歉，不过我必须得跟宫廷说一声。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020069AE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Excuse me, but I must address the court. | ZH: 抱歉，不过我必须得跟宫廷说一声。 | SID: 000BE7

translations.english: Come now, and hear my proclamation.
I have ordered the court to assemble. I have a new task for us all to carry out, and that includes you.
translations.chinese: 我已经命令宫廷集合了。我有一项新任务让大家去完成，这其中也包括你。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020069AF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Come now, and hear my proclamation. | ZH: 跟我来，听听我的宣言。 | SID: 0010C8
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I have ordered the court to assemble. I have a new task for us all to carry out, and that includes you. | ZH: 我已经命令宫廷集合了。我有一项新任务让大家去完成，这其中也包括你。 | SID: 0012E9

translations.english: The scroll you found with Serana is one of those scrolls of prophecy. Now that it is back within my grasp, we can read the scroll and learn more.
translations.chinese: 你发现的和瑟拉娜在一起的卷轴就是记载了预言的卷轴之一。如今它又回到我的掌控中了，我们可以阅读上古卷轴，了解更多信息了。

translations.english: I don't know yet. The Moth Priest died before finishing the transcription, but he did name the Elder Scrolls that contained the prophecy.
translations.chinese: 我还不知道。蛾祭司在完成翻译之前就死了，不过他的确叫出了书写着预言的上古卷轴的名字。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: The scroll you found with Serana is one of those scrolls of prophecy. Now that it is back within my grasp, we can read the scroll and learn more. | ZH: 你发现的和瑟拉娜在一起的卷轴就是记载了预言的卷轴之一。如今它又回到我的掌控中了，我们可以阅读上古卷轴，了解更多信息了。 | SID: 000C51
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I don't know yet. The Moth Priest died before finishing the transcription, but he did name the Elder Scrolls that contained the prophecy. | ZH: 我还不知道。蛾祭司在完成翻译之前就死了，不过他的确叫出了书写着预言的上古卷轴的名字。 | SID: 0011FD

translations.english: Come on, old man. You should get some rest.
translations.chinese: 来吧，老爷子。你得歇一歇了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020069E6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Come on, old man. You should get some rest. | ZH: 来吧，老爷子。你得歇一歇了。 | SID: 0010E3

translations.english: Very well. I'll hurry on my way there before more of those vampires turn up.
translations.chinese: 很好。我得在更多吸血鬼出现前赶紧动身。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020069E7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Very well. I'll hurry on my way there before more of those vampires turn up. | ZH: 很好。我得在更多吸血鬼出现前赶紧动身。 | SID: 000FCC

translations.english: I must rest now. The reading has made me weary.
translations.chinese: 我是得歇歇。阅读卷轴太累了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020069E9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I must rest now. The reading has made me weary. | ZH: 我是得歇歇。阅读卷轴太累了。 | SID: 000CD3

translations.english: You have an Elder Scroll? Remarkable!
translations.chinese: 你们有上古卷轴？了不起！

translations.english: I will be happy to assist you with your Elder Scroll. Just tell me where I need to go.
translations.chinese: 我很乐意帮你们阅读上古卷轴。告诉我我该去哪里就成了。

translations.english: If my knowledge of history serves me, I recall that the Dawnguard was an ancient order of vampire hunters.
translations.chinese: 如果我没记错历史的话，黎明守卫是个古老的吸血鬼猎人组织。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020069EF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: You have an Elder Scroll? Remarkable! | ZH: 你们有上古卷轴？了不起！ | SID: 0010E7
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I will be happy to assist you with your Elder Scroll. Just tell me where I need to go. | ZH: 我很乐意帮你们阅读上古卷轴。告诉我我该去哪里就成了。 | SID: 00288C
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: If my knowledge of history serves me, I recall that the Dawnguard was an ancient order of vampire hunters. | ZH: 如果我没记错历史的话，黎明守卫是个古老的吸血鬼猎人组织。 | SID: 002891

translations.english: Now tell me, whom do you represent, and what do you want with me?
translations.chinese: 现在告诉我，你代表谁，找我有什么事？

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020069F3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Now tell me, whom do you represent, and what do you want with me? | ZH: 现在告诉我，你代表谁，找我有什么事？ | SID: 00060B

translations.english: Oh, most certainly! Let's find out what secrets the scroll can tell.
translations.chinese: 哦，当然啦！让我们找找看卷轴里有些什么秘密。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02006A79]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, most certainly! Let's find out what secrets the scroll can tell. | ZH: 哦，当然啦！让我们找找看卷轴里有些什么秘密。 | SID: 0010DC

translations.english: I'm quite alright, thanks to you. Dexion Evicus is my name. I'm a Moth Priest of the White Gold Tower.
translations.chinese: 多亏了你，我很好。我叫戴希翁·艾维库斯，是白金塔的一名蛾祭司。

translations.english: These vampires claimed they had some purpose in store for me, but they wouldn't say what. Probably hoping to ransom me, the fools.
translations.chinese: 这些吸血鬼说我有些价值，但又不愿细说。可能是想勒索我，一群傻瓜。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I'm quite alright, thanks to you. Dexion Evicus is my name. I'm a Moth Priest of the White Gold Tower. | ZH: 多亏了你，我很好。我叫戴希翁·艾维库斯，是白金塔的一名蛾祭司。 | SID: 000820

translations.english: It's not exactly the hospitality I'm used to, but your man Isran has seen to my needs well enough.
translations.chinese: 虽然不是我习惯的待客方式，不过伊士冉已经很周全了。

translations.english: And might I add, this is a remarkable fortress. I have colleagues back home that would love to study this place in detail.
translations.chinese: 我想补充一句，这座堡垒可真的非同寻常。我家乡的同事们应该很乐意详细研究研究它。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02006A9E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: It's not exactly the hospitality I'm used to, but your man Isran has seen to my needs well enough. | ZH: 虽然不是我习惯的待客方式，不过伊士冉已经很周全了。 | SID: 001020
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: And might I add, this is a remarkable fortress. I have colleagues back home that would love to study this place in detail. | ZH: 我想补充一句，这座堡垒可真的非同寻常。我家乡的同事们应该很乐意详细研究研究它。 | SID: 001FD7

translations.english: Ah, my rescuer! It's good to see you again.
translations.chinese: 啊，我的救命恩人！再见到你真好！

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02006AE4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ah, my rescuer! It's good to see you again. | ZH: 啊，我的救命恩人！再见到你真好！ | SID: 0010E1

Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02006AE7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Thank the divines for you! | ZH: 感谢圣灵！ | SID: 000909

translations.english: I'm impressed you could find a Moth Priest so quickly.
translations.chinese: 你能这么快找到蛾祭司，真不简单。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02006B2C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm impressed you could find a Moth Priest so quickly. | ZH: 你能这么快找到蛾祭司，真不简单。 | SID: 000503

translations.english: For the reading? Yeah. Just let the old man know when you're ready.
translations.chinese: 读卷轴吗？好。你这准备好的话就跟老爷子说一声。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02006B84]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: For the reading? Yeah. Just let the old man know when you're ready. | ZH: 读卷轴吗？好。你这准备好的话就跟老爷子说一声。 | SID: 000610

translations.english: You're back and alive to boot! Fantastic.
translations.chinese: 你回来了，而且还活着！太好了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02006BAA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're back and alive to boot! Fantastic. | ZH: 你回来了，而且还活着！太好了。 | SID: 000292

translations.english: I've got more leads on additional Dwemer plans.
translations.chinese: 我还有更多有关锻莫图纸的线索。

translations.english: Those last ones helped me immensely. If you could collect this one for me, it's sure to result in extraordinary success!
translations.chinese: 上次那个对我帮助很大，如果你能帮我找到这个，肯定会取得非凡的成功！

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02006BAB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I've got more leads on additional Dwemer plans. | ZH: 我还有更多有关锻莫图纸的线索。 | SID: 000A2C
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Those last ones helped me immensely. If you could collect this one for me, it's sure to result in extraordinary success! | ZH: 上次那个对我帮助很大，如果你能帮我找到这个，肯定会取得非凡的成功！ | SID: 0010E4

Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02006BC1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Finish them! | ZH: 杀了他们！ | SID: 000631

translations.english: An impressive display, but a wasted effort. You delay nothing but your own deaths!
translations.chinese: 你们的表演很精彩，但还是白费力气，不过是拖延自己的死期罢了！

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02006BC2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: An impressive display, but a wasted effort. You delay nothing but your own deaths! | ZH: 你们的表演很精彩，但还是白费力气，不过是拖延自己的死期罢了！ | SID: 000D84

translations.english: Did you really come here expecting to claim Auriel's Bow?
translations.chinese: 你们还真的来这儿拿奥瑞艾尔之弓了啊？

translations.english: Which, I'm sorry to say, means your usefulness is at an end!
translations.chinese: 很遗憾，这意味着你已经完全没用了！

translations.english: You've done exactly as I predicted and brought your fetching companion to me.
translations.chinese: 你完全照我预言，把你迷人的同伴带到我这儿来了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02006BC3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Did you really come here expecting to claim Auriel's Bow? | ZH: 你们还真的来这儿拿奥瑞艾尔之弓了啊？ | SID: 0006D9
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Which, I'm sorry to say, means your usefulness is at an end! | ZH: 很遗憾，这意味着你已经完全没用了！ | SID: 001466
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: You've done exactly as I predicted and brought your fetching companion to me. | ZH: 你完全照我预言，把你迷人的同伴带到我这儿来了。 | SID: 001C51

translations.english: You think I'd have the audacity to place my own daughter in that tomb for the protection of her Elder Scroll alone?
translations.chinese: 你以为我鲁莽地把女儿放在那坟墓里只是为了保护上古卷轴吗？

translations.english: The scrolls are merely a means to an end. The key to the Tyranny of the Sun is Serana herself.
translations.chinese: 卷轴不过是达到目的的一种手段，太阳暴政的关键在于瑟拉娜本身。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You think I'd have the audacity to place my own daughter in that tomb for the protection of her Elder Scroll alone? | ZH: 你以为我鲁莽地把女儿放在那坟墓里只是为了保护上古卷轴吗？ | SID: 0010FC
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: The scrolls are merely a means to an end. The key to the Tyranny of the Sun is Serana herself. | ZH: 卷轴不过是达到目的的一种手段，太阳暴政的关键在于瑟拉娜本身。 | SID: 0010FD

translations.english: This is, or was, the epicenter of our religion. Most of the snow elf people worshipped Auri-El.
translations.chinese: 这里是，或者曾经是我们的宗教中心。大多数雪精灵都信奉奥瑞-艾尔。

translations.english: The Chantry was constructed near the beginning of the First Era to provide a retreat for those that wished to become enlightened.
translations.chinese: 这座神殿建于第一纪元初期，用来为那些寻求启蒙之人提供静修地。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02006FAC]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: The Chantry was constructed near the beginning of the First Era to provide a retreat for those that wished to become enlightened. | ZH: 这座神殿建于第一纪元初期，用来为那些寻求启蒙之人提供静修地。 | SID: 001752

translations.english: The Chantry is quite isolated, so it took some time for word of the dwarves' offer to reach us here.
translations.chinese: 神殿非常偏僻，所以矮人的提议过了一段时间才传到我们这里。

translations.english: By the time the compact had been completed, it was too late for us to even attempt to intervene.
translations.chinese: 当盟约订立的时候，我们已经来不及干预了。

translations.english: So are you here as a client? Shall I remake your face?
translations.chinese: 你是作为客户来的吗？我能重塑你的脸吗？

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200701D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So are you here as a client? Shall I remake your face? | ZH: 你是作为客户来的吗？我能重塑你的脸吗？ | SID: 000666

translations.english: Yes. I once practiced my art in the salons and manors of Tamriel's great and good. Now, the scum of Skyrim are my only clients.
translations.chinese: 是的，我曾经在全泰姆瑞尔最上流的沙龙和庄园里施展我的技术。现在，我的客户只剩天际的渣滓们了。

translations.english: But no matter. The greatest artists are never recognized in their own time.
translations.chinese: 但没关系，最伟大的艺术家们从未在当代获得认可。

translations.english: I assumed you were here to see me about your face. To have it sculpted into something more... artful than Nature has bestowed upon you.
translations.chinese: 我猜你是为了你的脸来找我的，来把它雕刻成……比自然赋予你的更巧妙的样子。

agentText:

translations.english: Hmm, I suppose I can work with your face. After all, the sculptor cannot always choose the finest clay.
translations.chinese: 嗯，看来我能处理你的脸。毕竟雕刻师也不能总是挑最好的粘土。

translations.english: Take my advice, don't listen to that talk of the "face sculptor" down in the Ragged Flagon. "Face butcher" is more like it from what I've heard.
translations.chinese: 听我的劝，别听漏壶那所谓的“脸部雕塑家”说的。据我所知更像是“脸部屠夫”。

agentText:

translations.english: People say there's someone in Riften that can... change your face. Make you look completely different. Do you believe that?
translations.chinese: 人们说在裂谷城有个人能……改变你的面容。让你看起来完全变了个人。你信吗？

translations.english: I can't think of a more deserving champion to carry it than you.
translations.chinese: 我想不到比你更有资格保管它的勇士了。

translations.english: You risked everything to get Auri-El's Bow, and in turn, you've restored the Chantry.
translations.chinese: 你们不顾一切地取得了奥瑞-艾尔之弓，但也因此帮忙恢复了神殿。

translations.english: If you wish to learn more about the bow, or obtain Sunhallowed Arrows for it, I'd be more than happy to help. You've but to ask.
translations.chinese: 如果你再多了解一下这把弓，或者取得圣阳箭，我很乐意帮忙。尽管提就是了。

translations.english: We were once a wealthy and prosperous society that occupied a portion of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 我们的社会曾经是富裕繁荣，占据了天际的一部分。

translations.english: Unfortunately, we were constantly at war with the Nords who claimed the land as their ancestral home.
translations.chinese: 不幸的是，我们一直在和声称这片土地是祖先家园的诺德人战斗。

translations.english: What? What are you talking about?

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020071AB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What? What are you talking about? | ZH: 什么？你什么意思？ | SID: 002325

translations.english: The restoration of this wayshrine means that Vyrthur must be dead and the Betrayed no longer have control over him.
translations.chinese: 这座路龛的修复意味着维苏尔已经身死，背叛者们再也无法控制他了。

translations.english: So, the deed has been done.

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: So, the deed has been done. | ZH: 那么，这件事就结束了。 | SID: 002317

translations.english: And how exactly do you plan on stopping him?
translations.chinese: 那么你打算怎么阻止他呢？

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020071BB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And how exactly do you plan on stopping him? | ZH: 那么你打算怎么阻止他呢？ | SID: 0004A0

translations.english: If Harkon obtained Auriel's Bow and Serana's blood was used to taint the weapon, the Tyranny of the Sun would be complete.
translations.chinese: 如果哈孔获得了奥瑞艾尔之弓，再用瑟拉娜的血玷污这把武器，那么太阳暴政就终结了。

translations.english: In his eyes, she'd be dying for the good of all vampires.
translations.chinese: 在他看来，她应该为了全体吸血鬼的利益去死。

translations.english: Even with Vyrthur gone and the Inner Sanctum destroyed, my duty as a Knight-Paladin of Auri-El remains.
translations.chinese: 即使维苏尔已死、内殿被毁，我身为奥瑞-艾尔圣骑士的职责依然存在。

translations.english: I've been sworn to protect this vale and everything it represents until I die.
translations.chinese: 我发过誓要守护这个山谷，和它代表的一切，直至死亡。

translations.english: If you can find them, we might have a chance.
translations.chinese: 如果你能找到他们，我们也许就有机会。

translations.english: There are people I've met and worked with over the years. We need their skills, their talents, if we're going to survive this.
translations.chinese: 这些年来我遇到过一些人，也和他们共事过。如果我们要渡过难关，需要他们的技术与才能。

translations.english: If they're bold enough to attack us here, then this may be bigger than I thought. I have good men here, but...
translations.chinese: 如果他们敢来这里攻击我们，那么情况可能比我想的严重。我这里人手不错，但……

Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: We're just going to need some help.
translations.chinese: 我们只是需要一些帮助。

translations.english: Well of course we do. I'm old, not stupid.
translations.chinese: 当然了。我只是老了，但不笨。

Addon: Dawnguard

translations.chinese: 我们只是需要……需要帮助。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: When did I say that? | ZH: 我什么时候这么说了？ | SID: 001258

translations.english: Bring the two of them back here, and we can get started on coming up with a plan.
translations.chinese: 把他们俩带回来，我们就可以开始制定计划了。

translations.english: You'll also want to find Gunmar. Big brute of a Nord, hates vampires almost as much as I do.
translations.chinese: 你还得去找甘马尔，诺德蛮夫，跟我一样仇恨吸血鬼。

translations.english: Got it into his head years back that his experience with animals would help. Trolls in particular, from what I hear.
translations.chinese: 几年前他就想过他和动物相处的经验能派上用场，他尤其擅长训练巨魔。

translations.english: Last I knew he was out scouring Skyrim for more beasts to tame.
translations.chinese: 上次听说他在天际寻找更多的野兽来驯服。

- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Bring the two of them back here, and we can get started on coming up with a plan. | ZH: 把他们俩带回来，我们就可以开始制定计划了。 | SID: 0004DF

- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Got it into his head years back that his experience with animals would help. Trolls in particular, from what I hear. | ZH: 几年前他就想过他和动物相处的经验能派上用场，他尤其擅长训练巨魔。 | SID: 001111
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Last I knew he was out scouring Skyrim for more beasts to tame. | ZH: 上次听说他在天际寻找更多的野兽来驯服。 | SID: 0021AC

translations.english: I warned them. I knew something like this would happen eventually. But they didn't listen, and look where it's gotten them.
translations.chinese: 我警告过他们，我知道迟早会出这种事。但他们不听，看看他们的下场吧。

translations.english: This attack... it's unlike the vampires. Do we at least know what they were after, or is this completely a lost cause?
translations.chinese: 这种袭击……不像是吸血鬼。我们至少知道他们在找什么吗，还是说我们注定要失败？

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020076CF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I warned them. I knew something like this would happen eventually. But they didn't listen, and look where it's gotten them. | ZH: 我警告过他们，我知道迟早会出这种事。但他们不听，看看他们的下场吧。 | SID: 000BA5
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: This attack... it's unlike the vampires. Do we at least know what they were after, or is this completely a lost cause? | ZH: 这种袭击……不像是吸血鬼。我们至少知道他们在找什么吗，还是说我们注定要失败？ | SID: 001114

translations.english: Might need a little convincing, but she should.
translations.chinese: 可能要说服一下，但她会的。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020076D0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Might need a little convincing, but she should. | ZH: 可能要说服一下，但她会的。 | SID: 00055D

translations.english: We should keep it small. Too many people, and we'll draw unwanted attention to ourselves.
translations.chinese: 我们应该控制规模，太多人会引起不必要的注意。

translations.english: Last I knew, she was out in the Reach, convinced she was about to find the biggest dwarven ruins yet.
translations.chinese: 上次听说她去了瑞驰，坚信能找到迄今最大的矮人遗迹。

translations.english: I think we'll want Sorine Jurard. Breton girl, whip-smart and good with tinkering. Fascination with the Dwemer. Weapons in particular.
translations.chinese: 索琳·菊拉德是个好人选。伶牙俐齿的布莱顿姑娘，擅长修补。沉迷锻莫，尤其是武器。

translations.english: Right to the point, aren't you. I like that. Not like those fools in the order.
translations.chinese: 直入正题，是吧。我喜欢，不像教团里那些傻瓜。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020076D1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: We should keep it small. Too many people, and we'll draw unwanted attention to ourselves. | ZH: 我们应该控制规模，太多人会引起不必要的注意。 | SID: 00096F
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Last I knew, she was out in the Reach, convinced she was about to find the biggest dwarven ruins yet. | ZH: 上次听说她去了瑞驰，坚信能找到迄今最大的矮人遗迹。 | SID: 000A1E
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: I think we'll want Sorine Jurard. Breton girl, whip-smart and good with tinkering. Fascination with the Dwemer. Weapons in particular. | ZH: 索琳·菊拉德是个好人选。伶牙俐齿的布莱顿姑娘，擅长修补。沉迷锻莫，尤其是武器。 | SID: 000ACD
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Right to the point, aren't you. I like that. Not like those fools in the order. | ZH: 直入正题，是吧。我喜欢，不像教团里那些傻瓜。 | SID: 0011CD

translations.english: How dare you! I gave up everything I cared about to protect you from that fanatic you call a father!
translations.chinese: 你怎么能这么说！我放弃了一切在乎的东西，就是为了保护你，不被你那个发狂的父亲伤害！

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020076E3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: How dare you! I gave up everything I cared about to protect you from that fanatic you call a father! | ZH: 你怎么能这么说！我放弃了一切在乎的东西，就是为了保护你，不被你那个发狂的父亲伤害！ | SID: 00036A

translations.english: This "stranger" has done more for me in the brief time I've known him than you've done in centuries!
translations.chinese: 这个“陌生人”在我认识他的短短时间里为我做的比你几个世纪以来做的还要多！

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020076E5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This "stranger" has done more for me in the brief time I've known him than you've done in centuries! | ZH: 这个“陌生人”在我认识他的短短时间里为我做的比你几个世纪以来做的还要多！ | SID: 000F4B

translations.english: This stranger aligns himself with those that would hunt you down and slay you like an animal, yet I should entrust you to him?
translations.chinese: 这个陌生人和那些把你当成野兽一样追捕猎杀的人站在一边，我却还要把你托付给他？

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020076E6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This stranger aligns himself with those that would hunt you down and slay you like an animal, yet I should entrust you to him? | ZH: 这个陌生人和那些把你当成野兽一样追捕猎杀的人站在一边，我却还要把你托付给他？ | SID: 000F85

translations.english: The Ideal Masters have charged him with overseeing the Keepers, and will undoubtedly intervene if you're perceived as a threat.
translations.chinese: 理想之主委任他来监管看守者们，如果你被视为威胁，他肯定会介入。

translations.english: One more word of warning. There's a dragon that calls itself Durnehviir roaming the Cairn. Be wary of him.
translations.chinese: 我还有一句警告。石冢中游荡着一条龙，自称杜耐维尔，小心。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: One more word of warning. There's a dragon that calls itself Durnehviir roaming the Cairn. Be wary of him. | ZH: 我还有一句警告。石冢中游荡着一条龙，自称杜耐维尔，小心。 | SID: 000A32

translations.english: Destroy the Keepers that are tending them, and it should bring the barrier down.
translations.chinese: 消灭守卫它们的看守者，应该就能破坏屏障。

translations.english: At their bases, the barrier's energy is being drawn from unfortunate souls that have been exiled here.
translations.chinese: 屏障的能量源自那些被放逐至此的不幸灵魂。

translations.english: You need to locate the tallest of the rocky spires that surround these ruins.
translations.chinese: 去找废墟周围最高的石塔。

translations.english: The moment your father discovers your role in the prophecy, that he needs your blood, you'd be in terrible danger.

translations.chinese: 你们俩都执迷于自己的路，你的动机或许不同，但最终，我对你来说也只是个棋子罢了。

translations.english: You never asked me if hiding me in that tomb was the best course of action, you just expected me to follow you blindly.
translations.chinese: 你从没问过我，把我藏在坟墓里是不是最好的选择，只希望我盲目地跟着你。

translations.english: The Jarl's in danger. A vampire plays as a visiting "advisor" to the court. Destroy it before it's able to complete its foul business.
translations.chinese: 领主有危险。有个吸血鬼假扮成来访的“顾问”。在他干出什么脏事前杀了他。

translations.english: But be warned. The Jarl's guards are unaware of the threat, and will treat violence against this "advisor" as a crime.
translations.chinese: 但请注意，领主的卫兵们没有意识到威胁，还会把针对“顾问”的暴力行为视为犯罪。

translations.english: Convince the Jarl of the threat and he'll let you destroy the creature. If not, then do your best not to get caught.
translations.chinese: 说服领主相信这个威胁，他就会让你除掉那玩意儿。不然的话，就尽量不要被抓住。

translations.english: Quickly now! The longer you delay, the more danger the Jarl is in.
translations.chinese: 快！你去拖得越久，领主就越危险。

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Focus on the dragon! | ZH: 注意看这条龙！ | SID: 000F8F

translations.english: If you want that scroll, the barrier needs to come down.
translations.chinese: 你想要卷轴的话，就得先推倒屏障。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008405]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If you want that scroll, the barrier needs to come down. | ZH: 你想要卷轴的话，就得先推倒屏障。 | SID: 000487

translations.english: You must understand that he's no longer the man I married all that time ago.
translations.chinese: 你得明白，他已经不是我很久之前嫁的那个人了。

translations.english: He's obsessed... insane. Everyone around him fears him as they would a rabid dog.
translations.chinese: 他早已……走火入魔。他就像疯狗一样，周围人都避之不及。

translations.english: For all of this to end, he must die.
translations.chinese: 要给这一切画上句号，他必须死。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008406]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: You must understand that he's no longer the man I married all that time ago. | ZH: 你得明白，他已经不是我很久之前嫁的那个人了。 | SID: 000AAE
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: He's obsessed... insane. Everyone around him fears him as they would a rabid dog. | ZH: 他早已……走火入魔。他就像疯狗一样，周围人都避之不及。 | SID: 001161
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: For all of this to end, he must die. | ZH: 要给这一切画上句号，他必须死。 | SID: 001196

translations.english: Still, if he sent you to find me, it may actually be pretty bad.
translations.chinese: 尽管如此，他都派你来找我了，说明可能非常严重了。

translations.english: In case you haven't noticed, Isran is always concerned about something. That's what got us working together in the first place.
translations.chinese: 你没注意到的话，伊士冉一直都在担心某些事情。这就是为什么我们当初会合作。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200846E]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: In case you haven't noticed, Isran is always concerned about something. That's what got us working together in the first place. | ZH: 你没注意到的话，伊士冉一直都在担心某些事情。这就是为什么我们当初会合作。 | SID: 0007B0

translations.english: I... Well, that's actually something I never would've anticipated. Interesting.
translations.chinese: 我……嗯，这倒是我从没想到的，有趣。

translations.english: I'm not sure what they would do with one, but in this case Isran is probably correct in thinking it isn't good.
translations.chinese: 我不确定他们会用它来干什么，但这种情况下，伊士冉认为局势不妙应该是对的。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200846F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I... Well, that's actually something I never would've anticipated. Interesting. | ZH: 我……嗯，这倒是我从没想到的，有趣。 | SID: 000349
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I'm not sure what they would do with one, but in this case Isran is probably correct in thinking it isn't good. | ZH: 我不确定他们会用它来干什么，但这种情况下，伊士冉认为局势不妙应该是对的。 | SID: 000686

translations.english: Well, what are they up to?
Oh, and I suppose now he remembers that I proposed no less than three different scenarios that involved vampires overrunning the population.
translations.chinese: 哦，我猜现在他想起来了我提出了至少三个与吸血鬼肆虐人间有关的设想。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008470]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Well, what are they up to? | ZH: 好吧，他们要干嘛？ | SID: 000705
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Vampires? Really? | ZH: 吸血鬼？真的？ | SID: 000DD5
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Oh, and I suppose now he remembers that I proposed no less than three different scenarios that involved vampires overrunning the population. | ZH: 哦，我猜现在他想起来了我提出了至少三个与吸血鬼肆虐人间有关的设想。 | SID: 000F9E

translations.english: All right, look. I'll consider it, but I can't just leave this bear to prey on more innocent people.
translations.chinese: 好吧，听着。我会考虑，但不能放这头熊去猎杀更多无辜之人。

translations.english: Once it's dealt with, then perhaps I'll see what Isran expects of me.
translations.chinese: 等这里的事解决，也许我会去看看伊士冉有什么打算。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008471]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: By the Eight... | ZH: 八圣灵啊…… | SID: 000662
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: All right, look. I'll consider it, but I can't just leave this bear to prey on more innocent people. | ZH: 好吧，听着。我会考虑，但不能放这头熊去猎杀更多无辜之人。 | SID: 000D19
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Once it's dealt with, then perhaps I'll see what Isran expects of me. | ZH: 等这里的事解决，也许我会去看看伊士冉有什么打算。 | SID: 000F60

translations.english: Yes, that was my point. I felt it was rather clear.
translations.chinese: 对，就是这个意思。我觉得说得很清楚了。

translations.english: Look, what is it you want from me?

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008472]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Yes, that was my point. I felt it was rather clear. | ZH: 对，就是这个意思。我觉得说得很清楚了。 | SID: 000521
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Look, what is it you want from me? | ZH: 说吧，要我干什么？ | SID: 0005E1

translations.english: That... well, that might change things.
translations.chinese: 那……好吧，那可能就不一样了。

translations.english: Tell me more about what's going on.

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008473]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: That... well, that might change things. | ZH: 那……好吧，那可能就不一样了。 | SID: 000362
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Vampires? | ZH: 吸血鬼？ | SID: 000C8E
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Tell me more about what's going on. | ZH: 告诉我出了什么事。 | SID: 001167

translations.english: I find it hard to believe he's changed his mind. He said some very hurtful things to me before I left.
translations.chinese: 很难相信他会改变主意。我离开前他说了些很伤人的话。

translations.english: Anyway, I'm quite happy in my current pursuits. So if you'll excuse me...
translations.chinese: 无论如何，我对现在的事业很满意。所以你不介意的话……

translations.english: No, you must be mistaken. He made it exceedingly clear the last time we spoke that he had no interest in my help.
translations.chinese: 不，你肯定搞错了。上次我们谈话时他非常明确地表示，对我的帮助不感兴趣。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008474]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Isran? Wants me? | ZH: 伊士冉？找我？ | SID: 000B54
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: I find it hard to believe he's changed his mind. He said some very hurtful things to me before I left. | ZH: 很难相信他会改变主意。我离开前他说了些很伤人的话。 | SID: 000E5F
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Anyway, I'm quite happy in my current pursuits. So if you'll excuse me... | ZH: 无论如何，我对现在的事业很满意。所以你不介意的话…… | SID: 001087
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: No, you must be mistaken. He made it exceedingly clear the last time we spoke that he had no interest in my help. | ZH: 不，你肯定搞错了。上次我们谈话时他非常明确地表示，对我的帮助不感兴趣。 | SID: 00117B

translations.english: I'm afraid he's a few years too late. I've moved on. I have more important business to attend to.
translations.chinese: 恐怕他这话晚了几年。我已经向前看了，还有更重要的事情要做。

translations.english: Besides, he can handle anything alone! He assured me so himself. What could he possibly need my help with?
translations.chinese: 再说了，他一个人什么都能搞定！他亲口跟我保证过，还需要我来帮什么忙？

translations.english: Isran? Needing someone else's help? Never thought I'd hear that.
translations.chinese: 伊士冉？需要我的帮助？没想到我会听到这话。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008475]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I'm afraid he's a few years too late. I've moved on. I have more important business to attend to. | ZH: 恐怕他这话晚了几年。我已经向前看了，还有更重要的事情要做。 | SID: 0002A3
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Besides, he can handle anything alone! He assured me so himself. What could he possibly need my help with? | ZH: 再说了，他一个人什么都能搞定！他亲口跟我保证过，还需要我来帮什么忙？ | SID: 000496
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Isran? Needing someone else's help? Never thought I'd hear that. | ZH: 伊士冉？需要我的帮助？没想到我会听到这话。 | SID: 000743

translations.english: Do you think mudcrabs might've taken it? I saw one the other day... Wouldn't be surprised if it followed me here.
translations.chinese: 你觉得会不会是已经被泥沼蟹给拿了？前几天看到过一只……要是跟着我来了也不奇怪。

translations.english: You haven't seen a sack full of dwarven gyros lying around, have you? I'd swear I left it right here.
translations.chinese: 你看到放在附近的满满一袋矮人陀螺仪了吗？我发誓我刚刚就放在这儿的。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008476]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Do you think mudcrabs might've taken it? I saw one the other day... Wouldn't be surprised if it followed me here. | ZH: 你觉得会不会是已经被泥沼蟹给拿了？前几天看到过一只……要是跟着我来了也不奇怪。 | SID: 000AE1
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Just look around, will you? | ZH: 找找周围，好吗？ | SID: 000CCA
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: You haven't seen a sack full of dwarven gyros lying around, have you? I'd swear I left it right here. | ZH: 你看到放在附近的满满一袋矮人陀螺仪了吗？我发誓我刚刚就放在这儿的。 | SID: 000F33

translations.english: I've tracked this damned bear for two weeks; I'll not let it have any more victims.
translations.chinese: 我已经跟踪这头该死的熊两周了，不能再让它伤人了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008477]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You there, hold fast! | ZH: 那边的，等等！ | SID: 00020B
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I've tracked this damned bear for two weeks; I'll not let it have any more victims. | ZH: 我已经跟踪这头该死的熊两周了，不能再让它伤人了。 | SID: 00116D

translations.english: I'll finish up here and head in that direction soon as I can. See you there.
translations.chinese: 我会把这里的事忙完然后尽快去那边。到时候见。

translations.english: Ah. Been working more on his secret hideout, has he? It'll be interesting to see how much progress he's made.
translations.chinese: 啊，他还在他的秘密藏身处忙活，对吧？看看他取得了什么成果会有趣的。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008479]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I'll finish up here and head in that direction soon as I can. See you there. | ZH: 我会把这里的事忙完然后尽快去那边。到时候见。 | SID: 00037A
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Ah. Been working more on his secret hideout, has he? It'll be interesting to see how much progress he's made. | ZH: 啊，他还在他的秘密藏身处忙活，对吧？看看他取得了什么成果会有趣的。 | SID: 0009A7

translations.english: So either I need to find the satchel those mudcrabs stole, or I need another gyro from someplace. You wouldn't happen to have one, would you?
translations.chinese: 所以，要么我得找到被那些泥沼蟹偷走的包，要么需要从别的地方另找一个陀螺仪。你不会正好有一个吧？

translations.english: But I'm not just going to abandon what I've been working on here. It's too useful. I need at least one intact dwarven gyro.
translations.chinese: 但我不能直接放弃在这里干的活儿，它们很有用。我至少得有一个完整的矮人陀螺仪。

translations.english: All right. If nothing else, I suppose it wouldn't hurt to learn more about what's going on so I can better defend myself.
translations.chinese: 好吧，没别的话，多了解一下发生了什么也无妨，这样我才能更好的保护自己。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200847A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: So either I need to find the satchel those mudcrabs stole, or I need another gyro from someplace. You wouldn't happen to have one, would you? | ZH: 所以，要么我得找到被那些泥沼蟹偷走的包，要么需要从别的地方另找一个陀螺仪。你不会正好有一个吧？ | SID: 0004BA
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: But I'm not just going to abandon what I've been working on here. It's too useful. I need at least one intact dwarven gyro. | ZH: 但我不能直接放弃在这里干的活儿，它们很有用。我至少得有一个完整的矮人陀螺仪。 | SID: 000BC9
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: All right. If nothing else, I suppose it wouldn't hurt to learn more about what's going on so I can better defend myself. | ZH: 好吧，没别的话，多了解一下发生了什么也无妨，这样我才能更好的保护自己。 | SID: 00116F

translations.english: It seems our work is not yet done. But I have waited this long, and we are so very close now. I can wait a bit longer.
translations.chinese: 看来我们的任务还没完成呢。但都等了这么久，我还能再等一会儿。

translations.english: My traitor wife stole one of them away and then disappeared.
translations.chinese: 我那叛徒妻子偷了一幅然后失踪了。

translations.english: As for the other, the last that I heard, it was lost in the bowels of a Dwemer ruin.
translations.chinese: 至于另一幅，我最后听说是消失在了锻莫遗迹深处。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008858]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: It seems our work is not yet done. But I have waited this long, and we are so very close now. I can wait a bit longer. | ZH: 看来我们的任务还没完成呢。但都等了这么久，我还能再等一会儿。 | SID: 000583
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: My traitor wife stole one of them away and then disappeared. | ZH: 我那叛徒妻子偷了一幅然后失踪了。 | SID: 000C13
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: As for the other, the last that I heard, it was lost in the bowels of a Dwemer ruin. | ZH: 至于另一幅，我最后听说是消失在了锻莫遗迹深处。 | SID: 00118F

translations.english: Master, I have done as you asked and traveled here.
translations.chinese: 主人，我已经照您说的做了来到这里了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008859]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Master, I have done as you asked and traveled here. | ZH: 主人，我已经照您说的做了来到这里了。 | SID: 001191

translations.english: Well, your thrall awaits and we have given him the Elder Scroll. Command him to read it, and let us hear the words of prophecy together.
translations.chinese: 好了，你的奴隶在等我们，上古卷轴已经给他了。去命令他阅读卷轴，我们来一起听听预言说了什么。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200885F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well, your thrall awaits and we have given him the Elder Scroll. Command him to read it, and let us hear the words of prophecy together. | ZH: 好了，你的奴隶在等我们，上古卷轴已经给他了。去命令他阅读卷轴，我们来一起听听预言说了什么。 | SID: 000664

translations.english: Yes, I see that. I trust his capture was not too difficult a task?
translations.chinese: 嗯，我知道了。相信抓他不太难吧？

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008861]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, I see that. I trust his capture was not too difficult a task? | ZH: 嗯，我知道了。相信抓他不太难吧？ | SID: 000273

Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008862]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Of course, master. | ZH: 当然了，主人。 | SID: 00057C

translations.english: Ah, yes, the Elder Scroll! I admit, I'm looking forward to this.
translations.chinese: 啊是的，上古卷轴！我承认我很期待。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008863]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ah, yes, the Elder Scroll! I admit, I'm looking forward to this. | ZH: 啊是的，上古卷轴！我承认我很期待。 | SID: 000C1E

translations.english: Of course. What is it that you need me to do?

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008864]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Of course. What is it that you need me to do? | ZH: 当然，您需要我做什么？ | SID: 0005AD

Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008865]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ah, you are here. Good. | ZH: 啊，你在这里。很好。 | SID: 000900

translations.english: Well done! Somehow I knew it would be you and Serana who found our moth priest.
translations.chinese: 干得漂亮！我就知道你和瑟拉娜会找到我们的蛾祭司。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008866]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well done! Somehow I knew it would be you and Serana who found our moth priest. | ZH: 干得漂亮！我就知道你和瑟拉娜会找到我们的蛾祭司。 | SID: 0008D1

Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008867]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What is your command? | ZH: 你的命令是什么？ | SID: 0010C4

translations.english: That was... not as useful as I would have liked. Even so, you did well.
translations.chinese: 这……没我想得那么有用。即便如此，你干得不错。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008868]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That was... not as useful as I would have liked. Even so, you did well. | ZH: 这……没我想得那么有用。即便如此，你干得不错。 | SID: 000F64

translations.english: What are you waiting for? Get out there and find a moth priest!
translations.chinese: 你还磨蹭什么呢？出去找蛾祭司去！

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008869]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What are you waiting for? Get out there and find a moth priest! | ZH: 你还磨蹭什么呢？出去找蛾祭司去！ | SID: 0010C5

translations.english: I think my father wanted to see you. Have you talked to him yet?
translations.chinese: 我想我父亲想见你。你跟他谈了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200886A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I think my father wanted to see you. Have you talked to him yet? | ZH: 我想我父亲想见你。你跟他谈了吗？ | SID: 001216

Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020088E0]
Translations:
- REFR:FULL | EN: Forgotten Vale | ZH: 遗忘山谷 | SID: 00037F

translations.english: His own little fortress. Well, I guess I'll get to see what he's been up to all this time.
translations.chinese: 他自己的小堡垒。好吧，我看可以去看看他这些日子到底在忙些什么。

translations.english: He's been working on that place for years now. Never lets anyone in.
translations.chinese: 他在那里忙了很多年了，从不放任何人进去。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020088F4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: His own little fortress. Well, I guess I'll get to see what he's been up to all this time. | ZH: 他自己的小堡垒。好吧，我看可以去看看他这些日子到底在忙些什么。 | SID: 000F17
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: He's been working on that place for years now. Never lets anyone in. | ZH: 他在那里忙了很多年了，从不放任何人进去。 | SID: 001192
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I'll meet you there. | ZH: 我在那儿等你。 | SID: 001197

translations.english: If Isran is anything, he's stubborn.
translations.chinese: 要说伊士冉有什么了不起的，那就是他很固执。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020088F5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If Isran is anything, he's stubborn. | ZH: 要说伊士冉有什么了不起的，那就是他很固执。 | SID: 000531

Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020088F6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Of course he did. | ZH: 当然了。 | SID: 000B37

translations.english: You've helped me, so I suppose the least I can do is find out what Isran wants. He's still at that fort near Stendarr's Beacon, I assume?
translations.chinese: 你帮了我，我想至少要搞清楚伊士冉想做什么。他还在斯丹达尔的烽火台附近的那个堡垒，对吧？

translations.english: Don't know how well I'd have managed by myself. You have my thanks.
translations.chinese: 我一个人不知道会干成啥样，多谢你了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020088F7]
Translations:

translations.english: Watch yourself. This bear is vicious.

translations.english: We need to stop this creature before it kills again.
translations.chinese: 我们得在这头畜生再造杀孽前阻止它。

agentText:

EDID: [020088F9]

translations.english: What's that? No, that's not what I... Yes, but... Are you sure? Really?
translations.chinese: 什么？不，我不是那……对，但是……你确定？真的？

translations.english: Look, I've just gotten myself out of quite a mess here, in case you haven't noticed, and while I appreciate your help, I...
translations.chinese: 听着，你看我刚刚才摆脱了这堆烂摊子，虽然感谢你的帮助，但我……

translations.english: Fine. Arkay says it's a good idea for me to go. I don't agree, but he's not the sort of fellow you can just ignore.
translations.chinese: 好吧。阿尔凯说我最好还是去。我再不同意，也不能无视他的旨意。

translations.english: I'll see you at Fort Dawnguard, then. Don't worry, Arkay will show me the way.
translations.chinese: 黎明守卫堡垒再会。别担心，阿尔凯会给我指路。

translations.english: Isran's done nothing but mock me. He's never given me the respect I deserve.
translations.chinese: 伊士冉就会嘲笑我。从来没给我应有的尊重。

translations.english: Is this... some kind of a joke? Did Arkay put you up to this?
translations.chinese: 这是……在讲笑话吗？阿尔凯让你这么干的？

agentText:

translations.english: I suppose I could... what, praytell, is there?
translations.chinese: 我想可以……什么，再说一下，哪里？

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008A7D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I suppose I could... what, praytell, is there? | ZH: 我想可以……什么，再说一下，哪里？ | SID: 0006E8

translations.english: I'm sure I'll manage to repay him later, but you... What can I do to thank you?
translations.chinese: 我相信以后会偿还他的，但你……我该怎么感谢你呢？

translations.english: I knew it! I knew Arkay would save me. I asked for help, and he sent you!
translations.chinese: 我就知道！我知道阿尔凯会救我的。我请求帮助，他就派你来了！

translations.english: You are a very welcome addition to this dreary place, my friend. I owe both you and Arkay a great deal.
translations.chinese: 热烈欢迎你来到这个沉闷的地方，我的朋友。我欠你和阿尔凯太多了。

agentText:

translations.english: This is all well and good, but do we actually know anything about what they're doing? What do we do now?
translations.chinese: 说的是没毛病，但我们真的了解他们的企图吗？现在要怎么行动？

translations.english: All right Isran, you've got us all here. Now what do you want?
translations.chinese: 好了，伊士冉，我们都来了。你打算做什么？

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008A81]
Translations:

translations.english: If anyone is going to stand in their way, it's going to be us.
translations.chinese: 如果说还有人能阻止他们，那也只能是我们了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008A82]

translations.english: And they have an Elder Scroll.
translations.chinese: 而且他们还有一幅上古卷轴。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02008A83]

translations.english: I'm sure you've heard a bit of what we're up against. Powerful vampires, unlike anything we've seen before.
translations.chinese: 相信你们对我们面临的挑战有所耳闻了。强大的吸血鬼，与以往我们见过的完全不同。

agentText:

translations.english: Do you know where he's staying now?
translations.chinese: 你知道他现在住在哪里吗？

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020098B3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Do you know where he's staying now? | ZH: 你知道他现在住在哪里吗？ | SID: 00174C

translations.english: Why, because of that story about the prophecy? About some vampire trying to put the sun out?
translations.chinese: 就因为这个故事跟预言有关？跟什么吸血鬼要灭了太阳有关？

translations.english: Do you actually believe any of that?
translations.chinese: 你真的相信那些鬼话吗？

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Do you actually believe any of that? | ZH: 你真的相信那些鬼话吗？ | SID: 0009B2

translations.english: Some Imperial scholar arrived in Skyrim a few days ago. I was staking out the road when I saw him pass by. Maybe that's your Moth Priest.
translations.chinese: 几天前有一些帝国学者到天际来了。他路过的时候，我正用木桩标路。也许那就是你们要找的蛾祭司。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: Well, let's move then. I'm nothing if not persuasive.
translations.chinese: 嗯，那让我们继续吧。如果没什么说服力的话，我的努力就白费了。

translations.english: Not that it helps us anyway, because they're all half a continent away in Cyrodiil.
translations.chinese: 不过这也帮不上什么忙，他们都在希罗帝尔，隔着半个大陆呢。

translations.english: Well, the Moth Priests are the only ones I've heard of who can do it. They spend years preparing before they start reading, though.
translations.chinese: 嗯，我只听说过蛾祭司能办得到。不过在开始阅读之前，他们会花上几年的时间来准备。

translations.chinese: 不过当然了，我们谁都没法读。

translations.english: So, in case you didn't notice the giant thing on my back, I have the Elder Scroll with me.
translations.chinese: 另外，如果你还没注意到我背的东西，这就是上古卷轴。

translations.english: Whatever it says, it will have something that can help us stop my father.
translations.chinese: 不管那上面写了什么，它都能帮我们阻止我父亲。

translations.english: That's what he's after. He wants to control the sun, have vampires control the world.
translations.chinese: 那就是他想要的。他想控制太阳，让吸血鬼控制世界。

translations.english: It's pointless and vague, like all prophecies. The part he latched onto said that vampires would no longer need to fear the sun.
translations.chinese: 跟所有预言一样，它毫无意义又含糊不清。他死抓不放的那部分说，吸血鬼再也不用害怕太阳了。

translations.chinese: 你一定已经猜到了，我父亲不是什么好人。就算以吸血鬼的角度来讲也一样。

translations.english: It all comes back to my father.
He wasn't always like that, though. There was... a turn. He stumbled onto this obscure prophecy and just kind of lost himself in it.
translations.chinese: 不过，他并非一直如此。他……变了。他无意中发现了一个模糊的预言，然后有点把自己陷进去了。

translations.english: Thank you for your kindness. I'll remember it the next time I'm feeling hungry.
translations.chinese: 谢谢你的好意。下次我觉得饿的时候，我会想着的。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020098BB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Thank you for your kindness. I'll remember it the next time I'm feeling hungry. | ZH: 谢谢你的好意。下次我觉得饿的时候，我会想着的。 | SID: 00113F

translations.english: You hear me? Don't feel like a guest, because you're not. You're a resource. You're an asset.
translations.chinese: 听清了吗？别拿自己当客人，你不是。你是资源。是财产。

translations.english: In the meantime, don't make me regret my sudden outburst of tolerance and generosity, because if you do, your friend here is going to pay for it.
translations.chinese: 还有，别让我后悔突然对你这么仁慈，不然的话，你的朋友就得跟着倒霉了。
