translations.english: I'd rather not be here either, but I needed to talk to you.
translations.chinese: 我也不想在这里呆着，不过我得跟你谈谈。

translations.english: It's... well, it's about me. And the Elder Scroll that was buried with me.
translations.chinese: 是……嗯，是关于我，还有跟我一起埋起来的上古卷轴的事情。

translations.english: It's important, so please just listen before your friend, here, loses his patience.
translations.chinese: 这很重要，所以在你那位朋友觉得不耐烦之前，好好听着。

translations.english: No, and I'm not going to waste men looking. We're fighting a war against your kind, and I intend to win it.
translations.chinese: 不知道，而且我可不想浪费时间找人。我们正在和你的同类们作战，而且还要赢。

translations.english: You want to find him, try talking to anyone who'd meet a traveler. Innkeepers and carriage drivers in the big cities maybe. But you're on your own.
translations.chinese: 如果你想找他，试试去跟见过他的旅行者聊聊。也许旅店老板或者马车夫知道他在哪儿。不过你们得自己去问了。

translations.chinese: 它可以暂时待在这里，但只要它胆敢碰谁一根汗毛，就拿你是问。懂了？

translations.chinese: 等等。如果你要下楼，收好自己的武器，不然我们就得深入交流一下了。

translations.english: Head on in and behave yourself.

translations.english: I have found such a soul and the stars appear cooperative.
translations.chinese: 我找到了一个这样的灵魂，星象也正合意。

translations.english: Return to me when your part is done.
translations.chinese: 完成你的任务后就回来找我。

translations.english: When you offer the embrace, do so away from prying eyes. Our new sibling will then likely require rest while his blood undergoes the change.
translations.chinese: 当你给予拥抱时，要远离窥视的目光。我们新的兄弟在血液变化时可能需要休息。

translations.english: Return to me when your part is done.
translations.chinese: 完成你的任务后就回来找我。

translations.english: When you offer the embrace, do so away from prying eyes. Our new sibling will then likely require rest while her blood undergoes the change.
translations.chinese: 当你给予拥抱时，要远离窥视的目光。我们新的姐妹在血液变化时可能需要休息。

translations.english: I've found a new candidate, ripe for Harkon's Gift. I'm sending you to welcome this soul into our family.
translations.chinese: 我找到了一个适合接受哈孔礼物的新人选。就由你去欢迎这个灵魂加入我们。

translations.english: Well, well. He wants the Chalice, then.
translations.chinese: 好吧好吧。看来，他想要圣杯了。

translations.english: You've heard of the Bloodstone Chalice?

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: This structure is known as a wayshrine. They were used for meditation and for transport when the Chantry was a place of enlightenment.
translations.chinese: 这种结构被称为路龛。当神殿还是启蒙之地时，它们被用于冥想和运输。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This structure is known as a wayshrine. They were used for meditation and for transport when the Chantry was a place of enlightenment. | ZH: 这种结构被称为路龛。当神殿还是启蒙之地时，它们被用于冥想和运输。 | SID: 000871

translations.english: Leaving the wayshrines unguarded would be violating my sacred duty as a Knight-Paladin of Auriel.
translations.chinese: 让路龛无人看守会违背我作为奥瑞-艾尔圣骑士的神圣职责。

translations.english: And an assault on the Betrayed guarding the Inner Sanctum would only end with my death.
translations.chinese: 而袭击把守内殿的背叛者只会以我的死亡而告终。

translations.english: For the thousands of years I've served as the Chantry's sentinel, there hasn't been a single visitor here for any other reason.
translations.chinese: 我守卫了神殿几千年了，没有一个人是因为其他原因来这里的。

translations.english: They request Auriel's Bow, and I request their assistance. It's been repeated so many times, I can't imagine it any other way.
translations.chinese: 他们需要奥瑞艾尔之弓，我需要他们的帮助。这么多次的重复让我难以想象还有别的可能。

translations.chinese: 有什么问题吗？我等着你开口呢。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200A860]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Questions? I expected as much. | ZH: 有什么问题吗？我等着你开口呢。 | SID: 000F4D

translations.english: You've nothing to fear from me. Please, we have much to discuss.
translations.chinese: 你不用怕我。拜托了，我们有很多事要谈。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200A861]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You've nothing to fear from me. Please, we have much to discuss. | ZH: 你不用怕我。拜托了，我们有很多事要谈。 | SID: 000D3C

translations.english: This may be the last time we're able to converse. If you have any questions before you leave, I suggest you ask them.
translations.chinese: 这可能是我们最后一次谈话了，离开前还有什么问题，建议尽快讲。

translations.english: Otherwise, all I can do now is grant you my hopes for a safe journey.
translations.chinese: 否则，我就只能希望你旅途平安了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Otherwise, all I can do now is grant you my hopes for a safe journey. | ZH: 否则，我就只能希望你旅途平安了。 | SID: 00127C

translations.english: But something's wrong. He never looks as though he's in pain or under duress. He just... stands there and watches, as though waiting.
translations.chinese: 但是有些不对劲，他看上去不像是痛苦或受到胁迫。他只是……站在那里看着，就像在等待。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: He's alive. I've seen him. | ZH: 他活着，我见过他。 | SID: 0006F8

translations.english: They will allow you to draw the waters from the shrine's basin as if you've been enlightened.
translations.chinese: 他们会让你从路龛的水池里取水，就像得到启蒙一样。

translations.english: Once you've located a wayshrine, there will be a spectral Prelate tending to it.
translations.chinese: 每次你找到了路龛，会发现有一位幽灵教士照看它。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Once you've located a wayshrine, there will be a spectral Prelate tending to it. | ZH: 每次你找到了路龛，会发现有一位幽灵教士照看它。 | SID: 000AB0

translations.english: I know how it all sounds, but if there was another way I'd have done it long ago.
translations.chinese: 我知道听来很奇怪，但要是有别的办法，我早就那么做了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200A869]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I know how it all sounds, but if there was another way I'd have done it long ago. | ZH: 我知道听来很奇怪，但要是有别的办法，我早就那么做了。 | SID: 0006D6

translations.english: The Chantry was a place of peaceful worship. I led a small group of paladins, but we were no match for the Betrayed's sheer numbers.
translations.chinese: 神殿是一个平静的礼拜场所，我手里只有一小队圣骑士，所以不是背叛者的对手。

translations.english: They slaughtered everyone and stormed the Inner Sanctum where I believe they corrupted Vyrthur.
translations.chinese: 他们屠杀了所有人，冲进了内殿。我认为维苏尔就是在那里被他们腐化了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: I prefer snow elf. The name "Falmer" usually holds a negative meaning to most travelers.
translations.chinese: 我更喜欢雪精灵这个称呼，“伐莫”这个名字对大多数旅人通常都有负面含义。

translations.english: Those twisted creatures you call Falmer, I call the Betrayed.
translations.chinese: 那些你们叫伐莫的扭曲生物，我称之为背叛者。

agentText:

translations.english: But before I send you on your way, you'll need the Initiate's Ewer.
translations.chinese: 在我送你离开前，你需要新人之壶。

translations.english: Caves? Oh, no. The Chantry encompasses far more than a few caves, as you'll soon discover.
translations.chinese: 洞穴？哦不。神殿包括的远不止几个洞穴，你很快就知道了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: Pouring the contents of the ewer into the sacred basin of the Sanctum would allow him to enter for an audience with the Arch-Curate himself.
translations.chinese: 把水壶里的水倒进圣堂的盆中，就可以进去见教士长了。

translations.english: Well, once the Initiate's enlightenment was complete, he'd bring the ewer to the Chantry's Inner Sanctum.
translations.chinese: 一旦启蒙完成，新人会把水壶带到神殿的内殿。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Well, once the Initiate's enlightenment was complete, he'd bring the ewer to the Chantry's Inner Sanctum. | ZH: 一旦启蒙完成，新人会把水壶带到神殿的内殿。 | SID: 00128B

translations.english: Absolutely. You could turn around and travel back from wherever you started empty handed, or you could assist me.
translations.chinese: 当然了，你也可以从哪儿来回哪儿去，空手而归。不然，就只能帮我。

translations.english: There are five in total, spread far apart across the Chantry.
translations.chinese: 总计五个，分散在神殿各处。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200A86F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: There are five in total, spread far apart across the Chantry. | ZH: 总计五个，分散在神殿各处。 | SID: 000B47

translations.english: Once the Initiate completed his mantras, he'd dip a ceremonial ewer in the basin at the wayshrine's center and proceed to the next wayshrine.
translations.chinese: 当新人念完了咒语后，会把一只仪式用的水壶浸泡在路龛中心的盆里，然后前往下个路龛。

agentText:

translations.english: I need you to kill Arch-Curate Vyrthur... my brother.
translations.chinese: 我需要你去杀了教士长维苏尔……我的兄弟。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200A871]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I need you to kill Arch-Curate Vyrthur... my brother. | ZH: 我需要你去杀了教士长维苏尔……我的兄弟。 | SID: 0021F6

translations.english: Auriel, Auri-El, Alkosh, Akatosh... so many different names for the sovereign of the snow elves.
translations.chinese: 奥瑞艾尔，奥瑞-艾尔，阿尔科什，阿卡托什……雪精灵的至高神有这么多不同的名讳。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200A872]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Auriel, Auri-El, Alkosh, Akatosh... so many different names for the sovereign of the snow elves. | ZH: 奥瑞艾尔，奥瑞-艾尔，阿尔科什，阿卡托什……雪精灵的至高神有这么多不同的名讳。 | SID: 00024A

translations.english: Prelates of these shrines were charged with teaching the mantras of Auri-El to our Initiates.
translations.chinese: 这些路龛的高级教士负责向我们的新人传授奥瑞-艾尔的咒语。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200A874]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Prelates of these shrines were charged with teaching the mantras of Auri-El to our Initiates. | ZH: 这些路龛的高级教士负责向我们的新人传授奥瑞-艾尔的咒语。 | SID: 000819

translations.english: The kinship between us is gone. I don't understand what he's become, but he's no longer the brother I once knew.
translations.chinese: 我们之间没有亲缘关系了。我不明白他变成了什么样，但他不再是我曾经认识的那个兄弟了。

translations.english: It was the Betrayed... they did something to him, I just don't know why Auri-El would allow this to happen.
translations.chinese: 是背叛者们造成的……他们对他做了些什么，我只是不明白为什么奥瑞-艾尔会允许这种事情发生。

translations.english: I am Knight-Paladin Gelebor. Welcome to the Great Chantry of Auri-El.
translations.chinese: 我是圣骑士盖勒布。欢迎来到奥瑞-艾尔的伟大神殿。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200A876]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I am Knight-Paladin Gelebor. Welcome to the Great Chantry of Auri-El. | ZH: 我是圣骑士盖勒布。欢迎来到奥瑞-艾尔的伟大神殿。 | SID: 0008C0

translations.english: Still, its liquid is powerful, full of magic. Others have noticed, though they have never fully realized its potential.
translations.chinese: 尽管如此，它的力量依然

translations.english: An ancient font, full of power. As much as it looks like blood, sadly it is not. Can you imagine if it were? We'd never need to hunt again.
translations.chinese: 一座充溢着力量的古老泉眼。虽然看上去像血水，但很遗憾并不是。能想象它真是血水吗？那我们就再也不用打猎了。

translations.english: All right, you've heard what it has to say. Now tell me, is there any reason I shouldn't kill this bloodsucking fiend right now?
translations.chinese: 好了，你已经听完它说的了。该你说了，我凭什么不杀这个吸血怪物？

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: All right, you've heard what it has to say. Now tell me, is there any reason I shouldn't kill this bloodsucking fiend right now? | ZH: 好了，你已经听完它说的了。该你说了，我凭什么不杀这个吸血怪物？ | SID: 00046C

translations.english: Please, make use of my coffin whenever the need arises.
translations.chinese: 请吧，有需要就用我的棺材吧。

translations.english: I never knew the darkness held such colors, or the night air smelled so sweet. You have given me a great gift.
translations.chinese: 我都不知道黑夜中有如此的色彩，空气是这样甜美好闻。你给我的礼物很珍贵。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: I feel like it was a long time. Who is Skyrim's High King?
translations.chinese: 我觉得已经过了好久了。现在谁是天际至高王？

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200B667]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Good question. Hard to say. | ZH: 好问题。难说啊。 | SID: 00025A
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I... I can't really tell. | ZH: 我……我真的不知道。 | SID: 000EB8

translations.english: Unh... where is... who sent you here?

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200B668]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Unh... where is... who sent you here? | ZH: 呃……在哪里……谁派你来的？ | SID: 0012F6

Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200B66A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's something all right. | ZH: 没关系的。 | SID: 0011A6

translations.english: Your lack of planning fills me with confidence.
translations.chinese: 你这缺少计划的样子可真让我信心满满啊。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200B66B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Your lack of planning fills me with confidence. | ZH: 你这缺少计划的样子可真让我信心满满啊。 | SID: 001142

translations.english: It appears I have you to thank for turning my daughter against me.
translations.chinese: 看来我还要感谢你让我女儿背叛我呢。

translations.english: I knew it was only a matter of time before she'd return with hatred in her heart.
translations.chinese: 我知道她带着仇恨回来只是时间问题。

translations.english: I don't know. Coming from a place like this, well... it's not really me. I hope you can believe that.
translations.chinese: 我不确定。来到这么个地方，嗯……这不是真正的我。我希望你能相信我说的。

translations.english: I didn't want you to think I was one of those... you know, the women who just sit in their castle all day?
translations.chinese: 我不想让你觉得我是那种……你懂的，成天只知道坐在城堡里的那种女人？

translations.chinese: 我就知道我会被一些一问三不知的人弄醒。所以现在我们要去哪里？

translations.chinese: 啊，讲出来听上去就很……寻常。“跟父亲关系不好的小女孩”，这种故事都读过上百遍了。

translations.english: My father and I don't really get along.
translations.chinese: 我跟我父亲不太合得来。

translations.english: Let's just say that my mother and father had a bit of a falling out.
translations.chinese: 就算是我父母闹翻了吧。

translations.english: Don't worry, I'm not in any danger or anything like that. It'll just be more unpleasant to run into my father.
translations.chinese: 别担心，我很安全。就是碰见我父亲不会太愉快罢了。

translations.chinese: 那就是我的家。不是最好的地方，不过这得取决于谁在那里，我在那里会安全的。

translations.english: It's on an island near Solitude. Hopefully we can find a boat to take us there.
translations.chinese: 它在独孤城附近的一座岛上。希望我们能找到一艘船划过去。

translations.chinese: 抱歉，我……我只是还不知道我能相信谁。

translations.english: Let's get to my home, and I'll have a better sense of where we all stand.
translations.chinese: 去我家吧，我需要再多了解一下当前的情况。

translations.english: I'd... rather not get into that with you. If that's all right.
translations.chinese: 如果可以的话，我……不太想谈论这个。

translations.chinese: 那个蛾祭司，戴希翁。他说我们还需要两个上古卷轴，我大概知道从哪里开始找了。

translations.english: Well, you could waste a lot of time trying to figure out our next move, or you could let me help.

translations.english: Yes, you've explained yourself. I'm supposed to just throw myself in front of you all and offer protection, am I?
translations.chinese: 对，你说的很明白了。我就该挡在前面保护你们，是吧？

translations.chinese: 那你在期待什么呢，托兰？我没告诉你们吗？是我没警告过你们会出这种事吗？

translations.chinese: 在我父亲那的欢迎都比这里热烈，这就说明了问题。

translations.english: Half the people in your little crew would just as soon kill me as talk to me.
translations.chinese: 你们小队里还有一半的人只会在杀我的时候跟我说句话。

translations.english: That doesn't exactly make me want to open up.

translations.english: An old escape tunnel from the castle exits there. I think that's our way in.
translations.chinese: 那里有个老旧的逃生通道。我们可以从那里进去。

translations.chinese: 我们所有药剂的材料都出自那里。她常说我父亲受不了那个地方，太……平静了。
等等……这差不多就说得通了。

translations.english: There's a courtyard in the castle. I used to help her tend a garden there.
translations.chinese: 城堡里有一个庭院。我过去常常在那里帮她打理花园。

translations.chinese: 肯定是我们中的一个人，嗯，她比我强得多，留在外面合情合理。

translations.english: I don't think so. She said she wanted to stay awake in case the situation was resolved.

translations.english: How can we get in without your father noticing?

translations.chinese: 这房间中央的圆圈很明显就是某种传送门了。

translations.english: If I'm reading this right, there's a formula here that should give us safe passage into the Soul Cairn.
translations.chinese: 如果我没理解错的话，这里这个配方应该能给我们创造出安全进入灵魂石冢的通道。

translations.english: My mother spent a lot of time trying to contact them directly, to travel to the Soul Cairn itself.
translations.chinese: 我母亲花了很长时间，试着直接跟它们交流并进入灵魂石冢。

translations.english: The Soul Cairn is home to very powerful beings. Necromancers send them souls, and receive powers of their own in return.
translations.chinese: 灵魂石冢里有很强大的东西。死灵法师送给他们灵魂，然后得到他们的力量作为交换。

translations.chinese: 我只知道她跟我说过的内容。

translations.english: She had a theory about soul gems. That the souls inside of them don't just vanish when they're used... they end up in the Soul Cairn.
translations.chinese: 她有个关于灵魂石的理论。使用时，宝石里的灵魂没有消失……而是去了灵魂石冢。

translations.chinese: 嗯。不赖啊。希望这就够了。这种传送门如果出错的话……后果挺可怕的。

translations.english: Anyway, enough of that. Let's get started.
translations.chinese: 不管怎样，这就够了。我们开始吧。

translations.english: Of course. I wouldn't be telling you where to find them if I desired them for myself.
translations.chinese: 当然可以，我想要的话就不会告诉你去哪找它们了。

translations.english: Depends on who you ask. Some say Molag-Bal himself gave these amulets to ancient powerful vampire lords. Some say this is just a myth.
translations.chinese: 看你问谁了。有人说莫拉格·巴尔亲手将这些护符送给了古代的强大吸血鬼领主，有人说这不过是传说罢了。

translations.english: Harkon disbelieved in their existence, though perhaps he felt slighted they were not already in his possession and only feigns indifference.
translations.chinese: 哈孔不相信它们存在，尽管他可能是觉得它们还没有为他所用，假装漠不关心。

translations.english: ...this is where I ended up. It was... quite the fall.

Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200CF41]

translations.english: The name's Katria. I am - was - an adventurer. Raided ruins like this for nigh on twenty years.
translations.chinese: 我叫卡提雅，是个——曾经是个冒险家。探索这样的遗迹已经二十年了。

translations.english: I was on the trail of something big. It led me here, and... I didn't make it.
translations.chinese: 我在追踪一件大玩意儿，它把我带到了这里，然后……我没成功。

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Who are you? | ZH: 你是谁？ | SID: 00126C

translations.chinese: 当然是锻造一个东西了！

translations.english: Go ahead. After everything you've done, you should do the honors.
translations.chinese: 去吧，你做了这么多，这份荣耀应该属于你。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: I had a map, in my journal. That's where we should start.
translations.chinese: 我有一幅地图，就在日记上。我们应该从那上面开始。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200CF45]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I had a map, in my journal. That's where we should start. | ZH: 我有一幅地图，就在日记上。我们应该从那上面开始。 | SID: 000539

translations.english: See if you can find a pattern in the sequence. Most of these locks have a pattern of some kind.
translations.chinese: 看看能不能在次序中找到一个范式，这些锁大多数都有某种范式。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200CF46]

translations.english: Oh. You read the book, didn't you? "The Aetherium Wars"?
translations.chinese: 哦，你读过这本书了对吧？《神光之战》？

translations.english: That's how I ended up here. I can't rest. Not until I find the Forge, until I can prove that it was my discovery. Mine, not his!
translations.chinese: 所以我才沦落至此，我不能休息，至少在找到锻炉之前，除非我能证明那是我的发现。是我的，不是他的！

translations.english: That was my theory, you know. My research. My life's work. All of it, lost! Stolen by my own damn apprentice!
translations.chinese: 这是我的理论，知道吗。我的研究，我毕生的事业，全丢了！被我那该死的徒弟偷走了！
你的名字听起来很熟悉……

translations.chinese: 只剩一件事情了，我们要证明这里就是真正的神光水晶锻炉。

translations.english: I... I almost can't believe it. We did it! We actually did it!

translations.chinese: 当然了，我们得找到其他的碎片。应该有，嗯……还有三个。四个参与锻造的城市各有一个。

translations.english: You might look around a bit. Maybe one of our predecessors still has a clue.

translations.english: Now you decide to give up? Fine. I'll be here.
translations.chinese: 现在决定放弃了？好吧，反正我就在这儿。

Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200CF52]

translations.english: I can hardly believe it. This is it. We've actually found the Forge! At last!
translations.chinese: 简直不敢相信，就是这里，我们真的找到了锻炉！找到了！

translations.english: What do you make of all this?

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200CF58]
Translations:

- INFO:RNAM | EN: What do you make of all this? | ZH: 你怎么看这一切？ | SID: 000B46

translations.english: You could always go back and get my journal, you know.
translations.chinese: 随时可以回去拿我的日记，知道吗。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200CF5A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You could always go back and get my journal, you know. | ZH: 随时可以回去拿我的日记，知道吗。 | SID: 000CD1

translations.english: My life's work. Unraveling one of the great mysteries of the dwarves.
translations.chinese: 这是我毕生的事业，解开矮人最伟大的谜团之一。

- INFO:RNAM | EN: What are you talking about? | ZH: 你在说什么？ | SID: 0005F7

translations.english: Would you want me to? After what happened the last time I tried it?
translations.chinese: 你想让我帮忙吗？我上次可是失败了哦？

translations.english: I'll fight anything that can be fought. Beyond that... I don't want your death on my conscience.
translations.chinese: 我会尽力和一切去战斗。毕竟……我不想看到你死了，会让我良心不安的。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: Well, my notes were in my journal, but you didn't grab that, did you? Hmph.
translations.chinese: 嗯，我的笔记就在日记里，但你还没拿上吧？哼。

agentText:

translations.english: I'm not going to talk you out of it, am I? I know, I know. I was just like you, once.
translations.chinese: 我不会劝你放弃的。我都明白，以前的我就跟你一样。

translations.english: Well, if you want to reach the summit, you're going to need some help. You... want a hand?
translations.chinese: 好了，如果你想抵达最高处，需要一些帮助。需要……我帮忙吗？

translations.english: I won't give up that easily.

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200CF61]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I'm not going to talk you out of it, am I? I know, I know. I was just like you, once. | ZH: 我不会劝你放弃的。我都明白，以前的我就跟你一样。 | SID: 000A16
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Well, if you want to reach the summit, you're going to need some help. You... want a hand? | ZH: 好了，如果你想抵达最高处，需要一些帮助。需要……我帮忙吗？ | SID: 001272
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I won't give up that easily. | ZH: 我不会轻易放弃。 | SID: 0014A8

translations.english: I saw a drawing of this once. This shard... it's... it's part of a key. A key made of pure Aetherium! The key to the Forge!
translations.chinese: 我曾经看过这幅画，这碎片……是……是钥匙的一部分。一把由纯净神光水晶制成的钥匙！通往锻炉的钥匙！

translations.english: Look, on the edge here. This has been cut, precisely cut. If you had another piece, about the same size, it would... it would snap right in.
translations.chinese: 看，在这边缘，这里已经被切开了，很精确的切割。如果你有另一件同样大小的碎片，它……应该正好拼在一起。

translations.english: To think... no one's been here in four thousand years...
translations.chinese: 想想看……已经四千年没人来过这儿了……

translations.chinese: 这是……是真的。都是真的！来吧，我们来看看！

translations.english: Look at the device here - the gear in the center is just about the right size. Try putting the shards in and... we'll see what happens.
translations.chinese: 看这个装置，中心的齿轮正好合适。试下把碎片放进去然后……看看会怎么样。

translations.english: Yes, I have them. What now?
translations.chinese: 是的，我带了碎片。接下来呢？

agentText:

Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: Well, there's the Falmer, to start with. Deadly rapids. Major earthquakes. Massive chasms. Unstable ground. Lethal falls.
translations.chinese: 嗯，首先是伐莫。还有致命的湍流、大地震、巨型裂缝、不稳定的地面、危险的瀑布。

translations.english: And then you get to the real danger. We can discuss that when the time comes. If it comes.
translations.chinese: 然后才是真正的危险，如果遇到了的话，到时候我们再讨论。

translations.english: Any dangers I should be aware of?
translations.chinese: 有什么危险需要我注意吗？

agentText:

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Any dangers I should be aware of? | ZH: 有什么危险需要我注意吗？ | SID: 001238

translations.english: Hmph... maybe so. Then again, I thought I could, too.
translations.chinese: 嗯……可能吧。话说回来，我也以为我可以呢。

translations.english: You made it! And you've brought the shards!

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200CF87]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You made it! And you've brought the shards! | ZH: 你来了，还带来了碎片！ | SID: 00074C

translations.english: If all else fails, just take a chance, see what happens. Wouldn't be surprised if half the traps had been sprung by now...
translations.chinese: 如果多失败了，就随便试下，看看会发生什么。就算已经打开了半数的陷阱我也不惊讶了……

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200CF88]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If all else fails, just take a chance, see what happens. Wouldn't be surprised if half the traps had been sprung by now... | ZH: 如果多失败了，就随便试下，看看会发生什么。就算已经打开了半数的陷阱我也不惊讶了…… | SID: 000369

translations.english: Grab my journal, would you? We're going to need it.
translations.chinese: 带上我的日记好吗？我们会需要的。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200CF89]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Grab my journal, would you? We're going to need it. | ZH: 带上我的日记好吗？我们会需要的。 | SID: 0005AE

translations.english: Now... you'd be lucky to find a single room intact.
translations.chinese: 现在……你能找到一间完好的房间都算幸运了。

translations.english: It wasn't always like this. Best-preserved dwarven city I'd ever laid eyes on. And then... the earthquake hit.
translations.chinese: 这种情况只是偶然。这是我见过的保存最完好的矮人城市。后来……来了地震。

agentText:

translations.english: Beautiful. That crown... it's everything I could have hoped for.
translations.chinese: 太美了，那王冠……这就是我所期待的全部了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200CF9B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Beautiful. That crown... it's everything I could have hoped for. | ZH: 太美了，那王冠……这就是我所期待的全部了。 | SID: 001266

translations.english: There's so much to do. I'm going to head out and start tracking things down. We'll meet again, I'm sure of it.
translations.chinese: 有太多事情要做了，我要出去开始找些东西。我们还会再见面的，我相信。

translations.english: We still have to find the Forge itself. I had a lead on that, too.
translations.chinese: 我们还是要找到锻炉本身，那里我也有一个线索。

translations.english: For the first time in a long while, I think I - we - may actually be able to do this. And... and I owe it all to you. Thank you.
translations.chinese: 很长一段时间以来，我头一次觉得——我们——可能真的能办成这件事。还有……这是我欠你的，多谢。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200CF9C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: There's so much to do. I'm going to head out and start tracking things down. We'll meet again, I'm sure of it. | ZH: 有太多事情要做了，我要出去开始找些东西。我们还会再见面的，我相信。 | SID: 00048F
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: We still have to find the Forge itself. I had a lead on that, too. | ZH: 我们还是要找到锻炉本身，那里我也有一个线索。 | SID: 000B41

translations.english: Heard they're reforming the Dawnguard. Vampire hunters or something, in the old fort near Riften. Might consider joining up myself.
translations.chinese: 听说他们在重建黎明守卫。在裂谷城附近的旧堡垒，是吸血鬼猎人或者什么的。我自己也会考虑考虑入伙的。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200D057]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Heard they're reforming the Dawnguard. Vampire hunters or something, in the old fort near Riften. Might consider joining up myself. | ZH: 听说他们在重建黎明守卫。在裂谷城附近的旧堡垒，是吸血鬼猎人或者什么的。我自己也会考虑考虑入伙的。 | SID: 000BFD

translations.english: They say that vampires attacked the Hall of the Vigilant. Burned it to the ground! Never heard of vampires doing anything like that before.
translations.chinese: 他们说吸血鬼攻击了警戒者之厅。一把火把它烧了个精光！以前从没听说过吸血鬼会做这种事。

agentText:

translations.english: Brother Adalvald had been there not long ago. Said he found something of great importance.
translations.chinese: 阿达瓦尔德修士不久前还去过那里，说他发现了非常重要的东西。

translations.english: It must have been important to the vampires as well, for them to risk an open attack on the Vigilants.
translations.chinese: 对吸血鬼来说肯定也很重要，因为他们竟然冒险在毫无掩护的情况下攻击警戒者。

translations.chinese: 当我们离家出走时，她几乎在傻笑，就像是为自己感到骄傲一样。

translations.english: Like she didn't want to just stop my father... she wanted to stick it to him, too.
translations.chinese: 就好像她不仅仅是想要阻止我父亲……她还想要他难受。

translations.english: Possibly. I guess even a vampire mother is still a mother.
translations.chinese: 可能吧。我猜即便是一位吸血鬼母亲也依旧是母亲。

translations.english: She worried about me. About all of us. But she wanted to get me as far away from my father as possible before he really went over the edge.
translations.chinese: 她很关心我，还有我们所有人。但她想在我父亲彻底崩溃前，带我离他越远越好。

translations.english: I've been asking myself the same thing since we came back to the castle.

translations.english: She was so sure of what we did to my father, I couldn't help but go along with her. I never thought of the cost.
translations.chinese: 她很清楚我们对父亲做了些什么，我忍不住就同意了她的做法，而从来没考虑过代价。

translations.english: Turning someone is a very... personal thing for vampires. It's intimate. For us.
translations.chinese: 对于吸血鬼来说，把某人转化成吸血鬼是一件……很私人的事情。对我们而言，这事很私密。

translations.english: I don't want you to feel like I'm forcing you into this.
translations.chinese: 我不想让你觉得我是在逼你。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.chinese: 是啊……没错，你说得对。对不起。我只是没想到会有人在乎我对她的看法。谢谢。

translations.english: Then the rest is up to me.

translations.english: Auri-El himself may have been beyond my reach, but his influence on our world wasn't.
translations.chinese: 或许我无法触及奥瑞-艾尔本身，但他对我们世界的影响可不是。

translations.english: All I needed was the blood of a vampire and his own weapon, Auriel's Bow.
translations.chinese: 我只需要吸血鬼的血和他的武器，奥瑞艾尔之弓。

translations.english: You want to take revenge... on a god?

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200D674]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You want to take revenge... on a god? | ZH: 你想要……向神复仇？ | SID: 0024AA

translations.english: Enough, Vyrthur. Give us the bow!
translations.chinese: 够了，维苏尔。把弓给我们！

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200D675]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Enough, Vyrthur. Give us the bow! | ZH: 够了，维苏尔。把弓给我们！ | SID: 002541

translations.english: I swore I'd have my revenge, no matter what the cost.
translations.chinese: 我发誓要复仇，无论付出什么代价。

translations.english: The moment I was infected by one of my own Initiates, Auri-El turned his back on me.
translations.chinese: 自从我被麾下的新人感染，奥瑞-艾尔就抛弃了我。

agentText:

translations.english: But Auriel should have protected you...
translations.chinese: 但奥瑞艾尔应该会保护你……

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200D677]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You're... you're a vampire? | ZH: 你是……你是个吸血鬼？ | SID: 002567

translations.english: Gelebor and his kind are easily manipulated fools.
translations.chinese: 盖勒布和他的同类都是些易于操纵的傻子。

translations.english: Look into my eyes, Serana. You tell me what I am.
translations.chinese: 看着我的眼睛，瑟拉娜。告诉我，我到底是什么。

translations.english: You were waiting... all this time for someone with my blood to come along.
translations.chinese: 你等了……这么久就是为了我这种血统的人出现。

translations.english: Well, too bad for you... I intend on keeping it. Let's see if your blood has any power to it!
translations.chinese: 那么，很遗憾……我要自己留着。先来看看你的血有没有什么力量！

translations.english: Until the "Betrayed" corrupted you. Yes, yes. We've heard this sad story.
translations.chinese: 直到“背叛者”腐化了你。好了好了，我们听过这悲伤的故事了。

translations.english: A prophecy that lacked a single, final ingredient... the blood of a pure vampire. The blood of a Daughter of Coldharbour.
translations.chinese: 但还缺少最后一种成分……纯种吸血鬼的血，冷港之女的血。

translations.english: How dare you. I was the Arch-Curate of Auri-El, girl. I had the ears of a god!
translations.chinese: 放肆！我是奥瑞-艾尔的教士长。神也要为我侧耳！

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: The blood of a vampire... Auriel's Bow...
translations.chinese: 吸血鬼的血……奥瑞艾尔之弓……

translations.english: It... it was you? You created that prophecy?
translations.chinese: 是……是你？你创造了那个预言？

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200D67D]

translations.english: Everything's been torn down... the whole place looks... well, dead. It's like we're the first to set foot here in centuries.
translations.chinese: 全都被拆了……整个地方好像……好吧，死了。就好像我们是几百年来第一个踏进这里的人。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: She had to be up to something in that garden. I'm hoping it's a clue that will tell us where she went.
translations.chinese: 她肯定在花园里策划了些什么。我希望这是条线索，能告诉我们她去了哪里。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: We've made it to the courtyard.

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200D7DA]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Oh no... | ZH: 哦不…… | SID: 000943

translations.english: It was very sudden. It was almost like one day we were a normal family, and then the next I didn't know who they were.
translations.chinese: 变得很突然。就好像昨天我们还是一个正常的家庭，然后第二天我就不认识他们了。

translations.english: I'd try to visit my mother in the garden, and she'd quickly shoo me away saying she was much too busy.
translations.chinese: 我试图去花园里去找我母亲，不过她说她太忙了，很快就把我轰走了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.chinese: 好吧，至少我们越来越近了。走吧。

translations.english: Like the best of friends. I would never hesitate to share anything with her.
translations.chinese: 就像最好的朋友一样。我想都不会想就会跟她分享一切。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200D7DD]

translations.english: I've never been in those tunnels before, but I'd bet they run right under the courtyard and into the tower ruins.
translations.chinese: 我以前从没进过这些地道，不过我敢肯定它们通向庭院下方，一直通向塔楼的废墟里。

translations.english: I used to walk through here after evening meals. It was beautiful, once.
translations.chinese: 我过去常常在晚餐后路过这里。这里曾经很漂亮。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200D7DF]

translations.english: She was very fond of her alchemical garden in the castle courtyard. She taught me quite a bit about cultivating quality reagents.
translations.chinese: 她很喜欢城堡院子里的炼金花园，教了我很多有关培养高质量试剂的知识。

translations.english: Before my father became obsessed with the prophecy, mother and I spent quite a bit of time together.
translations.chinese: 在我父亲痴迷于那则预言之前，我母亲跟我总是呆在一起。

translations.chinese: 我都不知道这些纹样是能取下来的，难道我妈是想告诉我们什么？

translations.english: Something's wrong with the moondial here. Some of the crests are missing and the dial is askew.
translations.chinese: 这里的月晷出了些问题，有些纹样缺失，仪表盘也歪了。

translations.english: Perhaps if he had spent more time with us, he would have recognized the beauty for himself.

translations.english: It appears that way. I suppose he wanted to put the past behind him.
translations.chinese: 似乎是这样。我觉得他想把这些抛诸脑后。

translations.chinese: 你给理想之主灵魂，它们给你召唤亡灵的力量。就像是做生意一样。

translations.chinese: 愿斯丹达尔保佑你不用面对同样的遭遇，也不用证明你自己也不够格。

translations.english: I know what you think of us. You think we're soft, that we're cowards. You think our deaths proved our weakness.
translations.chinese: 我知道你对我们的看法。你觉得我们软弱，你觉得我们是懦夫。你觉得我们的死证明了我们懦弱无能。

translations.english: As you can see, we have some work to do to restore it to its former glory. But maybe you want to help me with that?
translations.chinese: 如你所见，为恢复它的旧日荣光，我们还有些工作要做。不过也许你会给我帮帮忙？

translations.english: I think our potential is on the rise. Hircine smiles on us. Let's not question too much.
translations.chinese: 我们的潜力可能还在提升，海尔辛在向我们微笑，还是别问太多了。

translations.english: I've sensed the blood pulsing a little stronger, of late. I had assumed you had as well.
translations.chinese: 我最近感到血液跳动得更烈了。你没感受到么。

translations.chinese: 你从我不让我失望，带什么回来了？

translations.english: Hmmm... I see. Clever dwarves. With a similar technique and a little tinkering I should be able to improve the capabilities of our crossbows.
translations.chinese: 嗯……我明白了。聪明啊矮人。我应该能通过类似的技术和一些修补来提高我们弩箭的性能。

translations.english: I often wonder where we'd be if the Dwemer were still around. Ah well. We'll have to manage with the scraps we find.
translations.chinese: 我常常想矮人们要是还存在，我们将会如何。现在我们只能凑合用找到的残骸了。

translations.english: Time has very little meaning to me. Consequently, it has little meaning to the Ideal Masters as well.
translations.chinese: 时间对我而言没什么意义。不过，对理想之主也是如此。

translations.english: I suppose you could call this the ultimate waiting game, each watching the other to see which will give in.
translations.chinese: 你可以管这叫终极等待游戏，看着哪一方会先投降。

agentText:

translations.english: Have you been listening to me? Like Serana, I'm a pure-blooded vampire. My presence on Tamriel is as much of a danger as hers.
translations.chinese: 你没听我说话吗？跟瑟拉娜一样，我是纯血吸血鬼。我出现在泰姆瑞尔比呆在这里危险得多。

agentText:

translations.chinese: 没错，他是着魔了……是变了。但他还是我父亲啊。为什么你就不明白这对我而言是什么感受？

translations.chinese: 看守者们没办法索取我的灵魂，它们就让手下建造了这个我没法突破的结界。

translations.english: Fortunately, I was able to hold them at bay and retreat into these ruins.

translations.english: The Ideal Masters unleashed their Keepers and sent them to destroy me.
translations.chinese: 理想之主派出了手下的看守者，让它们来杀我。

translations.english: Like myself, Serana was a human once. We were devout followers of Lord Molag Bal.
translations.chinese: 跟我一样，瑟拉娜曾是人类。我们是莫拉格·巴尔大人的忠实追随者。

translations.english: Tradition dictates the females be offered to Molag Bal on his summoning day. Few survive the ordeal. Those that do emerge as a pure-blooded vampire.
translations.chinese: 传统决定了在莫拉格·巴尔的召唤日要献上女性给他。很少有人能熬过这趟折磨，成功了的都转化为了纯血吸血鬼。

translations.english: We call such confluences the "Daughters of Coldharbour."
translations.chinese: 我们将这种转化者称为“冷港之女”。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200F84F]

translations.english: The scroll I presume you found with Serana speaks of Auriel and his arcane weapon, Auriel's Bow.
translations.chinese: 我想你发现的那卷跟瑟拉娜在一起的上古卷轴记载了奥瑞艾尔和他的神器————奥瑞艾尔之弓。

translations.english: When I fled Castle Volkihar, I fled with two Elder Scrolls.
translations.chinese: 当我逃离沃基哈尔城堡时，我带走了两个上古卷轴。

translations.english: I requested refuge in the Soul Cairn, and in exchange, I would provide the Ideal Masters the souls that they craved.

translations.english: If I had foreseen the value they placed on my own soul, I would never have come here.
translations.chinese: 如果预见到了它们对我灵魂的重视，我绝不会来这里。

translations.english: The order of the day would be our destruction until every last vampire was hunted down and eliminated.
translations.chinese: 那天将会是我们的灭绝之日，直到所有吸血鬼都被猎杀致死。

translations.english: If eternal night fell, there are many who wouldn't stand for it. They would raise armies in attempts to return things to normal.
translations.chinese: 如果永夜降临，很多人对此会无法忍受。他们会组建军队试图让一切回到正轨。

translations.english: It's what some call the domain of Molag Bal. His place in Oblivion.
translations.chinese: 这是一些人所谓的莫拉格·巴尔的领域。他在湮灭的领地。

translations.english: I do. It's how the vampire has survived for millennia, and the only way we can continue to survive in the future.
translations.chinese: 是啊。这是千年来吸血鬼的生存之道，也是未来我们活下去的唯一方法。

translations.english: However, the majority of necromancers that are foolish enough to enter into a bargain with the Ideal Masters wind up here... as harvested souls.
translations.chinese: 然而，大多数蠢到去和理想之主讨价还价的死灵法师最终都会来到这里……成了被收割的灵魂。

translations.english: The ability to summon powerful undead guardians as one would conjure an atronach or daedra.
translations.chinese: 召唤强大的不死守卫，就跟召唤侍灵或者迪德拉一样。

translations.english: Perhaps they were once corporeal beings, but they've obviously reached a point where they no longer require a tangible presence.
translations.chinese: 也许它们曾经有实体，不过显然它们已经达到了不需要实体的境界。

translations.english: I think they transcend what we perceive as a physical form.
translations.chinese: 它们应该已经超越了我们所能感知的物质形态。

translations.english: The Ideal Masters's weakness is their insatiable hunger for pure souls.
translations.chinese: 理想之主的弱点就是对纯粹灵魂的贪婪。

translations.english: It's the reason for the Soul Cairn's existence, and the only leverage a necromancer has when bargaining with them.
translations.chinese: 这就是灵魂石冢存在的原因，也是死灵法师与它们交易的唯一筹码。

translations.english: Conduits through which the Ideal Masters speak to their underlings and feed on their victims.
translations.chinese: 理想之主能通过水晶与手下交谈，并以受害者为食。

translations.english: Only thing that stood out for me was Auriel's Bow. That's a powerful weapon, and I sure as Oblivion don't want the vampires to get hold of it.
translations.chinese: 唯一让我印象深刻的是奥瑞艾尔之弓。那是件强大的武器，坚决不能让吸血鬼得到它。

translations.english: The Moth Priest can stay here for now. As for the vampire, I still don't trust it, so keep it on a leash.
translations.chinese: 蛾祭司可以暂时留在这里。至于吸血鬼，我还不能相信，所以继续拴住它。

translations.english: I heard a lot of vague nonsense. You could interpret that a hundred different ways.
translations.chinese: 我听到的是许多模糊不清的废话，能用上百种不同的方式去解读。

translations.english: I wish I could say that I did, but without the other two Scrolls, the picture will remain incomplete.
translations.chinese: 我倒是希望能给肯定的答复，但没有其他两幅卷轴，愿景就不完整了。

translations.english: Now it's a race to claim the remaining Scrolls and discover what part Auriel's Bow has to play in this prophecy.
translations.chinese: 现在是一场争夺剩余卷轴的比赛，并找出奥瑞艾尔之弓在这个预言中扮演了什么角色。

translations.english: I admit, I feel a bit frustrated that I can't be more helpful. Still, our enemy is likely just as much in the dark as we are, and that's something.
translations.chinese: 我得说，对帮不上忙感到有点沮丧。尽管如此，敌人很可能跟我们一样一无所知，这就够了。

EDID: [0200FFDA]
Translations:

translations.english: That was the plan, yes. Assuming the rest of them can trust a vampire. Come on, I'll need you to help convince them.
translations.chinese: 计划就是那样，没错。只要他们能相信一个吸血鬼的话。来吧，我需要你帮我劝劝他们。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200FFE1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That was the plan, yes. Assuming the rest of them can trust a vampire. Come on, I'll need you to help convince them. | ZH: 计划就是那样，没错。只要他们能相信一个吸血鬼的话。来吧，我需要你帮我劝劝他们。 | SID: 000D59

translations.english: I'm sorry, I had heard there were vampire hunters here. I thought they might want to know about a vampire plot to enslave the rest of the world.
translations.chinese: 抱歉啊，可是我听说这里有吸血鬼猎人。我觉得他们也许想了解了解吸血鬼企图统治世界的阴谋。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200FFE3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Was I wrong? | ZH: 难道我搞错了吗？ | SID: 000372
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I'm sorry, I had heard there were vampire hunters here. I thought they might want to know about a vampire plot to enslave the rest of the world. | ZH: 抱歉啊，可是我听说这里有吸血鬼猎人。我觉得他们也许想了解了解吸血鬼企图统治世界的阴谋。 | SID: 000DFC

translations.english: I guess you'll never get to find out.
translations.chinese: 我想你永远都别想找到答案。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0200FFE6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I guess you'll never get to find out. | ZH: 我想你永远都别想找到答案。 | SID: 000B9A

Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0201038B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm right behind you. | ZH: 我紧随在后。 | SID: 0004A5

translations.english: I wasn't sure you'd come back for me. I'm still looking for a guide to get me home. What do you say?
translations.chinese: 我不确定你会不会回来找我，还在找一个向导带我回家呢，怎么样？

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: You're back, good! So, what happened?
translations.chinese: 你回来了，很好。所以，发生了什么？

agentText:

Translations:

translations.english: I suppose you're right. I should have a little more faith.
translations.chinese: 我想你说得没错。我应该更信任你的。

translations.english: Just be sure to keep your eyes open and your guard up.
translations.chinese: 你一定得睁大眼睛，提高警惕。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: No doubt she'd like you to lead her into such a place. Then, when you're alone and beyond help, the fangs will come out!
translations.chinese: 毫无疑问她希望你带她去这种地方。然后，当你独自一人、孤立无援的时候，她就会亮出牙齿！

translations.english: Home? Well, where is that? Some dusty crypt or frigid cave?
translations.chinese: 家？嗯，在哪里？什么脏兮兮的地穴或是冷冰冰的洞穴吗？

translations.chinese: 很高兴见到你没缺胳膊少腿。这是谁？

translations.chinese: 如果你改了主意，我就在这儿。

agentText:

EDID: [02010395]

Translations:

translations.english: I'd be happy to, but you already have a creature under your command.
translations.chinese: 我很乐意，但你已经带着一头动物了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0201056E]

translations.english: Now, you be careful with the creature.
translations.chinese: 现在，你要小心这东西了。

translations.english: Alright. Now take note. He'll mind you and us Dawnguard, but there's no accounting for other folk.
translations.chinese: 好啊，记住了，他会在意你还有我们黎明守卫，但其他人就不考虑了。

translations.english: And heed also this. He's no pet. Mistreat the beast or leave him alone for too long, and he'll return to the wild forgetting you ever existed.
translations.chinese: 还要注意这点，他不是宠物。虐待或者放他独自待上太久，他就会忘了你，回到野外。

translations.english: I'd be happy to, but your purse is lighter than you think.
translations.chinese: 我很乐意，但你的钱包好像比你想的要轻。

translations.english: Oh, I'm sure I have something you'll find useful.
translations.chinese: 哦，我肯定有些对你有用的东西。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02010663]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, I'm sure I have something you'll find useful. | ZH: 哦，我肯定有些对你有用的东西。 | SID: 000EA5

translations.english: You'd be surprised what people leave behind when you burn their village to the ground.
translations.chinese: 把村庄夷为平地后，你会惊讶于人们留下的东西。

translations.english: Many in the court don't bother with potions, but I keep things stocked just in case.
translations.chinese: 宫廷里的很多人都懒得买药水，但我还是准备好了以防万一。

translations.english: I may not have potions to block the sun, but I do have nearly everything else.

translations.chinese: 我让锻炉日夜保持运转，没准哈孔大人有所需求呢。

translations.english: I've allowed my hatred of your father to estrange us for too long. Forgive me.
translations.chinese: 对你父亲的恨意让我疏远你太久了。原谅我。

translations.english: I'm sorry, Serana. I didn't know... I didn't see.
translations.chinese: 抱歉，瑟拉娜。我不知道……我不知道这事。

translations.english: If you want the Elder Scroll, it's yours.
translations.chinese: 如果你想要上古卷轴的话，给你。

translations.chinese: 不过我们得阻止他，在一切不可挽回之前。我们需要上古卷轴才能做到这一点。

translations.english: Maybe we don't deserve that kind of happiness. Maybe it isn't for us.
translations.chinese: 也许我们就不配拥有那种幸福。也许那就不是给我们准备的。

translations.english: I therefore honor-name you "Qahnaarin," or Vanquisher in your tongue.
translations.chinese: 因此我尊称你为“夸纳林”，在你的语言中是“征服者”。

translations.english: My claws have rended the flesh of innumerable foes, but I have never once been felled on the field of battle.
translations.chinese: 我的爪子撕碎了无数敌人的血肉，从没有在战场上倒下过。

translations.english: Cursed, not dead. Doomed to exist in this form for eternity. Trapped between laas and dinok, between life and death.

translations.english: If I ventured far from the Soul Cairn, my strength would begin to wane until I was no more.
translations.chinese: 如果我冒险远离灵魂石冢，力量就会开始减弱，直至消散。

translations.english: Remember that Harkon isn't to be trusted. No matter what he promises, he'll deceive you in order to get what he wants.
translations.chinese: 记住不能相信哈孔。不管他跟你做过什么保证，他都会为了他想要的东西而欺骗你。

translations.english: Before this, I roamed the skies above Tamriel. I desire to return there.
translations.chinese: 在这之前，我也曾在泰姆瑞尔上空翱翔，我渴望着回到那里。

translations.english: I have no choice. As I told you before, I'm a Daughter of Coldharbour.

Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02013282]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hm. Most interesting. | ZH: 嗯。很有意思。 | SID: 0027D6

translations.english: It will be done, my lord!

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02013284]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It will be done, my lord! | ZH: 遵命，大人。 | SID: 002830

translations.english: In my language, the Qahnaarin is the Vanquisher, the one who has bested a fellow dovah in battle.
translations.chinese: 在我的语言中，夸纳林是征服者，是在战斗中击败了都瓦的同族。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0201328C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: In my language, the Qahnaarin is the Vanquisher, the one who has bested a fellow dovah in battle. | ZH: 在我的语言中，夸纳林是征服者，是在战斗中击败了都瓦的同族。 | SID: 00102C

translations.english: I only hope that you will allow me the precious moments of time there through your call.
translations.chinese: 只希望你通过召唤给我一些宝贵的时间。

translations.english: Free? No. I have been here too long, Qahnaarin.
translations.chinese: 自由？不，我在这里呆的太久了，夸纳林。

translations.english: The Soul Cairn has become a part of what I am. I can never fully call Tamriel my home again, or I would surely perish.
translations.chinese: 灵魂石冢已经成为了我的一部分，我再不能回泰姆瑞尔安家了，不然肯定会死。

agentText:

translations.english: There was a time when I called Tamriel my home, but those days have long since passed.
translations.chinese: 曾几何时，泰姆瑞尔也是我的家，但已经过去太久了。

translations.english: The dovah roamed the skies, vying for their small slices of territory that resulted in immense and ultimately fatal battles.
translations.chinese: 都瓦漫游于天空中，为了小小领土大打出手，引发了浩大、致命的战斗。

agentText:

translations.english: They had control of my mind, but fortunately they couldn't possess my soul.
translations.chinese: 好在他们只能控制我的思想，却不能占据我的灵魂。

translations.english: I discovered too late that the Ideal Masters favor deception over honor and had no intention of releasing me from my binding.
translations.chinese: 理想之主们热衷欺骗，毫无信誉，根本无意解除束缚，可惜我发现太晚了。

translations.english: I began to explore what the dovah call "Alok-Dilon," the ancient forbidden art that you call necromancy.
translations.chinese: 我开始探索都瓦称为“阿洛克-迪隆”的古老禁术，你们称之为死灵法术。

translations.english: I was. But unlike some of my brethren, I sought solutions outside the norm in order to maintain my superiority.
translations.chinese: 是的，但与我的兄弟们不同，为保持优势，我开始寻求非常手段。

translations.english: In return, I was to serve them as a Keeper until the death of the one who calls herself Valerica.
translations.chinese: 作为回报，我将服侍它们直到那个叫瓦蕾莉卡的人死去。

translations.english: The Ideal Masters assured me that my powers would be unmatched, that I could raise legions of the undead.
translations.chinese: 理想之主向我保证，我的力量将无人可敌，能够召集亡灵军团。

translations.english: You may not be dovah, but the defeat of Alduin earns you the right of title.
translations.chinese: 你可能不是都瓦，但击败奥杜因使你赢得了这个头衔。

translations.english: Even in the Soul Cairn, the defeat of the World Eater has reached my ears, Dovahkiin.
translations.chinese: 即便是在灵魂石冢，世界吞噬者的战败之讯也已传到了我的耳中。

agentText:

translations.english: You are the Dovahkiin, the Dragonborn. You may not be one of us in body, but you have earned the right to bear this title.
translations.chinese: 你是都瓦克因，龙裔。可能没有我们的躯体，但已经赢得了这个头衔。

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: A Moth Priest? | ZH: 蛾祭司？ | SID: 0027F9

translations.english: Forgive me, my instinct was to grant you this title. I am uncertain why. Perhaps one day it will become clear to both of us.
translations.chinese: 抱歉，我的本能让我授予你这个头衔，我也不知道为什么，或许某天我们都会明白。

agentText:

translations.english: Well, as far as I'm aware it's the only one in existence.
translations.chinese: 嗯，据我所知这是现存的唯一月晷。

translations.english: She persuaded an elven artisan to make some improvements. You can see the plates that show the phases of the moons, Masser and Secunda.
translations.chinese: 她说服一个精灵工匠做了一些改进，你可以看到显示双月进程的板块，马瑟尔和瑟坤达。

translations.english: The previous owners of the castle had a sundial in the courtyard, and obviously that didn't appeal to my mother.
translations.chinese: 前任城堡主在庭院里放了一个日晷，不过我母亲显然对此不感兴趣。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0201329D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Well, as far as I'm aware it's the only one in existence. | ZH: 嗯，据我所知这是现存的唯一月晷。 | SID: 000C08
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: She persuaded an elven artisan to make some improvements. You can see the plates that show the phases of the moons, Masser and Secunda. | ZH: 她说服一个精灵工匠做了一些改进，你可以看到显示双月进程的板块，马瑟尔和瑟坤达。 | SID: 000CE4

translations.english: Hard to say. Maybe if we found the missing crests, we could figure it out.
translations.chinese: 很难说，也许等我们找到了缺失的纹样，就知道了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0201329E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hard to say. Maybe if we found the missing crests, we could figure it out. | ZH: 很难说，也许等我们找到了缺失的纹样，就知道了。 | SID: 000D04

translations.english: But she loved it. I don't know. I guess it's like having a piece of art, if you're into that sort of thing.
translations.chinese: 但她很喜欢，我不太理解。大概和收藏艺术品一样吧，如果你对这方面感兴趣可能就理解了。

translations.english: That's the thing... what's the point of a moondial? I always wondered why she didn't just have the whole thing ripped out.
translations.chinese: 这就是问题所在了……月晷有什么用？我一直在想为什么她不把这些全部拆掉。

agentText:

translations.english: Dragons breathing fire in the sky. Vampires brazenly attacking people on the street. It's the end of the world I tell you.
translations.chinese: 天上有龙喷火，街上有吸血鬼横行杀人。我告诉你这是世界末日。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Dragons breathing fire in the sky. Vampires brazenly attacking people on the street. It's the end of the world I tell you. | ZH: 天上有龙喷火，街上有吸血鬼横行杀人。我告诉你这是世界末日。 | SID: 002849

translations.english: Where're these vampires coming from? We need to wipe them out before things get worse.
translations.chinese: 这些吸血鬼从哪来的？我们得在事态恶化前消灭他们。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020132AC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Where're these vampires coming from? We need to wipe them out before things get worse. | ZH: 这些吸血鬼从哪来的？我们得在事态恶化前消灭他们。 | SID: 0027F6

translations.english: They say if a vampire so much as scratches you, you'll turn into one. That better not be true.
translations.chinese: 他们说被吸血鬼抓伤了，就会变成吸血鬼。这最好不是真的。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: They say if a vampire so much as scratches you, you'll turn into one. That better not be true. | ZH: 他们说被吸血鬼抓伤了，就会变成吸血鬼。这最好不是真的。 | SID: 00282C

translations.english: We need to do something about these vampire attacks.
translations.chinese: 我们得为这种吸血鬼袭击做些什么。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020132C4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We need to do something about these vampire attacks. | ZH: 我们得为这种吸血鬼袭击做些什么。 | SID: 0027F4

translations.english: These vampires are becoming a real menace.
translations.chinese: 这些吸血鬼正在成为真正的威胁。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020132CB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: These vampires are becoming a real menace. | ZH: 这些吸血鬼正在成为真正的威胁。 | SID: 002820

translations.english: All right, now pull your lever!
translations.chinese: 好了，现在拉动你的拉杆！

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020133AD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: All right, now pull your lever! | ZH: 好了，现在拉动你的拉杆！ | SID: 00054B

translations.english: It looks like there's another lever over on the other side.
translations.chinese: 另外一边好像还有一个拉杆。

translations.english: Hang on... could you pull that again?
translations.chinese: 等一下……你能再拉它一下吗？

translations.english: Stay here. I'll go check it out if you open the door back up.
translations.chinese: 在这等着，你把门打开后我去看看。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: I admit, I do not entirely understand your sense of humor.
translations.chinese: 我得承认，我不是很能理解你的幽默感。

translations.english: We both know that a band of fools with crossbows is no match for a scion of the ancient blood.
translations.chinese: 我们俩都知道一群拿着弩的蠢蛋可比不上古老血脉的后裔。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020136BA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I admit, I do not entirely understand your sense of humor. | ZH: 我得承认，我不是很能理解你的幽默感。 | SID: 0027C9
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: We both know that a band of fools with crossbows is no match for a scion of the ancient blood. | ZH: 我们俩都知道一群拿着弩的蠢蛋可比不上古老血脉的后裔。 | SID: 00285F

translations.english: They are determined and well-armed, but foolish if they think they can defy us. We will deal with them in time.
translations.chinese: 他们意志坚定、装备精良，不过如果他们觉得能对抗我们的话，那他们可就太蠢了。我们会及时再收拾他们。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [020136DE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: They are determined and well-armed, but foolish if they think they can defy us. We will deal with them in time. | ZH: 他们意志坚定、装备精良，不过如果他们觉得能对抗我们的话，那他们可就太蠢了。我们会及时再收拾他们。 | SID: 0027E0

translations.english: I wish I could have been there to hear the sounds of their screams.
translations.chinese: 我希望我当时就在那听听他们的尖叫。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02013707]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I wish I could have been there to hear the sounds of their screams. | ZH: 我希望我当时就在那听听他们的尖叫。 | SID: 0027F2

translations.english: Now be silent, and hear what I have to say.
Do not presume to tell me who I can and cannot trust. I possess the wisdom of a dozen lifetimes, and I will make my own judgements.
translations.chinese: 别想着告诉我能不能相信谁。我拥有十几辈子的智慧，我会自己判断。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02013708]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Now be silent, and hear what I have to say. | ZH: 现在闭嘴，给我听着。 | SID: 0027C0
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Do not presume to tell me who I can and cannot trust. I possess the wisdom of a dozen lifetimes, and I will make my own judgements. | ZH: 别想着告诉我能不能相信谁。我拥有十几辈子的智慧，我会自己判断。 | SID: 00285E

translations.english: Good. Strong instincts and a cunning mind will serve you as well as blade, spell or claw.
translations.chinese: 很好。强大的直觉和狡猾的头脑跟刀剑、咒语和利爪一样有用。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02013764]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good. Strong instincts and a cunning mind will serve you as well as blade, spell or claw. | ZH: 很好。强大的直觉和狡猾的头脑跟刀剑、咒语和利爪一样有用。 | SID: 0027F8

translations.english: Who knows, maybe it has a death wish. Maybe it's just insane. I don't really care.
translations.chinese: 谁知道，没准它就是寻死来了，要不就是疯了，我才不在乎。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0201376F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Who knows, maybe it has a death wish. Maybe it's just insane. I don't really care. | ZH: 谁知道，没准它就是寻死来了，要不就是疯了，我才不在乎。 | SID: 0027EA

translations.english: Set my hatred aside? Not a chance. It's what keeps me strong.
translations.chinese: 把仇恨放在一边？没门。仇恨让我坚强。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02013770]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Set my hatred aside? Not a chance. It's what keeps me strong. | ZH: 把仇恨放在一边？没门。仇恨让我坚强。 | SID: 002857

translations.english: You'd better know what you're doing.
translations.chinese: 你最好清楚你到底在干什么。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02013771]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You'd better know what you're doing. | ZH: 你最好清楚你到底在干什么。 | SID: 0027DD

translations.english: I thought you said you were happy together.
translations.chinese: 我记得你说过你们很幸福。

translations.english: I'm not going to be the one to destroy a marriage. I'm sorry.
translations.chinese: 我可不想破坏了一段婚姻，抱歉。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02013788]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I thought you said you were happy together. | ZH: 我记得你说过你们很幸福。 | SID: 002812
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I'm not going to be the one to destroy a marriage. I'm sorry. | ZH: 我可不想破坏了一段婚姻，抱歉。 | SID: 002851

translations.english: I'm not going to blamed for whatever happens.
translations.chinese: 不管发生什么，都不能怪我。

translations.english: If you're not happy with things... that's not my business.
translations.chinese: 如果你对现状不满……那不关我的事。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02013789]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I'm not going to blamed for whatever happens. | ZH: 不管发生什么，都不能怪我。 | SID: 0027E9
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: If you're not happy with things... that's not my business. | ZH: 如果你对现状不满……那不关我的事。 | SID: 002850

translations.english: You're sweet to say that, but you need to sort things out on your own. It's not something I'm going to get involved with.
translations.chinese: 你能这么说我很开心，但要你自己去解决现在的问题。这不是要把我牵扯进去的事情。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0201378A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're sweet to say that, but you need to sort things out on your own. It's not something I'm going to get involved with. | ZH: 你能这么说我很开心，但要你自己去解决现在的问题。这不是要把我牵扯进去的事情。 | SID: 00284F

translations.english: But... that's just not something I'm going to be able to do. Ever.
translations.chinese: 但是……这不是我能办到的，永远都是。

translations.english: You're sweet. And... I'm not stupid. I can see what you're getting at.
translations.chinese: 你很招人喜欢。然后……我也不笨，明白你的意思。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I had just moved from my ancestral home in Morrowind to the continent of Cyrodiil. | ZH: 我刚从晨风老家搬到希罗帝尔。 | SID: 001AFF

translations.english: All I remember is that damn dremora and his minions bursting into my home and sending me to their prison.
translations.chinese: 我只记得那该死的魔人和他的爪牙闯进我家，把我送到监狱了。

translations.english: Soul what? What in the name of Vivec are you talking about?
translations.chinese: 灵魂什么？维威克在上，你说什么？

agentText:

translations.english: Indeed I was. I hunted down and killed every last one of them. Took years.
translations.chinese: 当然了。我追捕并杀死了每一只峭壁行者，花了好几年。

translations.english: The people of Morrowind were so grateful to have the roads safer again, they took to calling me "Saint Jiub" and then the other names followed.
translations.chinese: 晨风人民非常感激道路又安全了，他们开始称我为“圣鸠步”，其他的头衔也就都来了。

translations.english: Walked right into a trap, and didn't even realize it until I was captured.
translations.chinese: 我直到被抓都没意识到那是个陷阱。

translations.english: He got to my target first and called the guard to cover his tracks. By the time I got there, the place was on alert.
translations.chinese: 他先我一步找到了目标，然后呼唤卫兵以掩盖行踪。等我到那里时，已经处于警戒状态了。

Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02014152]
Translations:

translations.english: Oh, this is simply getting infuriating!

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02014153]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, this is simply getting infuriating! | ZH: 哦，太让人生气了！ | SID: 001BA8

translations.english: I can only assume the gates have been closed by now.
translations.chinese: 我只能假设那些门已经关上了。

translations.english: Well, I don't know. Everything seemed fine until that dremora attacked me. I only heard later about the gates from the other souls.
translations.chinese: 嗯，我不知道。在那个魔人袭击我之前好像一切都好。后来我才从其他灵魂那里听说湮灭之门的事。

agentText:

translations.english: I was in the midst of writing the second volume and they just threw me into this prison. It's unfair!
translations.chinese: 我当时正在写第二卷，他们就把我扔进了这个监狱，不公平！

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02014155]

translations.english: All I heard is that without a Septim sitting on the throne of the Empire, the Dragonfires in a place called the Temple of the One were no longer lit.
translations.chinese: 我只是听说，帝国皇位若无塞普汀坐镇，至尊神殿的龙火就会熄灭。

translations.english: This meant that we were vulnerable to the forces of Oblivion.
translations.chinese: 这意味着我们很容易受到湮灭势力的攻击。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.chinese: 只能说我并不惊讶，毕竟在我出版第二卷之前，没人会知道我的成就。

translations.english: They used to criss-cross the skies over Morrowind like vermin. Nasty flying creatures with a habit of sneaking up on the unwary.
translations.chinese: 这群讨厌的飞行生物，曾经像害虫一样在晨风上空纵横，还喜欢偷偷接近毫无防备之人。

translations.english: Yes. I'm speaking of the Cliff Racer of course. Wretched things.
translations.chinese: 对，我说的当然是峭壁行者。扭曲的生物。

translations.english: Finally! I never thought I'd see these again.
translations.chinese: 终于！从没想过我还能再看到这些。

translations.english: These pages meant the world to me. Thank you!
translations.chinese: 这几张纸对我来说就是全世界，感谢你！

translations.english: Well, that's a ridiculous question. Everyone traveling through here has said that the Oblivion Gates have been opening all over Tamriel.
translations.chinese: 嗯，这个问题太荒谬了。所有来这里的人都说全泰姆瑞尔各处都开启了湮灭之门。

translations.english: After I was freed from prison, I decided to turn my life around. Give something back to the people of Morrowind.
translations.chinese: 出狱后，我决定改过自新，做些事情回报晨风人民。

translations.english: It became quickly apparent that the best way I could help would be by wiping out the cliff racers.
translations.chinese: 我很快就发现，最好的办法就是消灭峭壁行者。

translations.english: Well, I assume so. It cast a spell at me from some kind of strange black crystal.
translations.chinese: 嗯，我想是的，他用一种奇怪的黑色水晶向我施法。

translations.english: Next thing I knew, I arrived here.
translations.chinese: 接下来我记得就到了这里。

agentText:

translations.english: Ah, yes. Saint Jiub, Jiub the Eradicator, Jiub the Magnificent... I've earned a lot of those titles thanks to my campaign against the Winged Menace.
translations.chinese: 啊对，圣鸠步，铲除者鸠步，伟人鸠步……我有许多的类似的头衔，这要归功于我对带翼威胁的战斗。

translations.english: I am Jiub. Some call me Saint Jiub. Others call me Jiub the Eradicator. Perhaps you've heard of me?
translations.chinese: 我是鸠步，有人叫我圣鸠步，还有人叫我“铲除者”鸠步，也许你听说过我？

translations.english: Very well. I suppose a moment or two of my time couldn't hurt.
translations.chinese: 好吧，花点时间陪你聊聊也无妨。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [0201415E]
Translations:

translations.english: No... all these wasted months, or has it been years? I don't even remember how much time has passed.
translations.chinese: 不……我这是浪费了好几个月，还是好几年？甚至不记得已经过了多久了。

translations.english: Now my work will never see the light of day. My name will be forgotten.
translations.chinese: 现在我的书再也不能面世了，我的名字也会被忘记。

translations.english: Hmph. I tell you what's crazy.
How about sitting in your home, minding your own business and then suddenly getting attacked by a dremora and his cronies.
translations.chinese: 你坐在家里，思考自己的事情，然后突然就被魔人和他的亲信们袭击了，如何？。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02014160]
Translations:

translations.english: How does anyone expect me to write my opus with all of these rude interruptions?
translations.chinese: 我如何在这些无礼的打扰下写完巨著呢？

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02014161]
Translations:

translations.english: Oh, I see. You've decided to cease pursuing your busy schedule and wish to talk now. How kind.
translations.chinese: 哦我懂，你中止了繁忙的日程安排，现在就想谈谈，真善良。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02014162]
Translations:

translations.english: Maybe you should leave the writing to an expert and stop making foolish suggestions.
translations.chinese: 也许你该让专家来写书，别提愚蠢的建议了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

translations.english: Oh, wait a moment. Here, I want you to have these before you go.
translations.chinese: 哦，等一下。收下吧，希望你走前带上这个。

translations.english: A pristine copy of my first volume. Only one in print, actually.
translations.chinese: 我第一卷的原始副本，实际上只有一本印出了。

translations.english: And take this as well. Seeing as Saint Jiub has ascended to pure spiritual form, I won't need it any longer.
translations.chinese: 把这个也带上吧，既然圣鸠步已经升华为纯粹的精魂形态，我就再也不需要它了。

translations.english: That damn dremora and his minions. They didn't even give me a chance to explain who I was.
translations.chinese: 那个该死的魔人和他的爪牙，甚至没给我机会说清楚我是谁。

EDID: [0201416B]

translations.english: Maybe that's why I worked so hard to redeem myself once I was freed.
translations.chinese: 可能这就是为什么我要在获释后努力赎罪。

translations.english: That was a dark time in my life. I did a lot of things I ended up regretting.
translations.chinese: 那是我生命中的黑暗时光。我做了很多后悔的事。

agentText:

translations.chinese: 一本书？我很难把一部二十六卷的史诗简称为“书”。

translations.english: Surely you've heard of "The Rise and Fall of Saint Jiub the Eradicator: Hero of Morrowind and Savior of the Dunmer."
translations.chinese: 你一定听说过《铲除者鸠步的兴衰：晨风的英雄与丹莫的救世主》。

translations.english: I was simply an addict who needed money for skooma. The stuff wasn't cheap, and murder always seemed to be in demand.

translations.english: I murdered others for money. And before you think I belonged to some romantic or secretive guild, think again.
translations.chinese: 我为了钱谋杀了别人，如果你认为我属于某个浪漫或者秘密的公会，还是算了吧。

translations.chinese: 我心里明白，是我的妻子瓦蕾莉卡，把我挚爱的女儿从我身边带走了。

translations.english: If I ever see her again, she will pay most dearly for that betrayal.
translations.chinese: 如果我再见到她，她会为背叛付出最惨痛的代价。

translations.english: I commanded every vampire in the court to look for them, but after centuries of searching without success, I lost hope.
translations.chinese: 我曾命令宫廷里每个吸血鬼都去找她们，但找了几个世纪都没找到，就不抱希望了。

translations.english: Serana and her mother disappeared long ago.

- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: I commanded every vampire in the court to look for them, but after centuries of searching without success, I lost hope. | ZH: 我曾命令宫廷里每个吸血鬼都去找她们，但找了几个世纪都没找到，就不抱希望了。 | SID: 0013F4
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Serana and her mother disappeared long ago. | ZH: 瑟拉娜和她母亲很久以前就失踪了。 | SID: 001BB0

translations.english: Her name was Valerica. She has been gone for so long now, I can only assume she has left this world, one way or another.
translations.chinese: 她叫瓦蕾莉卡。离开了这么久，我只能假设她已经离世了，无论方式如何。

translations.english: I will say only that we did not part on good terms.
translations.chinese: 我只能说，我们是不欢而散。

translations.english: I will banish you from this castle. I will spare your life this once, but after that, you are prey.
translations.chinese: 我会把你驱逐出这座城堡。我这次饶你一命，不过在那以后，你就是猎物了。

translations.english: Yes, I can smell it on you.
translations.chinese: 是啊，我从你身上闻得出来。

translations.english: The power of my blood will purge that filth and make you whole again.
translations.chinese: 我的血液的力量会净化掉那污秽，让你重新完整。

translations.chinese: 拒绝我，我会把你驱逐出这座城堡。我这次饶你一命，不过在那以后，你就是猎物了。

translations.english: Accept my gift and I promise that you will learn the difference.
translations.chinese: 接受我的礼物，我保证你就会知道不同之处了。

translations.english: You contracted a disease, perhaps, but you are no true vampire.
translations.chinese: 也许你染上了疾病，不过你还不是一个真正的吸血鬼。

translations.chinese: 我等这一刻等了太久了，找到了，终于。
祝贺你，还有……谢谢你，卡提雅。

translations.english: But... it's hopeless. I died here, just like all the others. Turn back. Turn back before you become the next victim.
translations.chinese: 但……没希望了。我跟其他人一样死在这里了。回头吧，在你成为下一个受害者之前回去吧。

translations.english: Make use of my coffin whenever you like. My home is your home.
translations.chinese: 随时可以用我的棺材，我家就是你家。

translations.english: You've given me a great gift friend. The night air hums and the shadows are full of color.
translations.chinese: 你给了我一件大礼，朋友。夜晚的空气在低吟，阴影中充满了色彩。

translations.chinese: 你给我的血是份厚礼。它在我的血管中沸腾着，赐给了我力量。

translations.english: My brother in darkness. While it's good to see you, we'll keep up appearances, yes?
translations.chinese: 黑暗中的兄弟啊，虽然很高兴见到你，但我们还是得保持体面，好吗？

translations.chinese: 病人的血，弱者的血，毫无戒心的贵族老爷的血。各有特色，都是没有意识到危险的美味猎物。

translations.english: I keep an eye on their comings and goings. No one suspects poor Cairine. Poor, poor Cairine. Ha!
translations.chinese: 我关注着他们的出入，没有人怀疑可怜的凯林。可怜啊，可怜的凯林。哈！

translations.english: The darkness hums and we sing its praises. Sweet melodies. Sweet like the water that flows through their veins.
translations.chinese: 黑夜在低吟，而我们为它献上赞歌。这甜美的旋律，甜美的如同漫过他们血管的水流。

translations.english: Haran manages the inn in Winterhold. A forsaken place under the shadow of the mages guild. She will help us keep an eye on the mages.
translations.chinese: 哈兰经营着冬堡的旅店，是个法师公会阴影中的破败地盘。她会帮我们盯着那些法师。

translations.english: Valindor of Riften has his ears in places that we'd love to listening in. Joining our family should increase our possibilities in the south.
translations.chinese: 裂谷的瓦林多能监听我们想听的地方。让他加入家庭里来应该会增加我们在南方的机会。

translations.english: A pathetic creature in her present condition, but the gift will embolden her. And her lowly state suits her to being our eyes and ears in Markarth.
translations.chinese: 有个人现在的处境是很可悲，但这份礼物会让她更加大胆。她的卑微姿态让她适合成为我们在马卡斯的耳目。

translations.english: We both realized that if Isran's even allowed us in here, he must be really concerned.
translations.chinese: 我们都觉得，伊士冉愿意邀请我们，说明他一定非常忧虑。

translations.english: Do you have a moment? Gunmar and I have been talking and, well, we're slightly worried.
translations.chinese: 你现在有空吗？甘马尔和我谈过了，嗯，我们有点担心。

translations.english: And if he's that concerned, the situation must be pretty bad. Make sense?
translations.chinese: 如果他真的如此，那情况肯定很糟糕。明白了吗？

translations.english: Florentius? Really? I assumed Isran would want nothing to do with him.
translations.chinese: 佛伦提乌斯？真的？我以为伊士冉不想跟他有任何关系了。

translations.english: Well, that's the thing. We don't know where he is. Haven't seen him in years.
translations.chinese: 嗯，这就是问题所在了。我们不知道他在哪儿，很多年没见过了。

translations.english: So maybe you could ask Isran if he knows anything? Just keep in mind that he... well, he might not like the idea.
translations.chinese: 也许你可以问问伊士冉知不知道什么？但记着……他可能不喜欢这个主意。

translations.english: I think he had regular contact with the Vigilants, and I know Isran kept track of them...
translations.chinese: 我想他经常和警戒者有联系，而伊士冉一直都在追踪他们。

translations.english: Whatever is required! I am happy to do whatever is asked of me. I only wish to be useful.
translations.chinese: 需要什么我就做什么！我乐意干任何让我去干的活儿，只希望能派上用场。

translations.english: If I can remain useful, those above me will see fit to keep me here.
translations.chinese: 要是我能一直有用，上头会看到留我在这里的好处。

translations.english: Often I take on tasks that Garan or Feran find distasteful, or... beneath them.
translations.chinese: 我经常接一些加兰和费兰讨厌的任务，或者说……有失他们身份的任务。

translations.chinese: 他有点古怪，但我们可以信任他，也肯定用得上他的技术。

translations.english: He's a priest of Arkay. Well, he was. It's... it's complicated.
translations.chinese: 他是个阿尔凯祭司。嗯，以前是。这……有点复杂。

translations.english: Gunmar and I agree that we're going to need Florentius to help.
translations.chinese: 甘马尔和我都认为我们需要佛伦提乌斯的帮助。

translations.english: Yes. These vampires are a new threat, and a truly deadly one.
translations.chinese: 是的。这些吸血鬼是新的威胁，而且是真正致命的威胁。

translations.english: Gunmar and I have a lot of work to do here, so we were hoping that maybe you could track him down.
translations.chinese: 甘马尔和我还有很多工作要做，所以希望你能找到他。

translations.english: Let's just say a tiny part of you rubbed off on it, and in its place, a bit of the Soul Cairn filled the void.
translations.chinese: 简单说就是你的一小部分被搓掉了，而灵魂石冢的一小部分把空缺给填上了。

translations.english: You should find no difficulty using the portal any longer.
translations.chinese: 你应该不会再觉得使用传送门有什么难的了。

translations.english: As you've been traveling in the Soul Cairn, your body has become attuned to it.
translations.chinese: 当你穿越灵魂石冢时，你的身体已经适应了它。

translations.chinese: 你给我的礼物太珍贵了，通过你的眼睛以这样的方式看待这个世界，我们一下就亲近了。

translations.chinese: 我不关心政治，你要是想和他们争王位，去就是。

translations.english: New blood, eh? Let's get something very clear.

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: You watch yourself around him. | ZH: 围着他转时小心点儿。 | SID: 0016D8
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: He'll cozy up to you, use his honeyed words to get you to lower your guard, then use you and throw you away when he's done with you. | ZH: 他会讨好你，用甜言蜜语让你放松警惕，然后在利用完后把你扔掉。 | SID: 001AC5
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Of course not. He's an elf, isn't he? | ZH: 当然不了，他是个精灵，不是吗？ | SID: 001B52

translations.english: If it'll get him closer to being in charge, he'll slit your throat without a moment's thought.
translations.chinese: 如果割断你的喉咙能让他向权力更进一步，他不会犹豫的。

translations.english: He'll tell you what a monster I am, that I can't be trusted... You mark my words, it's him you need to worry about.
translations.chinese: 他会告诉你我是个怪物，不值得信任……记住了，你该担心的是他。

translations.english: Another elf, I see. I'm sure Vingalmo will be sizing you up as we speak, trying to figure if you're friend or foe.
translations.chinese: 又来个精灵，对吧。文加莫肯定会在我们说话时打量你，试图弄清你是敌是友。

agentText:

translations.english: Want my advice? Avoid getting wrapped up in Vingalmo's schemes. He's after the throne, and he'll kill anyone that gets in his way.
translations.chinese: 想听我的建议吗？别卷入文加莫的阴谋。他谋求王位，任何妨碍的都会死于他手。

translations.english: Between you and me, there's too many of them. Can't trust the lot of them; never could.
translations.chinese: 这话咱俩私下说，这里人是不少，但没几个可信的，永远不可信。

translations.english: Good to see a new face here. Especially one that isn't attached to an elf.
translations.chinese: 很高兴在这儿看到一张新面孔，尤其是与精灵无关的。

translations.english: All over Skyrim. It's my job to collect them. I try and keep something for everyone. For every taste, I mean.
translations.chinese: 全天际。我的工作就是搜集他们。尽量保证给所有人都留点。哦我是说，留点不同口味。

translations.english: Sometimes you get one who comes willingly, but most have to be convinced to join us here.
translations.chinese: 有时候能遇到自愿来的，但大多数人得说服后才会加入这里。

translations.english: Now that you've retrieved the Elder Scroll, you should be on your way.
translations.chinese: 你现在已经找回上古卷轴了，你该上路了。

translations.english: Aye, I was. Didn't progress very far. Never did care for their attitude, acting like they're better than everyone else.
translations.chinese: 啊，是的。没待多久。从不关心他们的态度，表现得就像是比别人都高贵一样。

translations.english: But none of that matters now.
translations.chinese: 但现在这些都不重要了。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02014EA3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Aye, I was. Didn't progress very far. Never did care for their attitude, acting like they're better than everyone else. | ZH: 啊，是的。没待多久。从不关心他们的态度，表现得就像是比别人都高贵一样。 | SID: 0014F8

translations.english: Time was I could barely hold my own in the Companions. Now I could slaughter them all without a second thought.
translations.chinese: 有段时间我都没法在战友团里站稳脚跟，现在我可以毫不犹豫地把他们全杀了。

translations.english: Can you feel it? You're now so much more than you were before.
translations.chinese: 感觉到了吗？你比以前成熟多了。

translations.english: And I'm not half the vampire Lord Harkon is. Truth is I'm better with a forge than I am with claws or fangs.
translations.chinese: 但我的力量不及哈孔大人一半。比起用利爪和獠牙，还是看锻炉更适合我。

translations.english: The law will require proof that we can't present. And Jarls disapprove of bloodshed they haven't called for themselves.
translations.chinese: 当权者会要求我们提供证据，但我们拿不出来。领主们不乐意见到自己没批准的流血事件。

translations.english: Alas, the vampire can cloud the minds of those he preys upon. It won't be easy to convince anyone he's other than he appears.
translations.chinese: 唉，吸血鬼能模糊猎物的思维，要让别人相信他的真面目并不简单。

translations.english: Best not to damage our reputation. Let your actions be as discrete as possible.
translations.chinese: 最好不要损害我们的声誉，尽可能地减少牵连。

translations.english: But we'll put a swift end to that.
translations.chinese: 但我们马上就会终结这种局面。

translations.english: Vampires enjoy stalking their prey. Passing among us undetected emboldens them. Makes them feel powerful, untouchable.
translations.chinese: 吸血鬼享受跟踪猎物的过程，置身我们之中而不被发现壮了他们的胆，他们感到强大，不可触及。

translations.english: You must be clever. Find a way not to be caught or accused of murder.
translations.chinese: 你得机灵点，想办法不被抓或被指控谋杀。

translations.english: You'll figure something out. We must be vigilant and self sufficient if we are to defeat these monsters.
translations.chinese: 你会找出办法的。要打倒这些怪物，我们就必须保持警惕和自全。

translations.english: Have to say, I'm glad that's over.
translations.chinese: 不得不说，我很高兴一切都结束了。

translations.english: There you are. Give me a hand with this door, would you?

translations.chinese: 欢迎你，新人。这里是启迪之路龛。

translations.chinese: 准备好接受奥瑞-艾尔的教导，用他的启示填满容器了吗？

translations.english: Then go forth, child. May the enrichment of Auri-El strengthen your resolve as you undertake your journey to the Inner Sanctum.
translations.chinese: 那就继续向前吧，孩子。愿奥瑞-艾尔的充实强化你的决心，让你迈步通往内殿的旅途。

translations.english: May the blessings of Auri-El protect you as you climb the road to the Inner Sanctum and final enlightenment.
translations.chinese: 愿奥瑞-艾尔的赐福在你通往内殿和最终启蒙的攀登路上守护你。

translations.english: May Auri-El's glow shield you from your enemy.
translations.chinese: 愿奥瑞-艾尔之光保护你不受敌人伤害。

translations.english: May Auri-El's radiance fill your heart with joy.

translations.english: Then he found that prophecy, and... that was it.
translations.chinese: 后来他找到了那个预言，再然后……就这样了。

translations.english: They were both drunk with power, and pulling in different directions.
translations.chinese: 他俩都沉迷于力量，然后分道扬镳了。

translations.english: The moment we gave ourselves to Molag Bal, things got really icy between them.
translations.chinese: 自从我们把自己献给莫拉格·巴尔那时起，他俩的关系就跌入了冰点。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: They were both drunk with power, and pulling in different directions. | ZH: 他俩都沉迷于力量，然后分道扬镳了。 | SID: 0019D7

translations.english: Look around you. There are some extremely powerful undead here.
translations.chinese: 看看你周围呀。这里可有一些很强大的亡灵呢。

translations.english: Even a necromancer as seasoned as my mother would be willing to spend years trying to gain access to them.
translations.chinese: 即便是像我母亲这样老练的死灵法师也愿意花上许多年时间，试着得到它们。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Even a necromancer as seasoned as my mother would be willing to spend years trying to gain access to them. | ZH: 即便是像我母亲这样老练的死灵法师也愿意花上许多年时间，试着得到它们。 | SID: 001712

translations.english: She wanted to get it as far away from my father as possible. I can't imagine a better place.
translations.chinese: 她想让那东西离我父亲远远的。我再也想不到更好的地方了。

translations.english: No, but there's no way she would have left it in Tamriel.
translations.chinese: 不，不过她也没理由把它们留在泰姆瑞尔啊。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: She wanted to get it as far away from my father as possible. I can't imagine a better place. | ZH: 她想让那东西离我父亲远远的。我再也想不到更好的地方了。 | SID: 0013C3
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: No, but there's no way she would have left it in Tamriel. | ZH: 不，不过她也没理由把它们留在泰姆瑞尔啊。 | SID: 001B91

Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02014F75]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Wait... I hear something! | ZH: 等等……我听到些动静。 | SID: 0015D5

translations.english: It's Durnehviir... he's here! Defend yourselves!
translations.chinese: 是杜耐维尔……他来了！保护好你们自己！

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02014F76]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's Durnehviir... he's here! Defend yourselves! | ZH: 是杜耐维尔……他来了！保护好你们自己！ | SID: 001B84

translations.english: Probably to avoid whatever my father would do to her if he could get his hands on her.
translations.chinese: 可能是以防我父亲抓到她后会发生的那些事情。

translations.english: Or maybe her plan was to come back, but she was stuck here. We won't know until we find her.
translations.chinese: 也可能是她打算回去，不过她被困在这了。在我们找到她之前，我们什么都不知道。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02014F77]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Probably to avoid whatever my father would do to her if he could get his hands on her. | ZH: 可能是以防我父亲抓到她后会发生的那些事情。 | SID: 001419
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Or maybe her plan was to come back, but she was stuck here. We won't know until we find her. | ZH: 也可能是她打算回去，不过她被困在这了。在我们找到她之前，我们什么都不知道。 | SID: 001A75

translations.english: I don't think anyone's ever met the Ideal Masters. I'm not even sure anyone knows what they look like.
translations.chinese: 我觉得没人曾遇见过理想之主。我甚至不确定有谁知道它们长什么样。

translations.english: They could be underground, flying above us... They might be the ground. I have no idea.
translations.chinese: 它们可能在地下，可能飞在我们头顶……他们可能就是大地。我不知道。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
