- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I don't think anyone's ever met the Ideal Masters. I'm not even sure anyone knows what they look like. | ZH: 我觉得没人曾遇见过理想之主。我甚至不确定有谁知道它们长什么样。 | SID: 00163F
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: They could be underground, flying above us... They might be the ground. I have no idea. | ZH: 它们可能在地下，可能飞在我们头顶……他们可能就是大地。我不知道。 | SID: 001896

translations.english: All those things had been building for a while. You have no idea how long I wanted to say that to her.
translations.chinese: 这些事情都过了一段时间了，你不知道我有多想对她说这几句。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02014F79]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Relieved... I think. | ZH: 我觉得是……如释重负。 | SID: 001982
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: All those things had been building for a while. You have no idea how long I wanted to say that to her. | ZH: 这些事情都过了一段时间了，你不知道我有多想对她说这几句。 | SID: 001B75

translations.english: Well, I think it's specifically the black ones. I don't know if the Soul Cairn takes just any leftovers.
translations.chinese: 好吧，我觉得确切讲黑色的是这样。我不知道灵魂石冢是不是只带走了些残渣。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02014F7A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well, I think it's specifically the black ones. I don't know if the Soul Cairn takes just any leftovers. | ZH: 好吧，我觉得确切讲黑色的是这样。我不知道灵魂石冢是不是只带走了些残渣。 | SID: 001A9F

translations.english: Look at this place. Do you think anything would want to live here?
translations.chinese: 瞧瞧这地方。你觉得有谁想生活在这里啊？

translations.english: The only things that can survive here are the Ideal Masters, the undead and the souls themselves. Well, if you want to call that "living."
translations.chinese: 唯一能在这里生存的只有理想之主、亡灵以及灵魂。嗯，如果你管那叫“活物”的话。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02014F7B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Look at this place. Do you think anything would want to live here? | ZH: 瞧瞧这地方。你觉得有谁想生活在这里啊？ | SID: 0015E3
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: The only things that can survive here are the Ideal Masters, the undead and the souls themselves. Well, if you want to call that "living." | ZH: 唯一能在这里生存的只有理想之主、亡灵以及灵魂。嗯，如果你管那叫“活物”的话。 | SID: 0019E0

translations.english: When something is trapped in a soul gem, and then the energy is used for powering an enchantment, the remnants are sent here.
translations.chinese: 当一个灵魂被关进灵魂石，然后能量被用来附魔时，剩下的部分就会被传进这里。

translations.english: Just what my mother told me. I've also studied a little bit on my own, but there's not much.
translations.chinese: 就是我母亲告诉我的那些。我也自己做了点研究，但不是很深入。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02014F7C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: When something is trapped in a soul gem, and then the energy is used for powering an enchantment, the remnants are sent here. | ZH: 当一个灵魂被关进灵魂石，然后能量被用来附魔时，剩下的部分就会被传进这里。 | SID: 0017C4
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Just what my mother told me. I've also studied a little bit on my own, but there's not much. | ZH: 就是我母亲告诉我的那些。我也自己做了点研究，但不是很深入。 | SID: 001C1F

translations.english: Whatever they're doing with them, they've been harvesting for millennia. No telling how many souls are trapped here.
translations.chinese: 不管它们用灵魂干什么，它们都已经收割几千年了。不知道有多少灵魂被困在这里。

translations.english: Others think they use them as payment to an even higher power... almost like a currency. A very strange currency.
translations.chinese: 其他人认为它们将灵魂向更高的力量做交易……差不多像一种货币，一种非常奇怪的货币。

translations.english: Lots of theories. Some say they feed on them like I feed on blood.
translations.chinese: 有很多说法。有些人认为它们以灵魂为食，就跟我喝血一样。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02014F7D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Whatever they're doing with them, they've been harvesting for millennia. No telling how many souls are trapped here. | ZH: 不管它们用灵魂干什么，它们都已经收割几千年了。不知道有多少灵魂被困在这里。 | SID: 001346
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Others think they use them as payment to an even higher power... almost like a currency. A very strange currency. | ZH: 其他人认为它们将灵魂向更高的力量做交易……差不多像一种货币，一种非常奇怪的货币。 | SID: 0013BB
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Lots of theories. Some say they feed on them like I feed on blood. | ZH: 有很多说法。有些人认为它们以灵魂为食，就跟我喝血一样。 | SID: 0014BA

translations.english: Maybe I could have seen this coming. We could all be better off now.
translations.chinese: 也许我该早点预见这点，那我们现在都会过得更好。

translations.english: I was. Honestly, it took me up until now to figure out that my mother was really just as bad as he was.
translations.chinese: 是啊。老实说，我现在才明白我母亲真的跟我父亲一样坏。

translations.english: He was obsessed with power. She was obsessed with seeing him fail. It was just so... toxic.
translations.chinese: 我父亲沉迷于力量。而母亲沉迷于看他落败。这真是……有毒啊。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02014F7E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Maybe I could have seen this coming. We could all be better off now. | ZH: 也许我该早点预见这点，那我们现在都会过得更好。 | SID: 001505
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I was. Honestly, it took me up until now to figure out that my mother was really just as bad as he was. | ZH: 是啊。老实说，我现在才明白我母亲真的跟我父亲一样坏。 | SID: 0016BF
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: He was obsessed with power. She was obsessed with seeing him fail. It was just so... toxic. | ZH: 我父亲沉迷于力量。而母亲沉迷于看他落败。这真是……有毒啊。 | SID: 001B9E

translations.english: But bringing something from the Soul Cairn gives you something much more powerful.
translations.chinese: 不过从灵魂石冢里带出来的东西会带给你更加强大的力量。

translations.english: Exactly. It's a lost art. Most necromancers just raise up whatever bodies are nearby. A simple trick, really. Child's play.
translations.chinese: 正是如此。这是门失传的手艺。大部分死灵法师只能唤起周围的什么尸体。真的只是个小把戏。雕虫小技罢了。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Exactly. It's a lost art. Most necromancers just raise up whatever bodies are nearby. A simple trick, really. Child's play. | ZH: 正是如此。这是门失传的手艺。大部分死灵法师只能唤起周围的什么尸体。真的只是个小把戏。雕虫小技罢了。 | SID: 001653

translations.english: Then we find out where she hid it. If she's still alive... well, as alive as she was before. Or is now. Or... you know what I mean.
translations.chinese: 那我们就得找到她藏在哪里。如果她还活着……嗯，还和以前一样。或者现在也是。又或者……你懂我意思吧。

agentText:
Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02014F80]

Addon: Dawnguard
EDID: [02014F81]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Maker... it can't be. Serana?! | ZH: 主啊……这不可能。瑟拉娜？ | SID: 001B82

translations.english: Look, I loved my father, but when he found that prophecy... that became his life. Everything else, even me and my mother... we just became clutter.
translations.chinese: 听着，我过去是爱我父亲的，不过当他找到那个预言……那东西就占据了他的人生。其他的东西，甚至是我们母女……都变成了多余的。

translations.english: I was close with my mother, but she just kept feeding me her opinions of him, and eventually I started believing them.
translations.chinese: 我以前跟我母亲很亲密，不过她总是向我灌输她对我父亲的那些看法，最终我开始相信了。

translations.english: Well, that's usually the trick. It's possible to do it through a simple portal.
translations.chinese: 好吧，这一般都是小把戏。通过一道简简单单的传送门就能办到。

translations.english: But to finalize the deal, you have to travel here yourself... and most of them never come back.
translations.chinese: 但要完成交易，你得亲自来这里……而他们中的许多人再也没回去。
